description:
About the job

About Signify

Through bold discovery and cutting-edge innovation, we lead an industry that is vital for the future of our planet: lighting. Through our leadership in connected lighting and the Internet of Things, we're breaking new ground in data analytics, AI, and smart solutions for homes, offices, cities, and beyond.

At Signify, you can shape tomorrow by building on our incredible 125+ year legacy while working toward even bolder sustainability goals. Our culture of continuous learning, creativity, and commitment to diversity and inclusion empowers you to grow your skills and career.

Join us, and together, we’ll transform our industry, making a lasting difference for brighter lives and a better world.

More About The Role

We’re looking for an Intern to join our Consumer Channel team in Mexico.

Working for Signify means being creative and adaptive. Our culture of continuous learning and commitment to diversity and inclusion creates an environment that allows you to build your skills and career. Together, we’re transforming our industry.

As the world leader in lighting, we’re constantly ahead of the curve. Through our leadership in connected lighting and the Internet of Things, we’re breaking new grounds in data analytics, AI, and smart homes, offices, cities and more!

Signify is proud to be a leader in climate action, acting in line with the latest climate science. We are committed to reaching net zero greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions by 2040.

As an Intern / Apprentice you’ll be responsible for supporting Sales team and SOM role to improve customer service level in all the region (MEX & NOLA).

We’re on the lookout for forward-thinking innovators with a passion for sustainability. If you match this description, get in touch!

What You’ll Do


Sales Dashboard construction
Inventory level tracking (on hand / in transit) – Signify and Customer analysis
Slowmovers Action Tracker development
Sell In / Sell Out Consolidation ( 12 – 24 months)
Provisions report


Your Qualifications


Industrial Engineering or Business student (graduating after June 2027)
Intermediate English
Excel proficiency
Proactive


Our candidate profile is just a guide. We know that many talented people only apply for jobs when there is an exact match. If you don't fit all the criteria but believe this role is for you, we would very much like to hear from you.

We’re offering multiple opportunities for career development, like mentoring, coaching and stretch assignments, with strong international exposure for dynamic profiles. Learning is fundamental to our culture. Through continuous learning, we are transforming the industry. You have the chance to learn every day, acquire new skills and perspectives through customized online programs, and on-the-job experiences.

See #SignifyLife through the eyes of our employees!

Everything we’ll do for you

You can grow a lasting career here. We’ll encourage you, support you, and challenge you. We’ll help you learn and progress in a way that’s right for you, with coaching and mentoring along the way. We’ll listen to you too, because we see and value every one of our 27,000+ people. We believe that a diverse and inclusive workplace fosters creativity, innovation, and a full spectrum of bright ideas. With a global workforce present in 70+ countries, we are dedicated to creating an inclusive environment where every voice is heard and valued, helping us all achieve more together.

Come join us, and together we can light up the future.

title: Paid Ads Specialist

description:
About the job

The Role

We're looking for a results-driven Paid Ads Specialist who knows how to turn ad spend into real ROI. You'll run, optimize, and scale campaigns across Meta, Google, and LinkedIn Ads, working closely with our creative and marketing teams to push performance further with every iteration.

We need someone who's equal parts analyst and strategist — comfortable diving into the numbers, but just as confident shaping the creative, messaging, and targeting behind every campaign.




What You'll Do

Plan, launch, manage, and optimize paid campaigns across Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram), Google Ads (Search, Display, YouTube, Shopping), and LinkedIn Ads
Build and refine audience targeting strategies, including custom audiences, lookalikes, and retargeting funnels
Analyze performance metrics (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CPC, conversions) and turn data into action
Guide ad creative direction, including copywriting angles, visual concepts, and formats (video, static, UGC-style, carousel, etc.)
Partner with internal teams to continuously improve ad performance
Run A/B tests across audiences, creatives, and messaging
Manage budgets efficiently and scale winning campaigns
Deliver clear performance reports with actionable insights
Stay sharp on platform updates, policy changes, and emerging best practices




What You Bring

Proven experience managing successful campaigns on Meta, Google, and LinkedIn Ads
Track record running campaigns for U.S. or Canadian brands
Strong grasp of performance marketing and conversion optimization
Skill in identifying and targeting the right audience at every funnel stage
Experience shaping or directing ad creative strategy
Strong written and verbal English communication
Sharp analytical instincts and comfort working with performance data
Experience with tracking tools (GA4, Meta Pixel, GTM, etc.)
Self-starter mindset with strong ownership of results




Nice to Have

Experience in wellness, e-commerce, or DTC brands




Why Join Us

Work with a growing, ambitious brand
High autonomy and ownership over your campaigns
A performance-driven culture that gives you room to test, learn, and scale
Real potential for long-term collaboration

title: LATAM Regional Intern
skills: Collaborate with agencies and partners to ensure marketing strategies are executed as planned.

Coordinate the ordering and distribution of promotional items.

Comfortable working independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.
Open to feedback and continuous improvement.

A balance of analytical thinking and creative problem-solving.
Intermediate proficiency in Excel (e.g., pivot tables, basic formulas).
Curious, adaptable, and eager to grow within the marketing field.
Passionate about entertainment, media, and storytelling.
Enthusiastic team player with a positive attitude and collaborative mindset.
description:
About the job

NBCUniversal is one of the world's leading media and entertainment companies. We create world-class content, which we distribute across our portfolio of film, television, and streaming, and bring to life through our global theme park destinations, consumer products, and experiences. We own and operate leading entertainment and news brands, including NBC, NBC News, NBC Sports, Telemundo, NBC Local Stations, Bravo, and Peacock, our premium ad-supported streaming service. We produce and distribute premier filmed entertainment and programming through our powerhouse film and television studios, including Universal Pictures, DreamWorks Animation, and Focus Features, and the four global television studios under the Universal Studio Group banner, and operate industry-leading theme parks and experiences around the world through Universal Destinations & Experiences, including Universal Orlando Resort, home to Universal Epic Universe, and Universal Studios Hollywood. NBCUniversal is a subsidiary of Comcast Corporation. Visit www.nbcuniversal.com for more information.



Our impact is rooted in improving the communities where our employees, customers, and audiences live and work. We have a rich tradition of giving back and ensuring our employees have the opportunity to serve their communities. We champion an inclusive culture and strive to attract and develop a talented workforce to create and deliver a wide range of content reflecting our world.





Job Description



Role Purpose: We are looking for a proactive and detail-oriented intern to join our LATAM Regional Marketing team. This role offers a unique opportunity to gain hands-on experience in marketing operations, event coordination, and creative production within a dynamic and fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities



Collaborate with agencies and partners to ensure marketing strategies are executed as planned. 
Support budget tracking by compiling PO vs. budget reports for Director-level review. 
Maintain and update key documents, including competitive analysis and local production reports. 
Coordinate ticket distribution for local premieres and screenings. 
Assist with logistics for events involving the Senior Management Team. 
Manage administrative and coordination tasks for the LATAM Regional Office (e.g., purchase orders, CONCUR reports). 
Support the production and distribution of marketing materials (e.g., posters, banners), including vendor quotes and shipping logistics across LATAM. 
Maintain and update internal databases and spreadsheets (e.g., regional directories, documentation). 
Assist in the preparation of marketing presentations (e.g., highlight decks, big ideas, slate decks). 
Coordinate the ordering and distribution of promotional items. 
Upload and verify vendor information for the marketing team. 


Qualifications



Qualifications



Advanced English proficiency (spoken and written) is essential. 
Strong organizational skills with the ability to prioritize and manage multiple tasks under pressure. 
Excellent judgment and problem-solving abilities. 
Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) and familiar with social media management tools (Mac and PC environments). 
High attention to detail and commitment to quality. 
Ability to meet deadlines while maintaining accuracy and professionalism. 
Self-starter with a willingness to learn and take initiative. 
Comfortable working independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment. 
Open to feedback and continuous improvement. 
Strong interpersonal skills and ability to work with diverse teams and personalities. 

Desired Characteristics



A balance of analytical thinking and creative problem-solving. 
Intermediate proficiency in Excel (e.g., pivot tables, basic formulas). 
Curious, adaptable, and eager to grow within the marketing field. 
Passionate about entertainment, media, and storytelling. 
Enthusiastic team player with a positive attitude and collaborative mindset. 


Additional Information



As part of our selection process, external candidates may be required to attend an in-person interview with an NBCUniversal employee at one of our locations prior to a hiring decision. NBCUniversal's policy is to provide equal employment opportunities to all applicants and employees without regard to race, color, religion, creed, gender, gender identity or expression, age, national origin or ancestry, citizenship, disability, sexual orientation, marital status, pregnancy, veteran status, membership in the uniformed services, genetic information, or any other basis protected by applicable law.



If you are a qualified individual with a disability or a disabled veteran and require support throughout the application and/or recruitment process as a result of your disability, you have the right to request a reasonable accommodation. You can submit your request to AccessibilitySupport@nbcuni.com.

title: Marketing Specialist
skills: Executes and participates in general marketing functions that are more routine in nature, require smaller spend budgets and requires minimal contact with clients. Requires oversight with developing approach for more complex marketing functions which include higher thresholds of spend levels.

Participates in collaboration with business development, customers, product management, sales and other business partners in support of client-customized, content-rich marketing collateral, such as proposals, corporate communication, and other marketing related information for marketing functions more routine in nature. Will make recommendations regarding marketing process. Supports the marketing approach within strategy and budget.
Supports the development of strategic marketing plans for existing lines and participates in the interpretation of plans into “big ideas” to extend the company’s brand vision.
Supports the strategic direction, growth, and vision of assigned strategic growth objectives for the segment and manages the execution of programs. Has minimal client contact.
Supports the development of multiple pieces of promotional and advertising materials, such as press releases, social and digital media published on-line via web sites, twitter, etc.

Based on assigned strategic growth initiatives, builds and maintains existing relationships with internal contacts, external communications consultants and/or agencies. Participates in meetings with internal and/or external clients to understand their ongoing strategies and how relationships can be strengthened within the client’s organization.
Supports the development of product promotion and launch strategies.

Beginning to act as a marketing advocate, communications consultant, and/or liaison for business support units and/or operational units within the organization. Supports communications with leaders in those units on specific communications issues and strategic growth initiatives and coordinates appropriate marketing resources to achieve their functional goals.

Recommends measurements for return on investment (ROI) for marketing projects within the specific goals of building and delivering campaigns, such as internal and external communications, product launches, new business units, acquisitions, and RFP/RFI proposals within planned scope, schedule, cost and quality, and trade shows/events. Tracks costs against measurements.
Bachelor's Degree
Relevant Experience or Degree in: Digital Marketing , Advertising ,
Typically Minimum 3 Years Relevant Exp
Prefer marketing service or marketing agency experience. Prefer sales force and email automation experience. Prefer payments industry experience.

Skills / Knowledge - Having wide-ranging experience, uses professional concepts and company objectives to resolve moderately complex issues in creative and effective ways. Having ownership of a sub-function, account or matrix management responsibilities, applies knowledge to meet goals, maintain relationships, propose opportunities to expand the business, and lead matrix teams. Some barriers to entry exist at this level (e.g., dept./peer review).

Job Complexity - Works on complex issues where analysis of situations or data requires an in-depth evaluation of variable factors. Exercises judgment in selecting methods, techniques and evaluation criteria for obtaining results. Networks with key contacts outside own area of expertise. Builds on/Maintains external relationships of assigned accounts.
Supervision - Determines methods and procedures on new assignments and may coordinate activities of other personnel (Team Lead).
Marketing production execution - Broad marketing services and/or print/production
Communication skills - Including communication with internal or external audiences
description:
About the job

Summary

Description Summary of This Role

Responsible for managing marketing, advertising and promotional activities for various products or channels. Takes steps to measure, enhance, and enrich the position and image of the company through various goals and objectives. Plan and execute day-to-day marketing activities in support of a product, service or channel. Help prepare and adhere to budgets. Oversee creation and delivery of advertising and marketing materials and ensure brand messages are consistent. Collaborate with sales and product to develop strategic partnership activities and implement the execution the identified opportunities.

What Part Will You Play?


Executes and participates in general marketing functions that are more routine in nature, require smaller spend budgets and requires minimal contact with clients. Requires oversight with developing approach for more complex marketing functions which include higher thresholds of spend levels.
Participates in collaboration with business development, customers, product management, sales and other business partners in support of client-customized, content-rich marketing collateral, such as proposals, corporate communication, and other marketing related information for marketing functions more routine in nature. Will make recommendations regarding marketing process. Supports the marketing approach within strategy and budget.
Supports the development of strategic marketing plans for existing lines and participates in the interpretation of plans into “big ideas” to extend the company’s brand vision.
Supports the strategic direction, growth, and vision of assigned strategic growth objectives for the segment and manages the execution of programs. Has minimal client contact.
Supports the development of multiple pieces of promotional and advertising materials, such as press releases, social and digital media published on-line via web sites, twitter, etc.
Based on assigned strategic growth initiatives, builds and maintains existing relationships with internal contacts, external communications consultants and/or agencies. Participates in meetings with internal and/or external clients to understand their ongoing strategies and how relationships can be strengthened within the client’s organization.
Supports the development of product promotion and launch strategies.
Beginning to act as a marketing advocate, communications consultant, and/or liaison for business support units and/or operational units within the organization. Supports communications with leaders in those units on specific communications issues and strategic growth initiatives and coordinates appropriate marketing resources to achieve their functional goals.
Recommends measurements for return on investment (ROI) for marketing projects within the specific goals of building and delivering campaigns, such as internal and external communications, product launches, new business units, acquisitions, and RFP/RFI proposals within planned scope, schedule, cost and quality, and trade shows/events. Tracks costs against measurements.


What Are We Looking For in This Role?

Minimum Qualifications


Bachelor's Degree
Relevant Experience or Degree in: Digital Marketing , Advertising ,
Typically Minimum 3 Years Relevant Exp


Preferred Qualifications


Prefer marketing service or marketing agency experience. Prefer sales force and email automation experience. Prefer payments industry experience.


What Are Our Desired Skills and Capabilities?


Skills / Knowledge - Having wide-ranging experience, uses professional concepts and company objectives to resolve moderately complex issues in creative and effective ways. Having ownership of a sub-function, account or matrix management responsibilities, applies knowledge to meet goals, maintain relationships, propose opportunities to expand the business, and lead matrix teams. Some barriers to entry exist at this level (e.g., dept./peer review).
Job Complexity - Works on complex issues where analysis of situations or data requires an in-depth evaluation of variable factors. Exercises judgment in selecting methods, techniques and evaluation criteria for obtaining results. Networks with key contacts outside own area of expertise. Builds on/Maintains external relationships of assigned accounts.
Supervision - Determines methods and procedures on new assignments and may coordinate activities of other personnel (Team Lead).
Marketing production execution - Broad marketing services and/or print/production
Communication skills - Including communication with internal or external audiences

title: Creator Growth Specialist
skills: Manage a portfolio of content creators as their primary point of contact.
Develop and execute audience growth strategies across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and emerging creator platforms.
Advise creators on content planning, performance optimization, audience engagement, and platform best practices.
Create and manage content calendars to support consistent publishing.
Assist with copywriting, editing, scheduling, publishing, and content organization.
Analyze creator performance and provide data-driven recommendations to improve growth.
Monitor platform updates, creator economy trends, and emerging opportunities.
Identify opportunities to increase audience engagement, reach, follower growth, and content performance.
Support creator monetization through TikTok Shop, affiliate marketing, brand partnerships, LTK, social commerce, YouTube monetization, and other revenue channels.
Help creators identify new monetization opportunities aligned with their audience and content niche.
Track campaigns, partnerships, affiliate programs, and creator performance within internal systems.
Maintain accurate records in CRM platforms, Monday.com, and other operational tools.
Coordinate communication between creators, internal teams, and brand partners.
Support partnership administration, campaign tracking, invoicing, and operational processes.
Resume in English.
Native or near-native English proficiency (spoken and written).
3+ years of experience in creator talent management, creator partnerships, creator success, creator operations, or the creator economy.
Proven experience working directly with content creators, influencers, personal brands, or creator rosters.
Demonstrated success helping creators grow audiences, improve content performance, and increase monetization.
Strong understanding of creator business models and the creator economy.
Deep knowledge of TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and emerging creator platforms.
Experience developing content strategies, growth plans, and audience engagement initiatives.
Strong copywriting, content planning, and content optimization skills.
Experience analyzing creator performance metrics and turning insights into actionable recommendations.
Experience supporting creator monetization through affiliate marketing, TikTok Shop, brand partnerships, social commerce, LTK, YouTube monetization, subscriptions, or similar revenue channels.
Experience using CRM platforms, Monday.com, or similar project management tools.
Strong organizational, communication, and relationship management skills.
Comfortable managing multiple creators and priorities simultaneously in a fast-paced environment.
description:
About the job

Creator Growth Specialist

Salary: $2,000 USD per month

Type: Full-time

Location: 100% Remote

Role Overview

We are hiring a Creator Growth Specialist to support a portfolio of content creators across audience growth, content strategy, creator operations, and monetization initiatives.

This is not a traditional influencer marketing role. We are looking for someone with hands-on experience working directly with creators to help them grow their audiences, strengthen their personal brands, optimize content performance, and expand revenue opportunities across today's creator economy.

The ideal candidate understands how creators build sustainable businesses through content strategy, audience engagement, platform optimization, and multiple monetization channels.

Key Responsibilities

Manage a portfolio of content creators as their primary point of contact.
Develop and execute audience growth strategies across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and emerging creator platforms.
Advise creators on content planning, performance optimization, audience engagement, and platform best practices.
Create and manage content calendars to support consistent publishing.
Assist with copywriting, editing, scheduling, publishing, and content organization.
Analyze creator performance and provide data-driven recommendations to improve growth.
Monitor platform updates, creator economy trends, and emerging opportunities.
Identify opportunities to increase audience engagement, reach, follower growth, and content performance.
Support creator monetization through TikTok Shop, affiliate marketing, brand partnerships, LTK, social commerce, YouTube monetization, and other revenue channels.
Help creators identify new monetization opportunities aligned with their audience and content niche.
Track campaigns, partnerships, affiliate programs, and creator performance within internal systems.
Maintain accurate records in CRM platforms, Monday.com, and other operational tools.
Coordinate communication between creators, internal teams, and brand partners.
Support partnership administration, campaign tracking, invoicing, and operational processes.

Requirements

Resume in English.
Native or near-native English proficiency (spoken and written).
3+ years of experience in creator talent management, creator partnerships, creator success, creator operations, or the creator economy.
Proven experience working directly with content creators, influencers, personal brands, or creator rosters.
Demonstrated success helping creators grow audiences, improve content performance, and increase monetization.
Strong understanding of creator business models and the creator economy.
Deep knowledge of TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and emerging creator platforms.
Experience developing content strategies, growth plans, and audience engagement initiatives.
Strong copywriting, content planning, and content optimization skills.
Experience analyzing creator performance metrics and turning insights into actionable recommendations.
Experience supporting creator monetization through affiliate marketing, TikTok Shop, brand partnerships, social commerce, LTK, YouTube monetization, subscriptions, or similar revenue channels.
Experience using CRM platforms, Monday.com, or similar project management tools.
Strong organizational, communication, and relationship management skills.
Comfortable managing multiple creators and priorities simultaneously in a fast-paced environment.

description:
About the job

About Bedford

We're an email marketing agency for North American eComm brands. Our standard is 10/10 work, and we're scaling fast!




Role Description

You will own everything that brings amazing emails to life: the execution, the timelines, and the quality control. You will be the operational backbone of 10-15 brands at once. 




You will own:

Own the PM pipeline: manage our PM software to deliver emails on time. Chase approvals. Unblock blockers. Keep the weekly rhythm tight. Keep the team accountable.
Run the execution: build and maintain pop ups, flows, and campaigns.
QA everything: you're the last set of eyes before anything goes live. Links, segments, send times, etc. You check it.




You're a fit if:

Are relentlessly organized and fast
Have a sharp eye for mistakes — typos and broken links don't get past you
Follow up before anyone asks
Communicate clearly and directly
Have worked in eCommerce / DTC before
Have worked at an agency or on a fast-moving team
(Bonus) Know Klaviyo or a similar ESP — flows, campaigns, pop-ups, segments, deliverability




More details:

100% remote: but you must overlap with North American business hours
Paid in USD: reliably, every month
Long-term and stable: we want someone to grow with us for years, with real room to take on more as we scale

title: Paid Social Senior Associate
skills: Shape and execute paid social strategies that align with client objectives, overseeing budget allocation, media planning, reporting, and forecasting in partnership with cross-functional teams.
Manage the setup and trafficking of campaigns across platforms like Meta, TikTok, Pinterest, Snap, and LinkedIn, ensuring best practices and precision in execution.
Develop and implement testing frameworks to uncover actionable insights, translating complex data into clear, impactful recommendations for clients and internal stakeholders.
Collaborate with PMG teams and platform partners to optimize campaign performance, offering real-time analysis and subject-matter expertise during client interactions.
Harness PMG’s proprietary technology, Alli, to streamline workflows, analyze performance data, and unlock deeper campaign insights, contributing to its ongoing enhancement.
Take ownership of project timelines and deliverables, ensuring campaigns meet strategic goals and exceed expectations.
Bring a proactive mindset and enthusiasm to each day, inspiring your team and making a meaningful impact on the brands you support.
3+ years of experience in paid social strategy or a related field, with a bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience.
Intermediate expertise in Paid Social and Content Marketing to craft, execute, and optimize impactful campaigns.
Foundational knowledge of Marketing Metrics and Marketing Planning & Analysis to drive data-informed strategies and recommendations.
Proficiency in social media platforms such as Meta, TikTok, Pinterest, Snap, and LinkedIn to set up, traffic, and manage campaigns.
Familiarity with tools like Google Analytics, Microsoft Excel, and SQL to analyze data and deliver clear, actionable performance insights.
Strong organizational and collaboration skills, enabling seamless alignment with internal teams and external stakeholders.
An analytical mindset, paired with a proactive approach to uncovering insights, testing strategies, and driving continuous improvements.

A commitment to curiosity and adaptability as a Continual Learner, staying at the forefront of media innovation while prioritizing client success with a Customer-Focused mindset that seeks opportunities to deliver meaningful value.
A dedication to People-Focused leadership, fostering collaboration, innovation, and professional growth by Leading by Example and nurturing strong relationships that empower others to excel.
Professional Development: Take advantage of our learning and development programs, mentorship opportunities, and career advancement support.
Generous Time Off: Enjoy generous paid time off and holiday allowances to recharge and spend time with loved ones.
Parental Leave: We provide paid parental leave to support your family during important life events.
Retirement & Pension Plans: Plan for your future with competitive retirement or pension programs, including contribution matching.
Fertility and Family Support: Access fertility benefits for all team members and their spouses.
Healthcare: Coverage and support for everyday medical expenses and routine care, tailored by geography.
Pet Insurance: Protect your pet's health and your finances.
Lifestyle Spending Accounts: Enjoy 100% company-funded accounts to promote healthy habits and well-being.
Commuter Benefits: Access support for travel and commuting needs, where available.
Annual Bonus: All employees are eligible for an annual bonus.
Volunteering Opportunities: Receive 8 give-back hours to volunteer in your local communities.
AI Enterprise License: Access AI Enterprise accounts and participate in weekly AI training sessions to empower and ensure AI safety.
description:
About the job

We are PMG

Named Ad Age Best Places to Work for 11 years in a row and Fast Company Best Workplaces for Innovators since 2022, PMG is a global independent marketing services and technology company that seeks to inspire people and brands that anything is possible. Driven by shared success, PMG leverages business strategy and transformation, creative, media, and insights—as well as its proprietary operating system, Alli—to deliver cutting-edge digital solutions and innovative media strategies.

Our team comprises over 900 employees globally, and our work for ambitious brands like Apple, Nike, Sephora, Experian, Therabody, Best Western Hotels & Resorts, Creed Fragrances, BNY, Intuit, CKE Restaurants, Travelex, and Whole Foods spans 85+ countries.

Professional proficiency in written and spoken English is required, including for resume submission and interviews.

Who You Will Be Working With

Join a team of innovative thinkers and collaborative problem-solvers who are passionate about the ever-evolving world of paid social media. Our Social team is dynamic, supportive, and dedicated to helping our clients achieve extraordinary results. You’ll work closely with strategists, creatives, data analysts, and technologists to craft campaigns that make a tangible impact on some of the most exciting brands in the industry.

We believe in fostering a culture where every team member feels valued, empowered, and inspired to bring their unique talents to the table. At PMG, your voice will be heard, your ideas embraced, and your growth supported every step of the way. If you’re looking for a role that blends cutting-edge innovation with meaningful collaboration, we’d love to welcome you to our team.

What You Will Do


Shape and execute paid social strategies that align with client objectives, overseeing budget allocation, media planning, reporting, and forecasting in partnership with cross-functional teams. 
Manage the setup and trafficking of campaigns across platforms like Meta, TikTok, Pinterest, Snap, and LinkedIn, ensuring best practices and precision in execution. 
Develop and implement testing frameworks to uncover actionable insights, translating complex data into clear, impactful recommendations for clients and internal stakeholders. 
Collaborate with PMG teams and platform partners to optimize campaign performance, offering real-time analysis and subject-matter expertise during client interactions. 
Harness PMG’s proprietary technology, Alli, to streamline workflows, analyze performance data, and unlock deeper campaign insights, contributing to its ongoing enhancement. 
Take ownership of project timelines and deliverables, ensuring campaigns meet strategic goals and exceed expectations. 
Bring a proactive mindset and enthusiasm to each day, inspiring your team and making a meaningful impact on the brands you support. 


What You Will Bring


3+ years of experience in paid social strategy or a related field, with a bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience. 
Intermediate expertise in Paid Social and Content Marketing to craft, execute, and optimize impactful campaigns. 
Foundational knowledge of Marketing Metrics and Marketing Planning & Analysis to drive data-informed strategies and recommendations. 
Proficiency in social media platforms such as Meta, TikTok, Pinterest, Snap, and LinkedIn to set up, traffic, and manage campaigns. 
Familiarity with tools like Google Analytics, Microsoft Excel, and SQL to analyze data and deliver clear, actionable performance insights. 
Strong organizational and collaboration skills, enabling seamless alignment with internal teams and external stakeholders. 
An analytical mindset, paired with a proactive approach to uncovering insights, testing strategies, and driving continuous improvements. 
A commitment to curiosity and adaptability as a Continual Learner, staying at the forefront of media innovation while prioritizing client success with a Customer-Focused mindset that seeks opportunities to deliver meaningful value. 
A dedication to People-Focused leadership, fostering collaboration, innovation, and professional growth by Leading by Example and nurturing strong relationships that empower others to excel. 


What We Offer


Professional Development: Take advantage of our learning and development programs, mentorship opportunities, and career advancement support. 
Generous Time Off: Enjoy generous paid time off and holiday allowances to recharge and spend time with loved ones. 
Parental Leave: We provide paid parental leave to support your family during important life events. 
Retirement & Pension Plans: Plan for your future with competitive retirement or pension programs, including contribution matching. 
Fertility and Family Support: Access fertility benefits for all team members and their spouses. 
Healthcare: Coverage and support for everyday medical expenses and routine care, tailored by geography. 
Pet Insurance: Protect your pet's health and your finances. 
Lifestyle Spending Accounts: Enjoy 100% company-funded accounts to promote healthy habits and well-being. 
Commuter Benefits: Access support for travel and commuting needs, where available. 
Annual Bonus: All employees are eligible for an annual bonus. 
Volunteering Opportunities: Receive 8 give-back hours to volunteer in your local communities. 
AI Enterprise License: Access AI Enterprise accounts and participate in weekly AI training sessions to empower and ensure AI safety. 


Benefits vary by country, location, and geography to reflect local laws, norms, and expectations.

What Sets Us Apart

Being part of PMG means joining a company culture that’s unmatched in digital. We're dedicated to working hard to serve our employees and clients, delivering value, results, and innovation—which often requires true grit and agility. We believe in taking care of ourselves and each other to continuously improve in every way.

In alignment with our core values to be inclusive and always change for the better, PMG is committed to creating a more diverse and inclusive culture, and we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We believe that we only change for the better by bringing diverse perspectives to our company. PMG recruits, employs, trains, compensates, and promotes regardless of race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status.

location: Cuajimalpa de Morelos, Mexico City, Mexico (On-site)
skills: Apoyar la ejecución de iniciativas de Brand Marketing en todas las etapas del funnel (upper, middle y lower), dirigidas a clientes mayoristas y tiendas departamentales clave como Liverpool, Palacio de Hierro, Sears y Coppel. El objetivo es asegurar el posicionamiento correcto de la marca y la alineación entre mensajes, audiencias y canales, impactando en revenue, GM, EBIT, leads, conversión, consideración y ROI.

Crear y colaborar en la adaptación local de campañas globales y en el desarrollo de PDP para cuentas clave, ajustando mensajes y SKUs según prioridades comerciales y necesidades de cada cadena. Se da seguimiento a entregables creativos, shootings y campañas de e-commerce para garantizar visibilidad, awareness y posicionamiento de la marca, contribuyendo a revenue, GM, EBIT, leads, conversión, consideración y ROI.

Gestionar presupuestos y coordinar campañas de temporada, lanzamientos y colaboraciones, alineando planes de marketing (GTM) con briefs creativos y de medios. Implica coordinar agencias y entregables, además de implementar estrategias multicanal (POP, emailing, OOH, BTL) para fortalecer la visibilidad de la marca, siempre dentro de los presupuestos asignados, con impacto en revenue, GM, EBIT, leads, conversión, consideración y ROI.

Colaborar con equipos de Brand Marketing, BE, Wholesale, Retail, Digital, VM y PR para asegurar que las campañas se adapten a canales tradicionales y digitales según las necesidades de la marca y clientes. Esta coordinación garantiza un posicionamiento adecuado y el uso eficiente de presupuestos de inversión (COOP del A&P budget), generando resultados en revenue, GM, EBIT, leads, conversión, consideración y ROI.

description:
About the job

Descripción Empresa

El Puerto de Liverpool es la empresa líder en tiendas departamentales en México. CON MÁS DE 170 AÑOS EN EL MERCADO, nos dedicamos a facilitar la selección de productos y brindarles el mejor servicio a las familias mexicanas, esperando superar las expectativas de calidad, moda, valor y atención dentro de un ambiente agradable.

Contamos con cinco unidades de negocio: Tiendas Liverpool, Tiendas Suburbia, Centros Comerciales Galerías, Boutiques y Negocios Financieros, componiendo una empresa sólida, que ofrece a sus colaboradores estabilidad financiera y el orgullo de pertenecer a una EMPRESA 100% MEXICANA.

NUESTRA MISIÓN ES SERVIR AL CLIENTE EN TODO LUGAR, TODOS LOS DÍAS, TODA LA VIDA, nuestra visión es ser la mejor opción en servicio, surtido y valor. Nuestros valores nos guían hacia el trabajo en equipo, productividad, innovación e integridad.

Apoyar y Liderar A la Gerencia de Brand Marketing en planeación, ejecución y seguimiento de estrategia de marca para los socios comerciales.

Se da seguimiento a entregables creativos, shootings y campañas de e-commerce para garantizar visibilidad, awareness y posicionamiento de la marca, contribuyendo a revenue, GM, EBIT, leads, conversión, consideración y ROI.
 Gestionar presupuestos y coordinar campañas de temporada, lanzamientos y colaboraciones, alineando planes de marketing (GTM) con briefs creativos y de medios. Implica coordinar agencias y entregables, además de implementar estrategias multicanal (POP, emailing, OOH, BTL) para fortalecer la visibilidad de la marca, siempre dentro de los presupuestos asignados, con impacto en revenue, GM, EBIT, leads, conversión, consideración y ROI.
 Colaborar con equipos de Brand Marketing, BE, Wholesale, Retail, Digital, VM y PR para asegurar que las campañas se adapten a canales tradicionales y digitales según las necesidades de la marca y clientes. Esta coordinación garantiza un posicionamiento adecuado y el uso eficiente de presupuestos de inversión (COOP del A&P budget), generando resultados en revenue, GM, EBIT, leads, conversión, consideración y ROI.

title: Marketing & Content Creation Specialist
skills: Creative and Long Form Content Higher Effort
Editing long form YouTube videos ranging from ten to twenty minutes using raw family style footage such as outdoor activities, trips, and daily life moments.
Combining multiple video clips, photos, and audio into cohesive and engaging stories.
Making creative decisions related to clip selection, pacing, music using royalty free sources only, transitions, and overall story flow.
Repurposing long form videos into short form content for platforms such as YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram Reels.
Understanding that YouTube's growth strategy differs significantly from TikTok and Instagram, and adjusting editing style and structure accordingly.
Professional and Compliance Focused Content Lower Creativity Higher Precision
Light editing and formatting of healthcare related videos such as product demonstrations and therapy tools.
Managing posting and scheduling across Facebook, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and creator or affiliate platforms.
Publishing clinician spotlights, company updates, educational posts, clinic events, therapy activities, and patient success stories.
Creating or refining simple educational graphics and infographics using provided content.
Ensuring a professional tone, brand consistency, patient privacy, and compliance with healthcare data protection standards.
Video Editing: Execute high-quality edits for both long-form (YouTube/Webinars) and short-form (Reels/TikTok/Shorts) content.
Optimization: Apply platform-specific formatting, captions, and technical SEO to maximize reach.
Social Media Operations: Manage the end-to-end posting process, including scheduling and caption implementation across all platforms.
Digital Asset Management: Maintain a highly organized filing system via Google Drive and shared folders for easy retrieval.
Performance Tracking: Monitor and report on core KPIs, including views, engagement rates, and follower growth.
Confidentiality: Maintaining the "Fort Knox" integrity of sensitive healthcare and family data.
Accuracy: Ensuring provided compliance guidance is followed to the letter during the editing process.
Efficiency: Streamlining the workflow from raw footage to scheduled post.

Video Editing Mastery: Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve. You must be capable of handling complex long-form YouTube edits (storytelling, pacing, audio leveling) in addition to high-energy short-form clips.
Platform IQ: A deep understanding of the technical differences between YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram, specifically regarding audience retention and platform-specific algorithms.
Precision & Context: High-level English comprehension to ensure captions are 100% accurate and medical/professional context is preserved.
Operational Discipline:
Strong self-management skills with the ability to meet deadlines under minimal supervision.
Willingness to utilize Hubstaff for transparent time-tracking and productivity.
U.S. Market Experience: Prior experience working with U.S.-based clients or creators.
Niche Familiarity: Background in Healthcare, Wellness, or Professional Services (understanding the tone and "feel" of high-compliance industries).
description:
About the job

📽️ WATCH THIS QUICK LOOM VIDEO ON HOW TO GET HIRED: https://www.loom.com/share/345f776084e642ba99c24aabe40a67a0

🇬🇧 C1 ENGLISH LEVEL IS REQUIRED. THE SELECTED CANDIDATE WILL BE SPEAKING STRICTLY IN ENGLISH DURING THEIR ENTIRE SHIFT.

🎤 PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND AUDIO RECORDING IN ENGLISH.




🚀 JOB TITLE: Marketing & Content Creation Specialist

🆔 JOB ID: KAYKYL1R

🏭 INDUSTRY: Marketing / Content Creation

📍 LOCATION: LATAM / PH / South Africa / Egypt

💼 JOB STATUS: Full Time

🕒 WORK SCHEDULE: Flexible Schedule with Mandatory Overlap 1–2 Times per Week for Strategy Calls

💵 SALARY: $8 – $10 USD per hour

📅 TARGET START DATE: ASAP

⚠️ PLEASE NOTE: This role requires a highly independent and creative content professional who can transform raw content into polished, publish-ready media with minimal supervision. We are looking for someone who thrives in both creative storytelling and process-driven execution while maintaining exceptional attention to detail and confidentiality.

ROLE OVERVIEW

About the Client:




Our client is a U.S.-based organization that provides physical, occupational, and speech therapy services, primarily serving senior living and retirement communities. Alongside their healthcare business, the founders also operate a personal creator brand focused on family life, outdoor adventures, and long-form storytelling through digital media platforms.

This position supports both sides of the business, each with distinct audiences, objectives, and content requirements. The ideal candidate must be able to adapt communication styles, creative approaches, and execution strategies accordingly.

About the Role:




We are seeking a full-time Marketing & Content Creation Specialist with strong video editing, content management, and social media execution experience.

This role is ideal for someone who can independently manage deliverables, organize content workflows, and transform provided footage, images, and written materials into engaging, high-quality content without constant oversight.

This is not an on-camera role and does not involve clinical or administrative responsibilities. Instead, your primary focus will be content production, platform management, organization, and performance tracking.




Two Distinct Content Streams Critical to This Role

Creative and Long Form Content Higher Effort

This portion of the role is more time consuming and highly creative.

Responsibilities include:

Editing long form YouTube videos ranging from ten to twenty minutes using raw family style footage such as outdoor activities, trips, and daily life moments.
Combining multiple video clips, photos, and audio into cohesive and engaging stories.
Making creative decisions related to clip selection, pacing, music using royalty free sources only, transitions, and overall story flow.
Repurposing long form videos into short form content for platforms such as YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram Reels.
Understanding that YouTube's growth strategy differs significantly from TikTok and Instagram, and adjusting editing style and structure accordingly.
Professional and Compliance Focused Content Lower Creativity Higher Precision

This portion of the role is more structured and process driven.

Responsibilities include:

Light editing and formatting of healthcare related videos such as product demonstrations and therapy tools.
Managing posting and scheduling across Facebook, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and creator or affiliate platforms.
Publishing clinician spotlights, company updates, educational posts, clinic events, therapy activities, and patient success stories.
Creating or refining simple educational graphics and infographics using provided content.
Ensuring a professional tone, brand consistency, patient privacy, and compliance with healthcare data protection standards.

Most of this content will be provided or clearly outlined. The focus of the role is execution, refinement, accuracy, and consistency.

Key Responsibilities

1. Content Production & Editing

Video Editing: Execute high-quality edits for both long-form (YouTube/Webinars) and short-form (Reels/TikTok/Shorts) content.
Optimization: Apply platform-specific formatting, captions, and technical SEO to maximize reach.

2. Distribution & Management

Social Media Operations: Manage the end-to-end posting process, including scheduling and caption implementation across all platforms.
Digital Asset Management: Maintain a highly organized filing system via Google Drive and shared folders for easy retrieval.

3. Analytics & Reporting

Performance Tracking: Monitor and report on core KPIs, including views, engagement rates, and follower growth.

Role Scope & Boundaries (Non-Negotiable)

Operational Status: This is an Execution-Only role. The Editor acts as the technical hands of the brand, not the clinical or strategic voice.

Core Expectations

Confidentiality: Maintaining the "Fort Knox" integrity of sensitive healthcare and family data.
Accuracy: Ensuring provided compliance guidance is followed to the letter during the editing process.
Efficiency: Streamlining the workflow from raw footage to scheduled post.

Qualifications & Skills

Core Competencies (Must-Have)

Video Editing Mastery: Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve. You must be capable of handling complex long-form YouTube edits (storytelling, pacing, audio leveling) in addition to high-energy short-form clips.
Platform IQ: A deep understanding of the technical differences between YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram, specifically regarding audience retention and platform-specific algorithms.
Precision & Context: High-level English comprehension to ensure captions are 100% accurate and medical/professional context is preserved.
Operational Discipline:
Strong self-management skills with the ability to meet deadlines under minimal supervision.
Willingness to utilize Hubstaff for transparent time-tracking and productivity.










Experience & "Bonus" Assets (Preferred)

U.S. Market Experience: Prior experience working with U.S.-based clients or creators.
Niche Familiarity: Background in Healthcare, Wellness, or Professional Services (understanding the tone and "feel" of high-compliance industries).

Affiliate Ecosystems: Familiarity with Amazon Creator or other affiliate marketing platforms is a significant plus.

WHY JOIN?

Creative Variety:

Work across both a professional healthcare organization and an engaging lifestyle creator brand

High Ownership Role:

Take ownership of content production and become a trusted extension of the business

Long-Term Opportunity:

Join a growing organization seeking a reliable long-term team member

Flexible Work Environment:

Enjoy a flexible schedule while collaborating directly with founders and decision-makers

✨ Join a growing network of exceptional remote professionals

📩 Submit your application today and take the next step in your career!

title: Patient Recruiter & Retention Specialist
skills: You are proficient in Scheduling, Retention management, Documentation.
You have the potential to develop in Clinical research, CRM tools.
Spanish - Fully fluent
English - Fully fluent
Grace Ulerio -
description:
About the job

I’m helping Equity Medical find a top candidate to join their team full-time for the role of Patient Recruiter & Retention Specialist.




You'll expand access to clinical trials by engaging diverse communities and advancing medical research.




Compensation:

USD 18K - 22K/year




Location:

Remote: Mexico




Mission of Equity Medical:

"Advance clinical research by providing patient-centered trials and expanding access to innovative treatments across diverse communities."




What makes you a strong candidate:

You are proficient in Scheduling, Retention management, Documentation.
You have the potential to develop in Clinical research, CRM tools.
Spanish - Fully fluent
English - Fully fluent




Responsibilities and more:

About Equity Medical

Equity Medical is a rapidly growing clinical research organization dedicated to expanding access to clinical trials in underserved communities. We are seeking a bilingual Patient Recruiter & Retention Specialist to support participant recruitment and enrollment efforts across multiple clinical research sites.




Position Overview

The Patient Recruiter & Retention Specialist will be responsible for engaging prospective study participants, conducting pre-screening activities, supporting enrollment efforts, and maintaining ongoing communication to improve study participation and retention.

This is a remote independent contractor position supporting U.S.-based clinical research operations.




Key Responsibilities

Contact and pre-screen warm digital leads through the CRM to assess preliminary study eligibility.

Follow up consistently with prospective participants to reduce no-shows and increase enrollment conversion rates.

Schedule and coordinate participant appointments as needed.

Maintain accurate and timely documentation within the CRM and related systems.

Collaborate closely with marketing, recruitment, and clinical operations teams to achieve study enrollment goals.

Attend weekly meetings with on-site clinical teams.

Attend weekly meetings with the marketing and recruitment departments.

Conduct outreach to potential participants within the community in a professional, ethical, and compliant manner.

Communicate effectively with both English-speaking and Spanish-speaking participants.

Assist with retention initiatives to improve participant engagement and study completion.

Perform additional administrative and recruitment-related duties as assigned.




Qualifications

Fluent in both English and Spanish (written and verbal) – required.

Experience in patient recruitment, customer service, sales, call center operations, healthcare, clinical research, or a related field preferred.

Strong phone presence and interpersonal skills.

Comfortable making a high volume of outbound and follow-up calls.

Ability to build rapport and communicate effectively with diverse populations.

Strong organizational and time management skills.

Experience using CRM systems is preferred.

Clinical research experience is a plus but not required.

Schedule Requirements

Required schedule: Saturday through Wednesday.

Working hours: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM Pacific Time (San Diego, California).

Must be available to attend scheduled team meetings and collaborate with U.S.-based teams during business hours.

Must maintain reliable internet connectivity and a professional remote work environment.

Preferred Experience

Clinical research recruitment.

Patient engagement and retention.

Healthcare scheduling or patient coordination.

CRM platforms and lead management.

Experience supporting U.S.-based organizations.




Independent Contractor Status

This position is offered as an independent contractor engagement. Contractors are responsible for their own taxes, insurance, equipment, and compliance with applicable laws in their country of residence.




Your potential leader(s):

Grace Ulerio -



Desired Skills and Experience

Scheduling, Retention management, Documentation, Clinical research, CRM tools

title: Marketing Specialist
skills: Digital Marketing Strategy: Develop and execute comprehensive marketing strategies aimed at first responder agencies and healthcare professionals.
Content Creation: Craft compelling content including blog posts, newsletters, and social media updates that resonate with our target audience.
SEO Management: Optimize website content for search engines to enhance visibility for relevant keywords related to mental health services for first responders.
Social Media Engagement: Manage social media platforms, creating engaging posts that drive awareness and interaction among followers.
Analytics and Reporting: Analyze marketing performance metrics to assess the effectiveness of campaigns and suggest improvements.
Audience Segmentation: Identify and segment target audiences to tailor messaging specifically for different groups, including agencies and individual first responders.
Networking and Outreach: Develop relationships with potential referral sources, including healthcare providers and first responder agencies, to expand our reach.
Collaboration: Work closely with our team to align marketing efforts with overall practice goals and client needs.
Experience: Minimum 2+ years of experience marketing for American-based companies (Healthcare or Service Industry preferred).
Technical Savvy: Current with modern marketing technologies and social media algorithms; ability to use AI tools to optimize workflow (but not rely on them for core creativity).
Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English skills. While primarily a creative role, you must be comfortable making occasional outbound "warm" contacts to build referral relationships.
Mindset: A "shark" mentality—proactive, aggressive in pursuing visibility, and capable of working without constant micromanagement.
Education: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field is highly preferred.
Monitoring Tools: Open to using monitoring tools like Hubstaff.
description:
About the job

✨ IMPORTANT – WATCH THIS QUICK LOOM VIDEO ON HOW TO GET HIRED:

📽️ https://www.loom.com/share/345f776084e642ba99c24aabe40a67a0

🇬🇧 C1 ENGLISH LEVEL IS REQUIRED.

The selected candidate will be speaking strictly in English during their entire shift.

🎤 PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND AUDIO RECORDING IN ENGLISH




Job Details




JOB TITLE

Marketing Specialist

JOB ID

BYRTIA1

INDUSTRY

Medical

LOCATION

LATAM / South Africa / PH if needed

JOB STATUS

Part Time (to full time)

WORK SCHEDULE

Monday to Friday, availability during EST business hours

SALARY

$8 - $11 per hour

TARGET START DATE

ASAP




ROLE OVERVIEW




About the Client:

The Client is a growing psychological therapy and testing practice. We specialize in providing high-quality therapy and diagnostic testing (e.g., for first responders and police candidates). We are currently at a pivotal growth phase and are looking for a proactive, tech-savvy marketing professional to help us overcome our current financial bottleneck and scale our team of clinicians.




About the Role:

Our Client is seeking a high-energy Marketing Specialist (Virtual Assistant). This is not a passive task-taking role; they need a strategic thinker who understands the American healthcare landscape and can proactively drive lead generation. You will be responsible for translating the clinical expertise of the Client into a digital presence that attracts the "right fit" clients—specifically those seeking therapy and testing rather than medication management.




Key Responsibilities

Digital Marketing Strategy: Develop and execute comprehensive marketing strategies aimed at first responder agencies and healthcare professionals.
Content Creation: Craft compelling content including blog posts, newsletters, and social media updates that resonate with our target audience.
SEO Management: Optimize website content for search engines to enhance visibility for relevant keywords related to mental health services for first responders.
Social Media Engagement: Manage social media platforms, creating engaging posts that drive awareness and interaction among followers.
Analytics and Reporting: Analyze marketing performance metrics to assess the effectiveness of campaigns and suggest improvements.
Audience Segmentation: Identify and segment target audiences to tailor messaging specifically for different groups, including agencies and individual first responders.
Networking and Outreach: Develop relationships with potential referral sources, including healthcare providers and first responder agencies, to expand our reach.
Collaboration: Work closely with our team to align marketing efforts with overall practice goals and client needs.




Qualifications & Skills

Experience: Minimum 2+ years of experience marketing for American-based companies (Healthcare or Service Industry preferred).
Technical Savvy: Current with modern marketing technologies and social media algorithms; ability to use AI tools to optimize workflow (but not rely on them for core creativity).
Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English skills. While primarily a creative role, you must be comfortable making occasional outbound "warm" contacts to build referral relationships.
Mindset: A "shark" mentality—proactive, aggressive in pursuing visibility, and capable of working without constant micromanagement.
Education: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field is highly preferred.
Monitoring Tools: Open to using monitoring tools like Hubstaff.

title: Growth Marketing Coach
skills: Design and lead marketing strategies aligned with revenue and growth goals
Identify opportunities to improve positioning, acquisition, and retention
Translate business objectives into clear marketing priorities and initiatives
Ensure all marketing efforts are aligned with the company’s high-ticket model
Coach and mentor the marketing team to improve execution and strategic thinking
Define KPIs, expectations, and accountability frameworks for the team
Conduct regular performance reviews and provide actionable feedback
Build a culture of ownership, proactivity, and continuous improvement
Oversee the planning and execution of digital marketing campaigns
Ensure campaigns are aligned with strategy, timelines, and performance targets
Guide the team in optimizing campaigns based on data and results
Step in when needed to unblock execution or improve outcomes
Monitor key metrics and evaluate campaign performance across channels
Analyze ROI and identify areas for optimization and growth
Provide clear reporting and insights to leadership
Use data to drive strategic decisions and improve marketing effectiveness
Work closely with sales to ensure alignment between marketing and revenue goals
Facilitate communication between marketing and other departments
Ensure consistency in messaging, positioning, and customer experience
Stay up to date with digital marketing trends, tools, and best practices
Introduce new ideas, strategies, and technologies to improve performance
Continuously assess competitors and market opportunities
Proven experience in digital marketing strategy and performance marketing
Experience leading, mentoring, or coaching marketing teams
Strong understanding of content, paid media, funnels, and customer journeys
Ability to analyze data and translate it into strategic decisions
Advanced Spanish (primary business language) and solid English communication
Experience in fast-paced, results-driven environments
Experience in coaching, consulting, or education-based businesses
Background in high-ticket services or personal development industries
Familiarity with AI tools and modern marketing tech stacks
Experience working with remote or distributed teams
Exposure to scaling businesses or growth-stage environments
Passion for personal development and continuous self improvement
Strong leadership mindset with the ability to inspire and positively influence others
Genuine motivation to serve and contribute to a productive, high performing, and happy community
Curiosity and enthusiasm for continuous learning and professional growth
Innovative thinker who enjoys improving processes, generating ideas, and embracing change
Culture driven individual aligned with collaboration, positivity, accountability, and growth
Strategic thinker with strong execution awareness
Naturally proactive and solutions-oriented
Comfortable leading, coaching, and holding others accountable
Direct communicator who is open to feedback
High sense of ownership and urgency
Passion for growth, learning, and performance
Thrives in demanding, fast-moving environment

Growth Marketing Coach

🆔 Job ID: SUZDEE1

🏢 Industry: Professional Training & Coaching

🌎 Location: LATAM

🕒 Job Status: Full Time

⏰ Work Schedule: 9:00am to 6:00pm (On call availability some days)

💰 Salary: $14 - $16/hr

🚀 Target Start Date: ASAP

ROLE OVERVIEW

About the Client:

The client is a well-established business mentoring and coaching company with nearly 20 years of experience helping Hispanic entrepreneurs build scalable, high-performance businesses. With a strong presence across Latin America and operations connected to the United States, the client operates a high-ticket, relationship-driven model focused on leadership, culture, and long-term transformation. Their philosophy blends productivity with well-being, creating a “cool but focused” culture where team members are expected to take ownership, grow continuously, and deliver results at a high level.

About the Role:

The Growth Marketing Coach will act as a strategic leader responsible for guiding, coaching, and elevating the company’s marketing function. This role is not purely executional. Instead, it focuses on developing strategy, driving performance, and coaching the internal marketing team to operate at a higher level. The ideal candidate brings both strong marketing expertise and the ability to mentor others, ensuring that campaigns, messaging, and initiatives directly support revenue growth while maintaining alignment with the company’s culture and standards.

Key Responsibilities

Marketing Strategy & Business Alignment

Design and lead marketing strategies aligned with revenue and growth goals
Identify opportunities to improve positioning, acquisition, and retention
Translate business objectives into clear marketing priorities and initiatives
Ensure all marketing efforts are aligned with the company’s high-ticket model

Team Coaching & Performance Development

Coach and mentor the marketing team to improve execution and strategic thinking
Define KPIs, expectations, and accountability frameworks for the team
Conduct regular performance reviews and provide actionable feedback
Build a culture of ownership, proactivity, and continuous improvement

Campaign Oversight & Optimization

Oversee the planning and execution of digital marketing campaigns
Ensure campaigns are aligned with strategy, timelines, and performance targets
Guide the team in optimizing campaigns based on data and results
Step in when needed to unblock execution or improve outcomes

Analytics & Decision Making

Monitor key metrics and evaluate campaign performance across channels
Analyze ROI and identify areas for optimization and growth
Provide clear reporting and insights to leadership
Use data to drive strategic decisions and improve marketing effectiveness

Cross-Functional Collaboration

Work closely with sales to ensure alignment between marketing and revenue goals
Facilitate communication between marketing and other departments
Ensure consistency in messaging, positioning, and customer experience

Market Awareness & Innovation

Stay up to date with digital marketing trends, tools, and best practices
Introduce new ideas, strategies, and technologies to improve performance
Continuously assess competitors and market opportunities

Qualifications & Skills

Must

Proven experience in digital marketing strategy and performance marketing
Experience leading, mentoring, or coaching marketing teams
Strong understanding of content, paid media, funnels, and customer journeys
Ability to analyze data and translate it into strategic decisions
Advanced Spanish (primary business language) and solid English communication
Experience in fast-paced, results-driven environments

Preferred

Experience in coaching, consulting, or education-based businesses
Background in high-ticket services or personal development industries
Familiarity with AI tools and modern marketing tech stacks
Experience working with remote or distributed teams
Exposure to scaling businesses or growth-stage environments

Personality Traits

Passion for personal development and continuous self improvement
Strong leadership mindset with the ability to inspire and positively influence others
Genuine motivation to serve and contribute to a productive, high performing, and happy community
Curiosity and enthusiasm for continuous learning and professional growth
Innovative thinker who enjoys improving processes, generating ideas, and embracing change
Culture driven individual aligned with collaboration, positivity, accountability, and growth
Strategic thinker with strong execution awareness
Naturally proactive and solutions-oriented
Comfortable leading, coaching, and holding others accountable
Direct communicator who is open to feedback
High sense of ownership and urgency
Passion for growth, learning, and performance
Thrives in demanding, fast-moving environment

title: Ejecutivo de medios offline
skills: Licenciatura en Mercadotecnia, Publicidad, Comunicación, Administración o afines.
Experiencia mínima de 2 años en implementación, ejecución y seguimiento de campañas offline.
Experiencia indispensable en agencias de medios o centrales de medios.
Conocimiento de medios tradicionales como TV, Radio, OOH, Prensa y Revistas.
Inglés intermedio.
Manejo de Excel y herramientas de seguimiento y control de campañas.
Apoyar en la elaboración de planes tácticos mediante análisis de audiencias, competencia y tendencias de mercado.
Ejecutar la compra de medios tradicionales (TV, Radio, OOH, Prensa y Revistas) de acuerdo con los planes aprobados por el cliente.
Gestionar la generación y seguimiento de órdenes de compra en los sistemas internos de la compañía.
Coordinar el envío de materiales creativos y dar seguimiento con medios y proveedores para la correcta implementación de campañas.
Solicitar, recopilar y validar testigos para asegurar la correcta transmisión o publicación de las campañas.
Monitorear campañas activas y dar seguimiento a incidencias durante su ejecución.
Realizar conciliaciones de campañas verificando que la ejecución coincida con lo planeado y contratado.
Gestionar el cierre administrativo de campañas y órdenes de compra para el proceso de facturación.
Elaborar reportes post-buy y análisis de resultados de campaña.
Un entorno laboral positivo y colaborativo, basado en el respeto y el trabajo en equipo.
Excelentes beneficios que promueven tu bienestar personal y tu desarrollo profesional.
Prestaciones superiores a las de la ley.
Un espacio seguro y libre de discriminación, donde cada voz es valorada y cada persona realmente importa.
description:
About the job

Acerca de nosotros




Somos una agencia global, especialista en medios, marketing y tecnología. Líderes en el ramo con presencia en más de 100 países. Creamos soluciones integrales para todos nuestros clientes de forma rápida y eficaz.




Nuestra búsqueda constante de mejorar en lo que hacemos comienza contactando con personas como tú.




OMG te invita a unirte a nuestro equipo como: Ejecutivo de medios offline




¿Qué buscamos?




Buscamos un perfil con experiencia en la ejecución y seguimiento de campañas de medios tradicionales dentro de agencias de medios o centrales de medios, con interés en desarrollarse en un entorno dinámico y colaborativo.




Licenciatura en Mercadotecnia, Publicidad, Comunicación, Administración o afines.
Experiencia mínima de 2 años en implementación, ejecución y seguimiento de campañas offline.
Experiencia indispensable en agencias de medios o centrales de medios.
Conocimiento de medios tradicionales como TV, Radio, OOH, Prensa y Revistas.
Inglés intermedio.
Manejo de Excel y herramientas de seguimiento y control de campañas.




¿Cuáles son las principales actividades?




Apoyar en la elaboración de planes tácticos mediante análisis de audiencias, competencia y tendencias de mercado.
Ejecutar la compra de medios tradicionales (TV, Radio, OOH, Prensa y Revistas) de acuerdo con los planes aprobados por el cliente.
Gestionar la generación y seguimiento de órdenes de compra en los sistemas internos de la compañía.
Coordinar el envío de materiales creativos y dar seguimiento con medios y proveedores para la correcta implementación de campañas.
Solicitar, recopilar y validar testigos para asegurar la correcta transmisión o publicación de las campañas.
Monitorear campañas activas y dar seguimiento a incidencias durante su ejecución.
Realizar conciliaciones de campañas verificando que la ejecución coincida con lo planeado y contratado.
Gestionar el cierre administrativo de campañas y órdenes de compra para el proceso de facturación.
Elaborar reportes post-buy y análisis de resultados de campaña.




¿Qué ofrecemos?




Un entorno laboral positivo y colaborativo, basado en el respeto y el trabajo en equipo.
Excelentes beneficios que promueven tu bienestar personal y tu desarrollo profesional.
Prestaciones superiores a las de la ley.
Un espacio seguro y libre de discriminación, donde cada voz es valorada y cada persona realmente importa.




Si estás buscando más que solo un empleo y quieres formar parte de una comunidad que te inspira y te impulsa a alcanzar tu máximo potencial, ¡nos encantaría conocerte!




En OMG NO discriminamos por razón de raza, origen étnico, edad, sexo, género, estado civil, ideología, opiniones políticas, nacionalidad, religión, orientación sexual, identidad o expresión de género o cualquier otra condición personal, física o social. A través de ello, construimos una cultura incluyente, de respeto y diversa.

title: Marketing Operations Administrator
skills: Act as a direct operational support to senior marketing leadership, managing action items, preparing briefing materials, tracking deliverables, and ensuring follow-through on priorities.
Oversee marketing financial operations including budget tracking, invoice processing, vendor payments, expense reconciliation, and maintenance of spend and SaaS cost controls.
Manage end-to-end inventory, print, and fulfillment processes, including sourcing branded materials, coordinating shipments, tracking delivery timelines, and overseeing stock management.
Coordinate procurement and vendor management activities, ensuring contracts, invoices, and service agreements are properly tracked and maintained.
Support back-office operations including document management, scheduling coordination, access provisioning, and administrative system upkeep.
