description:
About the job

At Teradyne Robotics , part of Teradyne Inc., Our vision is to create a world where people work with robots, not like robots. And as the market leader with 75,000+ collaborative robots (cobots) already installed worldwide, we’re well on the way to achieving it. We employ 1000+ people in offices across North America, South America, Europe and Asia and we’re growing all the time. Our team is made up smart, creative people working at the forefront of automation. Together we find innovative solutions to some of the most important manufacturing issues facing businesses today. We dare to do what others find impossible- working with advanced technologies to change in the way businesses operate, So if you’re looking to build your career with a ground-breaking technology company in dynamic environment with career advancement UR is the place for you.

Our Purpose 

TERADYNE, where experience meets innovation and driving excellence in every connection. We are fueled by creativity and diversity of thought and in our workforce. Our employees are supported to innovate and learn something new every day.

Opportunity Overview

The Marketing Specialist is responsible for supporting the planning, execution, and optimization of marketing activities across Latin America. This role plays a critical part in generating demand, strengthening partner engagement, increasing brand visibility, and supporting sales objectives through digital marketing, content creation, event execution, and marketing operations.

The position works closely with regional sales teams, distributors, system integrators, and global marketing teams to ensure successful implementation of regional marketing strategies.

Key Responsibilities


Support regional marketing initiatives across LATAM
Execute and localize digital marketing campaigns
Create and adapt marketing content and communications
Coordinate events, webinars, and partner activities
Support lead generation and marketing operations
Collaborate with sales teams, distributors, and global marketing stakeholders


All About You

We seek individuals who share our passion and determination. Our commitment to customer success drives us to go the extra mile. If you’re ready to join us in this mission, take a closer look at the minimum criteria for the position.

Minimum Job Requirements 


Bachelor’s degree in marketing, Communications, Business Administration, Digital Marketing, or related field.
Fluent English and Spanish required.
2 years of experience in:
B2B marketing
Digital marketing
Communications OR event management.

Preferred Job Requirements


CRM and marketing automation tools.


The Ideal Candidate Will Demonstrate The Following Behavioral Traits


Strong organizational and project management skills.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
Proactive and collaborative approach.
This position is not eligible for visa sponsorship OR Relocation assistance


Benefits

Teradyne offers a variety of robust health and well-being benefit programs, including medical, dental, vision, life insurance, paid vacation & holidays, tuition assistance programs, and more.

title: Customer Success
skills: Act as the primary contact for client accounts via Slack, Email, and Google Meet.
Lead onboarding sessions, pre-launch meetings, and periodic client check-ins (15-day, 30-day, etc.).
Communicate campaign performance updates, findings, and next steps clearly and proactively.
Ensure clients feel supported and informed at every stage of engagement.
Proactively manage client relationships by identifying potential concerns, opportunities, and action items before they become issues.
Investigate client concerns and performance challenges to identify root causes and collaborate on effective solutions.
Continuously learn about clients' businesses, industries, and goals to provide more strategic support and recommendations.
Maintain a professional, work-related social media presence and engage appropriately as part of the company's relationship-building and networking efforts.
Review dashboards and reports prepared by the analytics team to extract key trends and insights.
Deliver findings in a clear, client-friendly way — turning performance data into actionable recommendations.
Identify patterns in campaign performance, lead quality, and conversion rates.
Suggest optimizations based on client goals and data trends.
Track and manage client action items and deliverables across a portfolio of approximately 50 clients.
Ensure all follow-ups — including report delivery, campaign adjustments, and disposition data — are handled promptly.
Maintain up-to-date communication records in internal systems and CRM platforms, with preference for candidates experienced in HubSpot Service Hub.
1+ year of experience in Client Success, Account Management, or Marketing Operations.
Experience in sales, marketing, or performance marketing is a strong plus.
Familiarity with marketing KPIs such as Cost Per Sale, Contact Rate, and Conversion Rate (training provided).
Familiarity with CRM systems, particularly HubSpot Service Hub, is strongly preferred.
Comfortable working with Excel or Google Sheets for light analysis and data verification.
Reliable high-speed internet connection and a professional remote work setup.
Consultative mindset — you don't just report data, you help clients make sense of it.
Proactive communicator who anticipates client needs and follows up consistently.
Analytical and detail-oriented with strong root-cause problem-solving skills; able to dig beneath surface-level issues and identify underlying drivers of client challenges.
Personable and client-focused — able to build trust quickly and maintain strong professional relationships.
Highly organized multitasker capable of managing a large client portfolio in a fast-paced environment.
Naturally curious and growth-minded, with a genuine interest in continuous learning and understanding client businesses.
Comfortable maintaining a professional presence on LinkedIn and leveraging social media as a relationship-building tool.
Clients receive timely, accurate communication and performance updates on a consistent basis.
Account health improves through proactive insights and data-backed recommendations.
Reports are delivered with clarity and context, helping clients make informed decisions.
Retention and satisfaction metrics improve due to consistent, value-driven communication.
Client challenges are addressed proactively through thoughtful analysis and root-cause problem solving rather than reactive issue management.
Strong client relationships are built both through direct communication and professional industry engagement.
description:
About the job

Our client is a performance marketing company that helps brands scale customer acquisition through data-driven lead generation and smart campaign optimization. Their mission is to connect brands with qualified leads efficiently and transparently, building long-term client relationships rooted in performance, clear communication, and measurable growth. They operate in a fast-paced, results-driven environment where every insight, recommendation, and client interaction is tied to real, trackable impact.




Role Overview

The Client Success Manager will serve as the primary point of contact for a portfolio of client accounts, ensuring seamless communication, performance visibility, and data-driven recommendations that help optimize campaigns. This is a consultative, highly client-facing role that blends account management, analytical thinking, and proactive relationship building. The Client Success Associate will lead onboarding calls, conduct regular check-ins, and translate complex performance data into clear, actionable insights that drive stronger client results.




Location

Fully Remote (Work from Home) | 9 AM – 5 PM EST




Key Responsibilities

Client Communication & Relationship Management

Act as the primary contact for client accounts via Slack, Email, and Google Meet.
Lead onboarding sessions, pre-launch meetings, and periodic client check-ins (15-day, 30-day, etc.).
Communicate campaign performance updates, findings, and next steps clearly and proactively.
Ensure clients feel supported and informed at every stage of engagement.
Proactively manage client relationships by identifying potential concerns, opportunities, and action items before they become issues.
Investigate client concerns and performance challenges to identify root causes and collaborate on effective solutions.
Continuously learn about clients' businesses, industries, and goals to provide more strategic support and recommendations.
Maintain a professional, work-related social media presence and engage appropriately as part of the company's relationship-building and networking efforts.




Performance Insights & Reporting

Review dashboards and reports prepared by the analytics team to extract key trends and insights.
Deliver findings in a clear, client-friendly way — turning performance data into actionable recommendations.
Identify patterns in campaign performance, lead quality, and conversion rates.
Suggest optimizations based on client goals and data trends.




Organization & Follow-Ups

Track and manage client action items and deliverables across a portfolio of approximately 50 clients.
Ensure all follow-ups — including report delivery, campaign adjustments, and disposition data — are handled promptly.
Maintain up-to-date communication records in internal systems and CRM platforms, with preference for candidates experienced in HubSpot Service Hub.




Qualifications — Experience

1+ year of experience in Client Success, Account Management, or Marketing Operations.
Experience in sales, marketing, or performance marketing is a strong plus.
Familiarity with marketing KPIs such as Cost Per Sale, Contact Rate, and Conversion Rate (training provided).
Familiarity with CRM systems, particularly HubSpot Service Hub, is strongly preferred.
Comfortable working with Excel or Google Sheets for light analysis and data verification.
Reliable high-speed internet connection and a professional remote work setup.




Qualifications — Skills

Consultative mindset — you don't just report data, you help clients make sense of it.
Proactive communicator who anticipates client needs and follows up consistently.
Analytical and detail-oriented with strong root-cause problem-solving skills; able to dig beneath surface-level issues and identify underlying drivers of client challenges.
Personable and client-focused — able to build trust quickly and maintain strong professional relationships.
Highly organized multitasker capable of managing a large client portfolio in a fast-paced environment.
Naturally curious and growth-minded, with a genuine interest in continuous learning and understanding client businesses.
Comfortable maintaining a professional presence on LinkedIn and leveraging social media as a relationship-building tool.




What Success Looks Like

Clients receive timely, accurate communication and performance updates on a consistent basis.
Account health improves through proactive insights and data-backed recommendations.
Reports are delivered with clarity and context, helping clients make informed decisions.
Retention and satisfaction metrics improve due to consistent, value-driven communication.
Client challenges are addressed proactively through thoughtful analysis and root-cause problem solving rather than reactive issue management.
Strong client relationships are built both through direct communication and professional industry engagement.




Opportunity

This is an exciting opportunity to join a growing, performance-driven team where your communication skills, analytical mindset, and client focus will directly shape the success of a diverse portfolio of brand clients. As a Client Success Associate, you'll play a central role in client retention, performance insight, and communication excellence — with real room to grow your expertise in marketing operations and account strategy. If you love turning data into clarity, thrive in collaborative environments, and genuinely enjoy helping clients win, this role was built for you.

description:
About the job

Descripción de la empresa

En Doctoralia, nuestra misión es humanizar la experiencia de la salud a través de la tecnología. Como la plataforma líder en el mercado mexicano y referente global en soluciones SaaS para el sector médico, conectamos a millones de pacientes con especialistas, transformando la práctica clínica en una experiencia digital eficiente y centrada en el paciente.

Estamos buscando un Onboarding Customer Success Specialist apasionado, estratégico y con mentalidad de crecimiento para ser el aliado clave de nuestros especialistas.

Descripción del rol

Como Onboarding Customer Success Specialist, serás el aliado estratégico para los nuevos profesionales de la salud que se suman a nuestra plataforma. Tu misión será garantizar una experiencia de incorporación excepcional, promoviendo la confianza, el dominio de nuestras soluciones digitales y el éxito a largo plazo del especialista. Asegurarás que cada usuario inicie su relación con Doctoralia con bases sólidas y un acompañamiento cercano, contribuyendo a la transformación digital de su práctica profesional.

Responsabilidades clave


Liderar el proceso completo de onboarding para nuevos clientes, asegurando su integración satisfactoria y el dominio inicial de la plataforma.
Capacitar y guiar a los profesionales de la salud en el uso eficiente de nuestras herramientas digitales, adaptando la formación a sus necesidades específicas.
Identificar áreas de mejora a lo largo del proceso de incorporación y proponer soluciones innovadoras para optimizar la experiencia del usuario.
Monitorear el progreso de cada cliente durante la etapa inicial, anticipando posibles barreras y resolviéndolas de manera proactiva.
Colaborar estrechamente con los equipos de Producto y Soporte para canalizar feedback de los usuarios y contribuir a la mejora continua de nuestras soluciones.


🎯Perfil Profesional


Experiencia: De 1 a 2 años en Customer Success o Account Management (KAM), manejando carteras de alto volumen (100-150 clientes).
ADN Tech: Te mueves como pez en el agua en entornos Startup, Marketing o Publicidad.
Data-Driven: Sabes leer datos, analizar campañas de Google Ads y usarlos para contar una historia de éxito.
Tech Stack: Dominas CRM, Zoom, Slack y el ecosistema de Google Workspace.
Soft Skills: Tienes una mentalidad orientada a la resolución de problemas, la empatía y la resiliencia en la retención de clientes.
Inglés intermedio.


Propuesta de Valor (Compensación y Beneficios)

Ofrecemos un entorno de alto rendimiento con una estructura de beneficios competitiva:


🏠 Esquema Híbrido: El equilibrio perfecto entre la energía de la oficina y la comodidad del home office.
🚀 Esquema de Comisiones: Plan de incentivos para recompensar tu capacidad de manejar cuentas.
🌴 Descanso Real: 22 días de vacaciones desde el año 1 + tu cumpleaños libre para celebrar.
🏥 Salud Primero: Seguro de Gastos Médicos Mayores para tu tranquilidad.
💰 Futuro y Beneficios: Fondo de ahorro y vales de despensa.
💪 Bienestar: Membresía en TotalPass & iFeel para tu bienestar físico y emocional.
🌍 Cultura Global: Proyección profesional en una empresa internacional con presencia en más de 13 países.


¿Estás listo para transformar el sector salud en México? ¡Queremos conocerte!

description:
About the job

Una de las decisiones más emocionantes y significativas en la vida es elegir dónde vas a vivir. Por eso creamos EasyBroker: para darle a los asesores inmobiliarios las herramientas que necesitan para prosperar y ofrecer un servicio excepcional, haciendo que comprar o rentar sea simple y sin estrés. Hoy apoyamos a más de 15,000 profesionales, con más de 500,000 propiedades y más de 3,000 sitios web creados con nuestra plataforma.

Aunque empezamos en 2007, trabajamos como una startup: equipo pequeño, remoto, muy talentoso y con un enfoque radical en crear productos que importan. Valoramos el criterio, el buen gusto, la autonomía y la capacidad de llevar proyectos de principio a fin. Aquí no eres una pieza más: das forma a las ideas, hablas con usuarios cuando hace falta, propones soluciones y tienes un impacto real en el producto y en el negocio.

Ahora estamos apostando fuerte por Pincali, nuestro nuevo marketplace con el que queremos convertirnos en el mejor lugar para comprar o rentar tu hogar en México. Es un proyecto ambicioso diseñado para crecer rápido: nuestra meta es multiplicar por diez los ingresos en tres años. Y, a diferencia de muchas startups, tenemos algo que prácticamente nadie más tiene:


17 años de experiencia profunda en el sector.
Una red enorme de asesores inmobiliarios gracias a EasyBroker.
Un equipo de producto y tecnología muy bueno.
Los recursos para financiar y construir Pincali nosotros mismos, sin inversión externa.


Eso nos coloca en una posición extraordinaria: tenemos una probabilidad muy alta de que Pincali sea un éxito masivo. Y quienes se unan ahora tendrán la oportunidad de crecer junto con el proyecto y beneficiarse directamente del impacto que generen. Es una de esas ventanas únicas donde el riesgo es bajo y el potencial es extremadamente alto.

Si te inspira la idea de construir algo grande, asumir verdadera responsabilidad y trabajar con gente talentosa en un producto con enorme potencial, aquí puedes hacer el mejor trabajo de tu carrera. Queremos que quienes se unan ahora crezcan tanto como la empresa y que se beneficien de manera importante del éxito que estamos construyendo juntos.

¿Cómo nos ayudarás a cumplir nuestra misión?

EasyBroker llegó hasta donde está en gran medida porque los agentes inmobiliarios se lo recomiendan entre sí. Detrás de eso hay un equipo que conoce de cerca el reto de ser agente inmobiliario en México: sus presiones, su forma de trabajar y lo que necesitan para hacer crecer su negocio. Nuestro equipo de Customer Success convierte ese conocimiento en confianza, y esa confianza en lealtad.

Resolverás dudas técnicas, investigarás problemas complejos y ayudarás a identificar oportunidades de mejora para el producto. A veces eso implicará revisar configuraciones avanzadas o entender qué está ocurriendo dentro de un sitio web; otras, detectar que un problema reportado por un usuario en realidad refleja una necesidad más amplia que vale la pena escalar al resto del equipo.

Trabajarás en un equipo de Customer Success de cuatro personas con seniority, incluyendo a tu manager, la Head de Customer Success. También trabajarás muy cerca del equipo de Engineering, Product y Marketing, representando la voz del usuario dentro de EasyBroker de forma clara y fundamentada, transformando conversaciones cotidianas en mejoras reales para el producto y la experiencia de nuestros clientes.

En este rol, hacer las preguntas correctas es tan importante como dar las respuestas. Esperamos que investigues cuando algo no esté claro, que conectes información de distintas fuentes y que llegues con propuestas concretas para resolver problemas antes de que crezcan.

Buscamos personas curiosas, con criterio, capacidad técnica y mucha iniciativa. Personas capaces de desenvolverse en conversaciones complejas, identificar la necesidad detrás de una consulta y construir soluciones prácticas incluso cuando el problema no está completamente definido.

Respondabilidades


Resolver consultas y problemas de usuarios por chat, correo y videollamada, generando confianza a través de un servicio atento, claro y resolutivo.
Investigar incidencias técnicas y diagnosticar su causa raíz, involucrando a otros equipos cuando sea necesario.
Identificar patrones recurrentes en las consultas de los usuarios y proponer mejoras al producto, procesos o documentación.
Documentar hallazgos, procesos y mejores prácticas para fortalecer el conocimiento interno del equipo.
Comunicar a Engineering, Product y Marketing de forma clara y estructurada problemas, necesidades y oportunidades detectadas en usuarios o en la compañía.
Dar seguimiento proactivo a casos complejos hasta su resolución.
Pitchear correctamente las herramientas de EasyBroker, integrando el producto a la realidad de la persona a la que le estás comunicando.
Capacitar a usuarios online y en persona para obtener el máximo valor de EasyBroker, entendiendo sus objetivos de negocio y contexto operativo.
Asistir y presentar EasyBroker en eventos del sector (ocasionalmente).
Participar en iniciativas de mejora continua del área de Customer Success.


Requisitos


Mínimo 3 años de experiencia trabajando directamente con usuarios en empresas SaaS o productos digitales. Mínimo 7 años de experiencia laboral en total.
Excelente capacidad de comunicación: habilidad para entender lo que el usuario realmente necesita, explicar conceptos complejos con claridad y adaptar el mensaje a distintos contextos y niveles de experiencia.
Capacidad de gestión personal ante eventos inesperados, cambios o crisis.
Capacidad para gestionar múltiples conversaciones y prioridades simultáneamente.

¿Qué te ofrecemos?


Sueldo entre $46,000 y $50,000 MXN mensuales pagado desde la empresa en EUA.
Trabajo 100% remoto y flexibilidad de horario.
Apoyo económico para tu educación y capacitación.

Una nueva laptop o desktop de Apple.
Un meetup anual y actividades con el equipo.


¿Cómo aplicar?

Da click en aplicar, envíanos tu CV actualizado y contesta un par de preguntas que nos ayudarán a conocerte mejor. Si quieres saber más de nosotros, entra en ebwantsyou.com donde encontrarás información sobre cómo trabajamos, nuestra misión y el proceso de selección.

description:
About the job

Descripción del puesto En el puesto de Especialista en CRM y automatización en Centro SanaMente te encargarás de diseñar, configurar y optimizar flujos de trabajo automatizados para la gestión de personas usuarias y pacientes potenciales. En tu día a día segmentarás bases de datos, crearás campañas automatizadas (emails, recordatorios, seguimientos) y monitorizarás su rendimiento para proponer mejoras continuas. Colaborarás con los equipos de marketing y atención al paciente para definir procesos, mejorar la experiencia de la persona usuaria y aumentar la conversión y fidelización. También documentarás los procesos, elaborarás informes periódicos y ayudarás a implementar nuevas herramientas o integraciones relacionadas con el CRM. Este es un puesto de media jornada (part time) y se desarrolla en modalidad remota.




Lo que necesitamos:

Configuración y optimización de flujos en WATI (WhatsApp Business API)
Diseño e implementación de secuencias de email marketing (Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign o similar)
Criterio para adaptar los mensajes a una audiencia que viene a buscar apoyo psicológico — no cualquier tono sirve aquí
Aptitudes analíticas: capacidad para interpretar datos, extraer conclusiones accionables y proponer optimizaciones basadas en métricas y KPIs.
Gestión de relaciones con personas usuarias y ventas: experiencia en Customer Relationship Management (CRM) y en procesos de ventas orientados a la fidelización y al acompañamiento personalizado.
Comunicación y trabajo colaborativo: excelentes habilidades de comunicación escrita y verbal, así como capacidad para coordinarte con equipos multidisciplinares de forma remota.
Gestión de proyectos: aptitudes en Project Management para planificar, priorizar y hacer seguimiento de iniciativas de automatización y mejora de procesos.




Requisitos no negociables:

Basado/a en México
Facturación activa (RFC con actividad económica vigente) — indispensable para formalizar la colaboración

Lo que ofrecemos:

Colaboración recurrente part-time con pago por honorarios
Autonomía real en las decisiones técnicas dentro de tu área




Si cumples los requisitos y te interesa, escríbeme por mensaje directo incluyendo: tu tarifa para la configuración inicial de WATI y tu esquema de cobro para secuencias de email (por proyecto, por hora o como lo manejes). Eso nos permite avanzar rápido.

About the job

🚨 IMPORTANT WATCH THIS QUICK LOOM VIDEO ON HOW TO GET HIRED

https://www.loom.com/share/345f776084e642ba99c24aabe40a67a0

C1 ENGLISH LEVEL IS REQUIRED. THE SELECTED CANDIDATE WILL BE SPEAKING STRICTLY IN ENGLISH DURING THEIR ENTIRE SHIFT.

PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND AUDIO RECORDING IN ENGLISH







🌟 Operations & Customer Support Specialist

🆔 Job ID: ALERIC1

🏢 Industry: Product Development, Manufacturing & Supply Chain Management

🌎 Location: LATAM (Spanish Required)

🕒 Job Status: Full Time

💰 Salary: $8 - $9 per hour

🚀 Target Start Date: ASAP







Role Overview 📌

About the Client

The client is a premier global product development, manufacturing, and supply chain management firm with over 25 years of experience delivering high-quality product solutions worldwide. While we specialize heavily as a top-tier manufacturer and distributor of air purification systems, our broader expertise lies in empowering businesses by streamlining the entire product lifecyle—from identifying the right global manufacturers and overseeing production to managing complex international shipping, importing, and final delivery.

About the Role

This isn’t a rigid, repetitive call-center gig. As our Operations and Customer Support Specialist, you will serve as the operational backbone of a lean, entrepreneurial team. You’ll be the warm, professional voice that US distributors trust over the phone and the detail-oriented partner managing daily financial transactions and orders in QuickBooks.

We are specifically looking for an active contributor, not a bystander. Because we operate as a tight team, you won’t just be following a script. We believe every team member should bring their brain to the table to help solve problems, build efficient processes, and directly impact our day-to-day operations. If you thrive in a collaborative, close-knit environment where your voice actually matters, you will love it here.

Key Responsibilities ✅

B2B Customer Service

Answer incoming phone calls from US-based distributors.
Assist distributors with order placement, product inquiries, and general support.
Build and maintain strong, professional relationships across our business network.

Operations & QuickBooks Management

Process and manage incoming orders accurately through QuickBooks.
Handle daily financial maintenance tasks, including processing payments.
Collaborate directly with ownership on a daily task list to keep business workflows moving smoothly.
Proactively look for ways to streamline workflows and suggest process improvements.

Reactive Digital Support

Perform basic, occasional website updates or maintenance if needed (no coding or development required).
Monitor inbound messages on social media channels (like Facebook) to ensure client inquiries are answered promptly. (Note: You will not be responsible for content creation, marketing, or running social media campaigns).

Qualifications & Skills 🎯

Experience

3–5+ years of experience in customer service, operations, or administrative support.

Bilingual Mastery

Flawless written and spoken English and Spanish (essential for communicating with our US customer base).

Tech Savvy

Proficient with QuickBooks (or similar accounting/ERP software) and comfortable picking up basic digital tools.

B2B Dynamics

Comfortable navigating business-to-business customer service and distributor environments.

description:
About the job

Job Title: Sales Operations Specialist (CRM & Pipeline Operations)

Location: Remote (LATAM, Philippines, or South Africa Preferred)

Salary: Up to $1,500/month (Depending on experience)

Schedule: US Business Hours (EST/CST)




Independent Contractor Position




About the Role

We are hiring a Sales Operations Specialist to own CRM management, pipeline coordination, lead follow-up, and sales process execution for a U.S.-based sales team.




This is not a basic admin role. This position is built for someone who understands how sales pipelines move, knows how to keep deals from stalling, and can maintain operational visibility across the entire sales process.




You will manage CRM hygiene, coordinate follow-ups, support estimate-to-close workflows, and improve sales operations through organization, process discipline, and automation.

The ideal candidate is highly organized, proactive, comfortable communicating with U.S. clients, and experienced supporting fast-moving sales teams remotely.




What You’ll Own

Manage and maintain CRM pipelines across inbound, outbound, and quoted opportunities
Follow up on open estimates and inactive opportunities to improve conversion rates
Keep pipeline data accurate, updated, and fully visible for leadership
Coordinate directly with U.S.-based clients via email and phone regarding estimates and next steps
Prioritize daily sales activities based on urgency, deal stage, and lead quality
Build structure and consistency around sales follow-up workflows
Identify stale opportunities, missing information, and pipeline gaps proactively
Generate daily and weekly pipeline activity reports for leadership
Support workflow improvements and CRM process optimization




What We’re Looking For

2+ years of experience in Sales Operations, Sales Support, or CRM Coordination
Experience working with U.S.-based companies in client-facing or sales support roles
Strong CRM management experience and pipeline organization skills
Excellent written and verbal English communication
Strong follow-through and ability to manage multiple active opportunities simultaneously
Comfortable communicating directly with U.S. clients by phone and email
Highly organized, detail-oriented, and self-directed
Comfortable working independently in a remote environment
Reliable computer setup capable of supporting daily remote operations




Nice-to-Haves

Experience with CoreBridge CRM
Experience building CRM automations or workflow improvements
Background in signage, printing, or visual communications industries
Familiarity with Google Workspace, Slack, and project management tools

description:
About the job

About Workato

Workato delivers enterprise infrastructure for the agentic era, redefining iPaaS and helping enterprises unify data, applications, processes, and AI into a single, governed platform. A leader in Enterprise MCP and trusted by 50% of the Fortune 500, Workato’s cloud-native architecture connects every application, data source, and process to power real-time orchestration at scale. With enterprise-grade security and continuous innovation at its core, Workato provides the trusted foundation for organizations to automate with confidence and operationalize AI across the business. To learn more, visit www.workato.com

Why join us?

Ultimately, Workato believes in fostering a flexible, trust-oriented culture that empowers everyone to take full ownership of their roles. We are driven by innovation and looking for team players who want to actively build our company.

But, we also believe in balancing productivity with self-care. That’s why we offer all of our employees a vibrant and dynamic work environment along with a multitude of benefits they can enjoy inside and outside of their work lives.

If this sounds right up your alley, please submit an application. We look forward to getting to know you!

Also, Feel Free To Check Out Why


Business Insider named us an “enterprise startup to bet your career on” 
Forbes’ Cloud 100 recognized us as one of the top 100 private cloud companies in the world 
Deloitte Tech Fast 500 ranked us as the 17th fastest growing tech company in the Bay Area, and 96th in North America 
Quartz ranked us the #1 best company for remote workers 


Responsibilities

We are looking for an exceptional AI Communications & Operations Intern to join our growing team. In this role, you will be involved in working at the intersection of AI tools, internal communications, and program operations inside a fast-moving enterprise software company. You will support a portfolio of content strategy across all programs and initiatives. Your core job is to take raw inputs and turn them into clean, clear, audience-ready outputs, faster and better than could be done without you. As well as support the design of how AI supports content maintenance and management.

In This Role, You Will Also Be Responsible To


Support the design of our internal content strategy 
Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, and others) to transform and polish our communications and documentation strategy 
Build and maintain enablement documents, checklists, and operational trackers 
Support Asana project management across an active portfolio 
Synthesize research and cross-functional inputs into structured briefs and slide narratives 


Requirements

Qualifications / Experience / Technical Skills


Currently pursuing a degree in communications, business, marketing, or a related field 
Hands-on experience using AI tools like ChatGPT or similar in a practical context 
Strong written communication skills with a clear, direct style 
Organized, proactive, and comfortable working with multiple workstreams at once 
Familiarity with Google Workspace, Slack, and project management tools is a plus 


Soft Skills / Personal Characteristics


Proactive mentality, with the ability to see the big picture and make recommendations on how to improve the details and gaps in between 
Strong advocacy skills 
Confidence to hold stakeholders accountable to deliverables

description:
About the job

This role has been designed as ‘Hybrid’ with an expectation that you will work on average 2 days per week from an HPE office.

Who We Are

Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge-to-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.

Job Description

Job Family Definition:

Provide professional solutions to the company end-users, dealers and service providers originating from unresolved escalated case issues received via telephone and written correspondence. Provide an escalation link for the company field employees, executives and channel regarding customer satisfaction issues including availability, price dissatisfaction, product safety issues, complaints with the company and/or its representatives, and complaints regarding an authorized dealer or channel.

Management Level Definition

Applies basic foundation of a function's principles, theories and concepts to assignments of limited scope. Uses professional concepts and theoretical knowledge acquired through specialized training, education or previous experience. Develops expertise and practical knowledge of applications within business environment. Acts as team member by providing information, analysis and recommendations in support of team efforts. Exercises independent judgment within defined parameters.

Education And Experience Required


Typically a Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience and/or 1-2 years related experience or Master's degree.


Knowledge And Skills


Basic knowledge in the field of Customer Relations. Demonstrated verbal communication and customer service skills.
Knowledge of microcomputer hardware, basic- level knowledge of operating systems software.
Demonstrated writing/correspondence skills.


Additional Skills

Accountability, Accountability, Action Planning, Active Learning, Active Listening, Bias, Business Growth, Business Planning, Coaching, Commercial Acumen, Creativity, Critical Thinking, Cross-Functional Teamwork, Customer Experience Strategy, Customer Relationship Management (CRM), Data Analysis Management, Data Collection Management (Inactive), Data Controls, Design Thinking, Empathy, Follow-Through, Growth Mindset, Intellectual Curiosity (Inactive), Long Term Planning, Managing Ambiguity {+ 6 more}

What We Can Offer You

Health & Wellbeing

We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.

Personal & Professional Development

We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.

Unconditional Inclusion

We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.

Let's Stay Connected

Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.

Job

Services

Job Level

Entry

HPE is an Equal Employment Opportunity/ Veterans/Disabled/LGBT employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, or any other protected category, and all decisions we make are made on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Our goal is to be one global team that is representative of our customers, in an inclusive environment where we can continue to innovate and grow together. Please click here: Equal Employment Opportunity.

In accordance with applicable Mexican laws and our commitment to non-discrimination, HPE strictly prohibits requiring medical certificates related to pregnancy status or HIV as conditions for employment, continued service, or promotion.

Hewlett Packard Enterprise is EEO Protected Veteran/ Individual with Disabilities.

HPE will comply with all applicable laws related to employer use of arrest and conviction records, including laws requiring employers to consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories.

Recruitment Fraud Alert

We have become aware of an increase in fraudulent recruitment activities in which individuals impersonate our company or authorized recruitment agencies to offer fake employment opportunities. These scams may occur through false websites, emails, social media, or chat-based applications and often aim to obtain personal information or money. Please note that Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), its direct and indirect subsidiaries and affiliated companies, and its authorized recruitment agencies/vendors will never charge a candidate a registration fee, hiring fee, or any other fee in connection with its recruitment and hiring process. We also never request personal information such as back account details, Social Security numbers, or national IDs via social media or chat applications.

All legitimate job opportunities will come through official company channels, and candidates are responsible for verifying the credentials of any third party claiming to represent the company. Any reliance on fraudulent communication is at the individual’s own risk, and HPE disclaims legal liability for any resulting damages. If you suspect recruitment fraud, do not share personal information or make any payments and report the incident to your local authorities immediately.

title: Lead, Advanced Analytics, Hosting Services (Brazil)
skills: Conduct advanced data analysis and statistical modeling to extract actionable insights that inform strategic decisions across key geographical markets and host segments.
Manage stakeholder relationships across the homes supply team, ensuring clarity of communication and strategic alignment on analytics initiatives.
Analyze broad data to understand the drivers of new listing supply, availability, revenue, churn and other key metrics related to host needs and engagement.
Define new metrics and identify leading indicators of key business outcomes.
Build dashboards and data pipelines to track key performance metrics across markets and host segments to establish benchmarks.

Develop and support agentic workflows and AI-assisted tools to automate recurring data analysis and reporting tasks, improving the speed and scale of insights delivery and enabling self-serve access to data across the homes supply team.
Conduct A/B tests to improve business performance and maximize incrementality.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including Strategic Finance, Data and Analytical Engineering, and Data Science, to align strategies and leverage synergies.

A quantitative undergraduate degree with a strong preference for candidates holding an MBA or equivalent advanced degree, with 8+ years of industry experience in a Data Science, Analytics, or equivalent role.
Prior experience in advanced analytics or business data science within a marketplace or business strategy setting.

Deep technical expertise in data analysis, statistical modeling, experimentation and causal inference, familiarity with LLMs, and experience applying these skills to derive insights from broad data sets.
Exceptional business acumen, strategic thinking skills, and the ability to make informed judgments.
Excellent communication skills, capable of engaging with a variety of stakeholders and conveying complex concepts in an accessible manner.
Proven stakeholder management skills, with the ability to collaborate and influence across functions.
An agile, growth-minded approach, demonstrated through a history of driving projects from ideation to impact.
description:
About the job

Airbnb was born in 2007 when two hosts welcomed three guests to their San Francisco home, and has since grown to over 5 million hosts who have welcomed over 2 billion guest arrivals in almost every country across the globe. Every day, hosts offer unique stays and experiences that make it possible for guests to connect with communities in a more authentic way.

The Community You Will Join

Airbnb, a global leader in the travel and hospitality industry, is dedicated to creating a world where anyone can belong anywhere. With our unique accommodations and experiences, we connect travelers with local hosts across the globe. As we continue to innovate and grow, we're looking for dynamic individuals to join our team and help shape our trajectory.

The Difference You Will Make

Airbnb is seeking a Lead, Advanced Analytics, Hosting Services to support the growth of Airbnb's initiatives in the Hosting Services space, including the Co-Host Network, Host Referrals program, and Superhost Ambassadors program. This role is pivotal in analyzing the success of these supply programs across countries and host segments to better understand the drivers of key business, financial, and engagement metrics. The individual in this role will focus on in-depth data analysis, statistical modeling, metric definition, impact assessment, experimentation, and synthesis of insights to inform prioritization.

A Typical Day


Conduct advanced data analysis and statistical modeling to extract actionable insights that inform strategic decisions across key geographical markets and host segments. 
Manage stakeholder relationships across the homes supply team, ensuring clarity of communication and strategic alignment on analytics initiatives. 
Analyze broad data to understand the drivers of new listing supply, availability, revenue, churn and other key metrics related to host needs and engagement. 
Define new metrics and identify leading indicators of key business outcomes. 
Build dashboards and data pipelines to track key performance metrics across markets and host segments to establish benchmarks. 
Develop and support agentic workflows and AI-assisted tools to automate recurring data analysis and reporting tasks, improving the speed and scale of insights delivery and enabling self-serve access to data across the homes supply team. 
Conduct A/B tests to improve business performance and maximize incrementality. 
Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including Strategic Finance, Data and Analytical Engineering, and Data Science, to align strategies and leverage synergies. 


Your Expertise


A quantitative undergraduate degree with a strong preference for candidates holding an MBA or equivalent advanced degree, with 8+ years of industry experience in a Data Science, Analytics, or equivalent role. 
Prior experience in advanced analytics or business data science within a marketplace or business strategy setting. 
Deep technical expertise in data analysis, statistical modeling, experimentation and causal inference, familiarity with LLMs, and experience applying these skills to derive insights from broad data sets. 
Exceptional business acumen, strategic thinking skills, and the ability to make informed judgments. 
Excellent communication skills, capable of engaging with a variety of stakeholders and conveying complex concepts in an accessible manner. 
Proven stakeholder management skills, with the ability to collaborate and influence across functions. 
An agile, growth-minded approach, demonstrated through a history of driving projects from ideation to impact. 


Our Commitment To Inclusion & Belonging

Airbnb is committed to working with the broadest talent pool possible. We believe diverse ideas foster innovation and engagement, and allow us to attract creatively-led people, and to develop the best products, services and solutions. All qualified individuals are encouraged to apply.

How We'll Take Care Of You

Our job titles may span more than one career level. The actual base pay is dependent upon many factors, such as: training, transferable skills, work experience, business needs and market demands. The base pay range shown below is monthly, is subject to change and may be modified in the future. This role may also be eligible for bonus, equity, benefits, and Employee Travel Credits.

Brazil Monthly Pay Range

R$24.000—R$30.000 BRL

description:
About the job

¿Qué hace que DHL sea una gran Compañía?

¡Nuestra gente y nuestra cultura, basadas en el respeto y los resultados!

DHL Compañía #1 en servicio de logística global está presente en más de 220 países, lo que la convierte en la empresa más internacional. Con una fuerza laboral superior a 480,000 empleados, brindamos soluciones para un número casi infinito de necesidades logísticas. DHL es parte del grupo postal alemán y líder mundial en logística, DHL Group abarca tres divisiones: DHL Express, DHL Global Forwarding y DHL Supply Chain.

Somos reconocidos como Global Top Employer en 6 regiones y 35 países, incluido México.

Nuestra división, DHL Global Forwarding está enfocada en proveer servicios logísticos de Importación y Exportación (Aérea, Marítima y Terrestre), incluyendo el servicio de Aduana. Nuestro expertise abarca desde operaciones estandarizadas y soluciones multimodales de expedición, hasta proyectos industriales individualizados.

Tenemos una gran oportunidad para ti como Customer Service en Monterrey.

¿Cuál será tu objetivo principal en esta posición?

Garantizar el correcto funcionamiento de la cuenta del cliente, asegurando la atención de necesidades, el rendimiento operativo y el mantenimiento del sistema para brindar visibilidad de los procesos.

¿Qué harás en esta posición?



Brindar atención centrada en el cliente y dar seguimiento a operaciones para asegurar visibilidad.
Identificar y resolver problemas operativos de forma ágil.
Mantener comunicación efectiva con cliente y equipos.
Dar seguimiento a KPI’s
Actuar de manera proactiva anticipando riesgos operativos.
Coordinar con áreas internas para asegurar el cumplimiento de procesos.
Solucionar las quejas o problemas que estén bajo su control y/o canalizarlas con las áreas que corresponda.
Gestionar reclamos correspondientes a su cargo involucrando a las áreas que corresponda.



¿Qué puedes aportar a la posición?



Inglés Intermedio-Avanzado.
Manejo de Excel.
Manejo de Microsoft y Power BI.
2-4 años de experiencia enfocado a Forwarding.
Manejo de métricos.
Conocimiento del proceso de importación y exportación.
Capacidad de análisis, trabajo en equipo, organizado.
Lic en Relaciones o negocios Internacionales, Comercio exterior, Ing. en Transporte o Logística



¿Por qué deberías unirte a nuestro equipo?

Tendrás la oportunidad de trabajar en una empresa internacional con un entorno multicultural.

Podrás explorar nuestras oportunidades de capacitación y desarrollo y convertirte en un experto en Logística.

DHL es un empleador que ofrece igualdad de oportunidades. Evaluamos a los postulantes sin distinción de raza, religión, sexo, preferencia sexual, discapacidad, entre otras características.

Para esta posición, DHL Global Forwarding solo empleará a aquellos que estén legalmente autorizados para trabajar en México. Esta no es una posición para la cual se otorgará subsidio de reubicación o patrocinio de visa.

¿Interesado en participar?

Postúlate por este medio

CONNECTING PEOPLE IMPROVING LIVES

description:
About the job

Job Title: Zoho Automation Specialist

Location: Remote (LATAM)

Salary Range: Up to $2,500 USD/month

Schedule: Monday – Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST




We are seeking a Zoho Automation Specialist to own workflow automation, CRM optimization, and business process improvement initiatives across multiple business units. This role is responsible for designing, building, and deploying scalable solutions using Zoho CRM, Zoho Creator, and Zoho Flow to improve operational efficiency and support business growth.




The ideal candidate has hands-on experience implementing Zoho-based solutions, gathering business requirements, automating workflows, and training end users. This is a highly autonomous role for someone who can independently identify opportunities, execute solutions, and drive adoption across teams.




Key Responsibilities

Own workflow analysis and process improvement initiatives across multiple business units.
Design and implement automation solutions using Zoho CRM, Zoho Creator, and Zoho Flow.
Gather business requirements through stakeholder interviews and process discovery sessions.
Translate operational needs into scalable technical solutions.
Build, test, deploy, and optimize automation workflows and system integrations.
Create documentation, SOPs, and training materials for implemented solutions.
Train end users and support adoption of new workflows and systems.
Monitor automation performance and identify opportunities for continuous improvement.
Troubleshoot system issues and implement enhancements as business needs evolve.
Manage multiple automation projects while maintaining quality and delivery timelines.




Qualifications

Proven experience building and managing production-level solutions using Zoho CRM, Zoho Creator, and Zoho Flow.
Experience independently delivering automation and systems implementation projects.
Strong understanding of workflow design, business process optimization, and automation best practices.
Ability to translate business requirements into technical solutions.
Excellent written English communication skills.
Strong documentation and process-mapping abilities.
Highly organized with exceptional attention to detail.
Comfortable working directly with non-technical stakeholders.




Nice to Have

Experience with Zapier or similar automation platforms.
Experience supporting healthcare or multi-location service businesses.
Familiarity with operational workflows across multiple entities.
Experience leading user training and change management initiatives.
Experience integrating Zoho products with third-party applications.




Success in This Role

Business processes are automated and optimized for efficiency and scalability.
Zoho systems are maintained with high accuracy and reliability.
Teams successfully adopt new workflows and automation solutions.
Documentation remains current and supports long-term operational consistency.
Automation initiatives reduce manual work and improve business performance.

title: Inside Sales & CRM Specialist (GoHighLevel) (Job ID: TIMJAZ1)
skills: Job Title: Lead Generator & Appointment Setter
Job ID: TIMMIC1
Industry: Business Coaching
Location: LATAM / South Africa
Job Status:
Full Time
90 Day Probation Period
Work Schedule:
Monday to Friday
8:00 AM to 5:30 PM EST
30-minute lunch break
Compensation:
$8/hour base
$35 per meeting held (not booked)
KPI expectation: 3 meetings booked per week or 12 per month
Payment via Wise ONLY
Target Start Date: ASAP
About the Client:
About the Role:
Key Responsibilities:

Lead Sourcing & Research: Independently research and build targeted calling lists from the internet based on approved industries, geography, and business size. (Note: No lists are provided; you must build your own database).
High-Volume Outbound Activity: Execute daily calling cadences. You will be responsible for the "front end" of the sales cycle, turning cold data into warm conversations.
Expert GHL User: Fully leverage GoHighLevel CRM. This includes importing the databases you create, utilizing the calling/power-dialer features, and optimizing/managing workflows and opportunities.
Appointment Setting: Convert outbound conversations into booked discovery meetings. You are responsible for the quality of the meeting and ensuring the prospect is qualified.
Strategy & Objection Handling: As a seasoned pro, you will collaborate with the Coach to create and refine scripts and objection-handling rebuttals based on real-time market feedback.
Accountability & Reporting: Track and communicate daily outreach activity (dials, talks, bookings) with a focus on ownership of results.
Qualifications & Skills
Experience: Minimum 3+ years in outbound cold calling, appointment setting, or hunter-style sales.
Technical Proficiency: High-level GoHighLevel (GHL) experience is mandatory (including data imports, dialer functionality, and workflow management).
Personality Type: High "D" (Dominance) and "i" (Influence) DISC profile. Must be results-driven, thick-skinned, and possess a high sense of urgency.
Communication: Assertive and professional verbal/written skills; able to command respect and build rapport with high-level decision-makers.
Process Mastery: Ability to hit the ground running with zero hand-holding on lead sourcing or CRM mechanics.
description:
About the job

🌟 We’re Hiring: Lead Generator & Appointment Setter




IMPORTANT - Watch this quick Loom video on how to get hired:

https://www.loom.com/share/345f776084e642ba99c24aabe40a67a0

C1 ENGLISH LEVEL IS REQUIRED, THE SELECTED CANDIDATE WILL BE SPEAKING STRICTLY IN ENGLISH DURING THEIR WHOLE SHIFT.

PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND AUDIO RECORDING IN ENGLISH




📋 Job Information

Job Title: Lead Generator & Appointment Setter
Job ID: TIMMIC1
Industry: Business Coaching
Location: LATAM / South Africa
Job Status:
Full Time
90 Day Probation Period
Work Schedule:
Monday to Friday
8:00 AM to 5:30 PM EST
30-minute lunch break
Compensation:
$8/hour base
$35 per meeting held (not booked)
KPI expectation: 3 meetings booked per week or 12 per month
Payment via Wise ONLY
Target Start Date: ASAP




🧩Role Overview

About the Client:




The client is a premier strategic business coaching firm and part of a globally recognized franchise network. They specialize in helping small to medium-sized business owners transition from being "operators" of their business to true "owners." Led by an experienced coach with a background in operational excellence, the firm operates with a results-oriented, high-accountability culture dedicated to transforming the local business landscape.




About the Role:




We are seeking a resilient, performance-oriented "Hunter" to drive our growth. This is not a

"customer service" or "admin" role; it is a high-intensity outbound sales position. Your mission is

to identify, research, and convert prospects into booked meetings through aggressive calling,

disciplined follow-up, and expert pipeline management. You must be comfortable with high

rejection, self-starting your own research, and pushing toward aggressive KPIs without constant

supervision.




Key Responsibilities:




Lead Sourcing & Research: Independently research and build targeted calling lists from the internet based on approved industries, geography, and business size. (Note: No lists are provided; you must build your own database).
High-Volume Outbound Activity: Execute daily calling cadences. You will be responsible for the "front end" of the sales cycle, turning cold data into warm conversations.
Expert GHL User: Fully leverage GoHighLevel CRM. This includes importing the databases you create, utilizing the calling/power-dialer features, and optimizing/managing workflows and opportunities.
Appointment Setting: Convert outbound conversations into booked discovery meetings. You are responsible for the quality of the meeting and ensuring the prospect is qualified.
Strategy & Objection Handling: As a seasoned pro, you will collaborate with the Coach to create and refine scripts and objection-handling rebuttals based on real-time market feedback.
Accountability & Reporting: Track and communicate daily outreach activity (dials, talks, bookings) with a focus on ownership of results.




Qualifications & Skills
Experience: Minimum 3+ years in outbound cold calling, appointment setting, or hunter-style sales.
Technical Proficiency: High-level GoHighLevel (GHL) experience is mandatory (including data imports, dialer functionality, and workflow management).
Personality Type: High "D" (Dominance) and "i" (Influence) DISC profile. Must be results-driven, thick-skinned, and possess a high sense of urgency.
Communication: Assertive and professional verbal/written skills; able to command respect and build rapport with high-level decision-makers.
Process Mastery: Ability to hit the ground running with zero hand-holding on lead sourcing or CRM mechanics.




🚀 Submit your application today and take the first step toward your next great opportunity!

title: Lead, Advanced Analytics, Hosting Services (Mexico)
skills: Conduct advanced data analysis and statistical modeling to extract actionable insights that inform strategic decisions across key geographical markets and host segments.
Manage stakeholder relationships across the homes supply team, ensuring clarity of communication and strategic alignment on analytics initiatives.
Analyze broad data to understand the drivers of new listing supply, availability, revenue, churn and other key metrics related to host needs and engagement.
Define new metrics and identify leading indicators of key business outcomes.
Build dashboards and data pipelines to track key performance metrics across markets and host segments to establish benchmarks.

Develop and support agentic workflows and AI-assisted tools to automate recurring data analysis and reporting tasks, improving the speed and scale of insights delivery and enabling self-serve access to data across the homes supply team.
Conduct A/B tests to improve business performance and maximize incrementality.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including Strategic Finance, Data and Analytical Engineering, and Data Science, to align strategies and leverage synergies.

A quantitative undergraduate degree with a strong preference for candidates holding an MBA or equivalent advanced degree, with 8+ years of industry experience in a Data Science, Analytics, or equivalent role.
Prior experience in advanced analytics or business data science within a marketplace or business strategy setting.

Deep technical expertise in data analysis, statistical modeling, experimentation and causal inference, familiarity with LLMs, and experience applying these skills to derive insights from broad data sets.
Exceptional business acumen, strategic thinking skills, and the ability to make informed judgments.
Excellent communication skills, capable of engaging with a variety of stakeholders and conveying complex concepts in an accessible manner.
Proven stakeholder management skills, with the ability to collaborate and influence across functions.
An agile, growth-minded approach, demonstrated through a history of driving projects from ideation to impact.
description:
About the job

Airbnb was born in 2007 when two hosts welcomed three guests to their San Francisco home, and has since grown to over 5 million hosts who have welcomed over 2 billion guest arrivals in almost every country across the globe. Every day, hosts offer unique stays and experiences that make it possible for guests to connect with communities in a more authentic way.

The Community You Will Join

Airbnb, a global leader in the travel and hospitality industry, is dedicated to creating a world where anyone can belong anywhere. With our unique accommodations and experiences, we connect travelers with local hosts across the globe. As we continue to innovate and grow, we're looking for dynamic individuals to join our team and help shape our trajectory.

The Difference You Will Make

Airbnb is seeking a Lead, Advanced Analytics, Hosting Services to support the growth of Airbnb's initiatives in the Hosting Services space, including the Co-Host Network, Host Referrals program, and Superhost Ambassadors program. This role is pivotal in analyzing the success of these supply programs across countries and host segments to better understand the drivers of key business, financial, and engagement metrics. The individual in this role will focus on in-depth data analysis, statistical modeling, metric definition, impact assessment, experimentation, and synthesis of insights to inform prioritization.

A Typical Day


Conduct advanced data analysis and statistical modeling to extract actionable insights that inform strategic decisions across key geographical markets and host segments. 
Manage stakeholder relationships across the homes supply team, ensuring clarity of communication and strategic alignment on analytics initiatives. 
Analyze broad data to understand the drivers of new listing supply, availability, revenue, churn and other key metrics related to host needs and engagement. 
Define new metrics and identify leading indicators of key business outcomes. 
Build dashboards and data pipelines to track key performance metrics across markets and host segments to establish benchmarks. 
Develop and support agentic workflows and AI-assisted tools to automate recurring data analysis and reporting tasks, improving the speed and scale of insights delivery and enabling self-serve access to data across the homes supply team. 
Conduct A/B tests to improve business performance and maximize incrementality. 
Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including Strategic Finance, Data and Analytical Engineering, and Data Science, to align strategies and leverage synergies. 


Your Expertise


A quantitative undergraduate degree with a strong preference for candidates holding an MBA or equivalent advanced degree, with 8+ years of industry experience in a Data Science, Analytics, or equivalent role. 
Prior experience in advanced analytics or business data science within a marketplace or business strategy setting. 
Deep technical expertise in data analysis, statistical modeling, experimentation and causal inference, familiarity with LLMs, and experience applying these skills to derive insights from broad data sets. 
Exceptional business acumen, strategic thinking skills, and the ability to make informed judgments. 
Excellent communication skills, capable of engaging with a variety of stakeholders and conveying complex concepts in an accessible manner. 
Proven stakeholder management skills, with the ability to collaborate and influence across functions. 
An agile, growth-minded approach, demonstrated through a history of driving projects from ideation to impact. 


Our Commitment To Inclusion & Belonging

Airbnb is committed to working with the broadest talent pool possible. We believe diverse ideas foster innovation and engagement, and allow us to attract creatively-led people, and to develop the best products, services and solutions. All qualified individuals are encouraged to apply.

How We'll Take Care Of You

Our job titles may span more than one career level. The actual base pay is dependent upon many factors, such as: training, transferable skills, work experience, business needs and market demands. The base pay range shown below is monthly, is subject to change and may be modified in the future. This role may also be eligible for bonus, equity, benefits, and Employee Travel Credits.

Mexico Monthly Pay Range

$100,000—$125,000 MXN

title: Customer Service Contact
location: San Luis Potosí, San Luis Potosí, Mexico (On-site)
skills: Upon receiving of the customer schedules (via EDI, webEDI or paper), ensure that the Customer requirements are integrated into the system and any integration errors are dealt with and resolved. Loading closed orders onto the system.

Identify & highlight large order variations between the schedules that were forecasted by the Customer & those that are firmed up by the Customer, ensuring that the data has been accurately supplied from the Customer.
If necessary, release picking lists for the Customers’ deliveries.

Follow the complete Supply Chain (procurement, production, and shipping) and chase if necessary, ensure that targeted service levels to the Customer are reached. Monitor the safety stock levels and alert when the min / max levels are reached.
Manage co-operation and logistics issues with logistics external platforms
Ensure that the correct parameters are applied to each reference (MOQ, lead-time, transportation schedule), and if necessary, initiate corrective action plans.
Be aware of/integrated in P1 and P0 projects (new references, new packaging, transfers, new Customers…). Ensure that the returnable packaging loops are adhered to, preventing any packaging shortages.
Prepare the Customs documentation required for exporting if need be.

On a regular basis, communicate complete, precise & reliable information to the Customer contacts. Adapt the chosen method of communication to the level of the Customer contact. Adapt the frequency to the situation (preventative, curative, crisis).
Meet the Customer contacts on a regular basis (once a year for major Customers).
Ensure that the internal scheduling has been launched, taking into account the Customers’ priorities. Make or Ensure the production sequencing based on real customer demand
Measure the daily service rate for each Customer (using the Customers’ calculation and also the internal Customer Service Rate (CSR) calculation). Propose action plans to improve the service level.

Alert sales in the event of a crisis (Customer or internal), to define priorities with the Customer & internally (management, VS for the aftermarket), follow the evolution of any associated action plans. If necessary, escalate through the Logistics Red Alert application.

Make sure that there is a backup for each Customer & train the backup on the way to manage the Customers’ account; ensure that during holidays the position is covered & that both internal & external Customers are notified in advance of the absence and informed of the person that will be temporarily managing the Customers’ account.

a multi-cultural environment that values diversity and international collaboration

description:
About the job

Valeo est une entreprise mondiale de haute technologie qui conçoit des solutions révolutionnaires pour réinventer la mobilité. Nous sommes un équipementier partenaire des constructeurs automobiles et des acteurs de la nouvelle mobilité dans le monde entier. Notre vision ? Inventer une mobilité plus verte et plus sûre, grâce à des solutions axées sur la conduite intuitive et la réduction des émissions de CO2. Nous sommes leaders dans nos domaines d'activité et reconnus comme l'une des plus grandes entreprises innovantes au monde.

Recognize and manage all demands for products from customers by driving Sales and operation plan and Master production Schedules~ 


Upon receiving of the customer schedules (via EDI, webEDI or paper), ensure that the Customer requirements are integrated into the system and any integration errors are dealt with and resolved. Loading closed orders onto the system. 
Identify & highlight large order variations between the schedules that were forecasted by the Customer & those that are firmed up by the Customer, ensuring that the data has been accurately supplied from the Customer. 
If necessary, release picking lists for the Customers’ deliveries. 
Follow the complete Supply Chain (procurement, production, and shipping) and chase if necessary, ensure that targeted service levels to the Customer are reached. Monitor the safety stock levels and alert when the min / max levels are reached. 
Manage co-operation and logistics issues with logistics external platforms 
Ensure that the correct parameters are applied to each reference (MOQ, lead-time, transportation schedule), and if necessary, initiate corrective action plans. 
Be aware of/integrated in P1 and P0 projects (new references, new packaging, transfers, new Customers…). Ensure that the returnable packaging loops are adhered to, preventing any packaging shortages. 
Prepare the Customs documentation required for exporting if need be. 
On a regular basis, communicate complete, precise & reliable information to the Customer contacts. Adapt the chosen method of communication to the level of the Customer contact. Adapt the frequency to the situation (preventative, curative, crisis). 
Meet the Customer contacts on a regular basis (once a year for major Customers). 


Make sure from the complete customer demand (date & quantity), that this demand will be met~ Ensure the feasibility of the Customers’ programs internally (MPS Manager (weekly), Procurement and Scheduler (daily)) and if necessary, negotiate the planned delivery dates upstream with the Customer. 


Ensure that the internal scheduling has been launched, taking into account the Customers’ priorities. Make or Ensure the production sequencing based on real customer demand 
Measure the daily service rate for each Customer (using the Customers’ calculation and also the internal Customer Service Rate (CSR) calculation). Propose action plans to improve the service level. 


Identify the blocking points and plan appropriate quick actions to solve them~ 


Alert sales in the event of a crisis (Customer or internal), to define priorities with the Customer & internally (management, VS for the aftermarket), follow the evolution of any associated action plans. If necessary, escalate through the Logistics Red Alert application. 
Make sure that there is a backup for each Customer & train the backup on the way to manage the Customers’ account; ensure that during holidays the position is covered & that both internal & external Customers are notified in advance of the absence and informed of the person that will be temporarily managing the Customers’ account.

description:
About the job

At ABB, we help industries outrun - leaner and cleaner. Here, progress is an expectation - for you, your team, and the world. As a global market leader, we’ll give you what you need to make it happen. It won’t always be easy, growing takes grit. But at ABB, you’ll never run alone. Run what runs the world.

This role sits within ABB's Robotics business, a leading global robotics company. We're entering an exciting new chapter as we’ve announced the plan for SoftBank Group to acquire ABB Robotics. SoftBank is a globally recognized technology group and investor/operator focused on AI, robotics, and next-generation computing. By joining us now, you’ll be part of a pioneering team shaping the future of robotics—working alongside world-class experts in a fast-moving, innovation-driven environment.

This Position reports to:

Service Sales Manager

Your Role: Own the Challenge

In this role, you will drive service sales processes, generate new service opportunities, and secure profitable sales within the designated areas. Each day, you will focus on Installed Base (IB) penetration and promote the full Service product portfolio. You will also leverage your expertise to build long-term customer relationships and ensure prompt responses to specific customer needs and issues.

The work model for the role is: Hybrid

This role is contributing to the Robotics Service Area in Mexico.

Key Responsibilities:


Penetrate the Installed Base by promoting upgrades, retrofits, and value-added solutions that benefit both customers and ABB.
Understand channel strategy, establish related pricing, prepare sales plans, review performance, and propose recovery plans when needed.
Generate service sales leads and develop new market opportunities by analyzing market trends and identifying potential new service offerings.
Act as a marketer and salesperson for ABB’s service products and solutions during campaigns, trade fairs, exhibitions, conferences, and customer meetings


Qualifications:


3+ years of experience in technical service sales, preferably in automation and/or robotics
Knowledge of the automotive market and general industry
Experience with sales management tools, preferably Salesforce
Advanced english
Willingness to travel
Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical, Electrical, Electronic, or Mechatronic Engineering


We also offer our employees the following benefits:


Sales Incentive Plan
Saving fund
Paid parental leave
Life insurance
Retirement plan
Health and dental insurance
Wellbeing program
Flex days
Employee Assistance Program (PAE)
Access to development platforms: Spark, Harvard Manager Mentor and English Learning EF English Live School (EF)


We value people from different backgrounds. Could this be your story? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to read more about us and learn about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

title: Junior Media Buyer for a US Performance Marketing Agency (Remote)
skills: Building, launching, and managing Meta campaigns (CBO/ABO structures, audiences, placements, creative testing).
Supporting and growing into independent buying on AppLovin / Axon.
Monitoring daily performance and flagging scaling opportunities, underperformers, and anomalies.
Running structured creative and audience tests, and documenting the results.
Pulling, organizing, and interpreting performance data to inform decisions, and producing clear weekly client reports.
Analyzing creative performance using soft metrics (CTR, CPM, CPC), benchmarking against account averages, and clearly communicating those reads to strategists and clients.
Helping maintain clean account hygiene, naming conventions, and tracking.
0-2 years of hands-on paid media experience (internships, freelance, or running your own / your brand's ads all count).
Clear written communication in English.
Genuine fluency with Meta Ads Manager — you've built campaigns, not just read about them.
Strong numerical sense; comfortable living in spreadsheets and dashboards.
A direct-response mindset: you care about CPA, ROAS, and contribution margin, not vanity metrics.
Familiarity with DTC e-commerce, Shopify, and the fashion/beauty/lifestyle space.
Working knowledge of tracking and attribution tools (pixels, CAPI, ClickFlare, GA4, etc.).
Comfortable staying responsive when accounts demand it, including the occasional evening or weekend during launches or scaling pushes.
Availability during key EST windows to analyze performance and take action (scale, kill, pull back, etc.).
Experience with AdManage (strongly preferred).
Hands-on time with AppLovin / Axon or other programmatic / native platforms.
Basic understanding of creative.
Competitive base salary.
Fully remote, full-time contractor role.
Learn direct-response media buying directly from senior operators managing significant spend.
Real ownership early—you won't be stuck pulling reports for a year.
Work across a diverse roster of scaling, fast-growing DTC brands in fashion, beauty, and lifestyle.
A fast-paced team environment that rewards results and fosters growth into a senior media buyer role.
description:
About the job

Paired is a global staffing and recruiting agency that specializes in pairing remote work with top-tier talent!

We are dedicated to connecting talented individuals with remarkable companies in need of their skills. Our goal is to create fulfilling job opportunities for professionals around the world.

Our client:



Looking for a Junior Media Buyer who wants to learn the performance marketing craft properly. This is a hands-in-the-account role from day one for someone obsessed with what makes an ad account scale profitably, not just spend. You will work hand-in-hand with senior buyers to plan, launch, and optimize paid campaigns primarily on Meta, with growing responsibility on AppLovin / Axon.

You don't need years of experience, but you do need sharp instincts, comfort with numbers, and the drive to get great at this fast. You'll be building campaigns, reading data, spotting what's working, and learning to make confident scale/kill decisions across a portfolio of fast-growing DTC e-commerce brands.

This is a high-performance environment built for hungry, ambitious people who take real ownership of their accounts and treat client budgets like their own.

You'll be responsible for


Building, launching, and managing Meta campaigns (CBO/ABO structures, audiences, placements, creative testing).
Supporting and growing into independent buying on AppLovin / Axon.
Monitoring daily performance and flagging scaling opportunities, underperformers, and anomalies.
Running structured creative and audience tests, and documenting the results.
Pulling, organizing, and interpreting performance data to inform decisions, and producing clear weekly client reports.
Analyzing creative performance using soft metrics (CTR, CPM, CPC), benchmarking against account averages, and clearly communicating those reads to strategists and clients.
Helping maintain clean account hygiene, naming conventions, and tracking.


Requirements


0-2 years of hands-on paid media experience (internships, freelance, or running your own / your brand's ads all count).
Clear written communication in English.
Genuine fluency with Meta Ads Manager — you've built campaigns, not just read about them.
Strong numerical sense; comfortable living in spreadsheets and dashboards.
A direct-response mindset: you care about CPA, ROAS, and contribution margin, not vanity metrics.
Familiarity with DTC e-commerce, Shopify, and the fashion/beauty/lifestyle space.
Working knowledge of tracking and attribution tools (pixels, CAPI, ClickFlare, GA4, etc.).
Comfortable staying responsive when accounts demand it, including the occasional evening or weekend during launches or scaling pushes.
Availability during key EST windows to analyze performance and take action (scale, kill, pull back, etc.).
Nice to have


Experience with AdManage (strongly preferred).
Hands-on time with AppLovin / Axon or other programmatic / native platforms.
Basic understanding of creative.


Benefits


Competitive base salary.
Fully remote, full-time contractor role.
Learn direct-response media buying directly from senior operators managing significant spend.
Real ownership early—you won't be stuck pulling reports for a year.
Work across a diverse roster of scaling, fast-growing DTC brands in fashion, beauty, and lifestyle.
A fast-paced team environment that rewards results and fosters growth into a senior media buyer role.
