description:
About the job

About Signify

Through bold discovery and cutting-edge innovation, we lead an industry that is vital for the future of our planet: lighting. Through our leadership in connected lighting and the Internet of Things, we're breaking new ground in data analytics, AI, and smart solutions for homes, offices, cities, and beyond.

At Signify, you can shape tomorrow by building on our incredible 125+ year legacy while working toward even bolder sustainability goals. Our culture of continuous learning, creativity, and commitment to diversity and inclusion empowers you to grow your skills and career.

Join us, and together, we’ll transform our industry, making a lasting difference for brighter lives and a better world.

More About The Role

We’re looking for an Intern to join our Consumer Channel team in Mexico.

Working for Signify means being creative and adaptive. Our culture of continuous learning and commitment to diversity and inclusion creates an environment that allows you to build your skills and career. Together, we’re transforming our industry.

As the world leader in lighting, we’re constantly ahead of the curve. Through our leadership in connected lighting and the Internet of Things, we’re breaking new grounds in data analytics, AI, and smart homes, offices, cities and more!

Signify is proud to be a leader in climate action, acting in line with the latest climate science. We are committed to reaching net zero greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions by 2040.

As an Intern / Apprentice you’ll be responsible for supporting Sales team and SOM role to improve customer service level in all the region (MEX & NOLA).

We’re on the lookout for forward-thinking innovators with a passion for sustainability. If you match this description, get in touch!

What You’ll Do


Sales Dashboard construction
Inventory level tracking (on hand / in transit) – Signify and Customer analysis
Slowmovers Action Tracker development
Sell In / Sell Out Consolidation ( 12 – 24 months)
Provisions report


Your Qualifications


Industrial Engineering or Business student (graduating after June 2027)
Intermediate English
Excel proficiency
Proactive


Our candidate profile is just a guide. We know that many talented people only apply for jobs when there is an exact match. If you don't fit all the criteria but believe this role is for you, we would very much like to hear from you.

We’re offering multiple opportunities for career development, like mentoring, coaching and stretch assignments, with strong international exposure for dynamic profiles. Learning is fundamental to our culture. Through continuous learning, we are transforming the industry. You have the chance to learn every day, acquire new skills and perspectives through customized online programs, and on-the-job experiences.

See #SignifyLife through the eyes of our employees!

Everything we’ll do for you

You can grow a lasting career here. We’ll encourage you, support you, and challenge you. We’ll help you learn and progress in a way that’s right for you, with coaching and mentoring along the way. We’ll listen to you too, because we see and value every one of our 27,000+ people. We believe that a diverse and inclusive workplace fosters creativity, innovation, and a full spectrum of bright ideas. With a global workforce present in 70+ countries, we are dedicated to creating an inclusive environment where every voice is heard and valued, helping us all achieve more together.

Come join us, and together we can light up the future.

title: Marketing Specialist
skills: Executes and participates in general marketing functions that are more routine in nature, require smaller spend budgets and requires minimal contact with clients. Requires oversight with developing approach for more complex marketing functions which include higher thresholds of spend levels.

Participates in collaboration with business development, customers, product management, sales and other business partners in support of client-customized, content-rich marketing collateral, such as proposals, corporate communication, and other marketing related information for marketing functions more routine in nature. Will make recommendations regarding marketing process. Supports the marketing approach within strategy and budget.
Supports the development of strategic marketing plans for existing lines and participates in the interpretation of plans into “big ideas” to extend the company’s brand vision.
Supports the strategic direction, growth, and vision of assigned strategic growth objectives for the segment and manages the execution of programs. Has minimal client contact.
Supports the development of multiple pieces of promotional and advertising materials, such as press releases, social and digital media published on-line via web sites, twitter, etc.

Based on assigned strategic growth initiatives, builds and maintains existing relationships with internal contacts, external communications consultants and/or agencies. Participates in meetings with internal and/or external clients to understand their ongoing strategies and how relationships can be strengthened within the client’s organization.
Supports the development of product promotion and launch strategies.

Beginning to act as a marketing advocate, communications consultant, and/or liaison for business support units and/or operational units within the organization. Supports communications with leaders in those units on specific communications issues and strategic growth initiatives and coordinates appropriate marketing resources to achieve their functional goals.

Recommends measurements for return on investment (ROI) for marketing projects within the specific goals of building and delivering campaigns, such as internal and external communications, product launches, new business units, acquisitions, and RFP/RFI proposals within planned scope, schedule, cost and quality, and trade shows/events. Tracks costs against measurements.
Bachelor's Degree
Relevant Experience or Degree in: Digital Marketing , Advertising ,
Typically Minimum 3 Years Relevant Exp
Prefer marketing service or marketing agency experience. Prefer sales force and email automation experience. Prefer payments industry experience.

Skills / Knowledge - Having wide-ranging experience, uses professional concepts and company objectives to resolve moderately complex issues in creative and effective ways. Having ownership of a sub-function, account or matrix management responsibilities, applies knowledge to meet goals, maintain relationships, propose opportunities to expand the business, and lead matrix teams. Some barriers to entry exist at this level (e.g., dept./peer review).

Job Complexity - Works on complex issues where analysis of situations or data requires an in-depth evaluation of variable factors. Exercises judgment in selecting methods, techniques and evaluation criteria for obtaining results. Networks with key contacts outside own area of expertise. Builds on/Maintains external relationships of assigned accounts.
Supervision - Determines methods and procedures on new assignments and may coordinate activities of other personnel (Team Lead).
Marketing production execution - Broad marketing services and/or print/production
Communication skills - Including communication with internal or external audiences
description:
About the job

Summary

Description Summary of This Role

Responsible for managing marketing, advertising and promotional activities for various products or channels. Takes steps to measure, enhance, and enrich the position and image of the company through various goals and objectives. Plan and execute day-to-day marketing activities in support of a product, service or channel. Help prepare and adhere to budgets. Oversee creation and delivery of advertising and marketing materials and ensure brand messages are consistent. Collaborate with sales and product to develop strategic partnership activities and implement the execution the identified opportunities.

What Part Will You Play?


Executes and participates in general marketing functions that are more routine in nature, require smaller spend budgets and requires minimal contact with clients. Requires oversight with developing approach for more complex marketing functions which include higher thresholds of spend levels.
Participates in collaboration with business development, customers, product management, sales and other business partners in support of client-customized, content-rich marketing collateral, such as proposals, corporate communication, and other marketing related information for marketing functions more routine in nature. Will make recommendations regarding marketing process. Supports the marketing approach within strategy and budget.
Supports the development of strategic marketing plans for existing lines and participates in the interpretation of plans into “big ideas” to extend the company’s brand vision.
Supports the strategic direction, growth, and vision of assigned strategic growth objectives for the segment and manages the execution of programs. Has minimal client contact.
Supports the development of multiple pieces of promotional and advertising materials, such as press releases, social and digital media published on-line via web sites, twitter, etc.
Based on assigned strategic growth initiatives, builds and maintains existing relationships with internal contacts, external communications consultants and/or agencies. Participates in meetings with internal and/or external clients to understand their ongoing strategies and how relationships can be strengthened within the client’s organization.
Supports the development of product promotion and launch strategies.
Beginning to act as a marketing advocate, communications consultant, and/or liaison for business support units and/or operational units within the organization. Supports communications with leaders in those units on specific communications issues and strategic growth initiatives and coordinates appropriate marketing resources to achieve their functional goals.
Recommends measurements for return on investment (ROI) for marketing projects within the specific goals of building and delivering campaigns, such as internal and external communications, product launches, new business units, acquisitions, and RFP/RFI proposals within planned scope, schedule, cost and quality, and trade shows/events. Tracks costs against measurements.


What Are We Looking For in This Role?

Minimum Qualifications


Bachelor's Degree
Relevant Experience or Degree in: Digital Marketing , Advertising ,
Typically Minimum 3 Years Relevant Exp


Preferred Qualifications


Prefer marketing service or marketing agency experience. Prefer sales force and email automation experience. Prefer payments industry experience.


What Are Our Desired Skills and Capabilities?

Some barriers to entry exist at this level (e.g., dept./peer review).

Exercises judgment in selecting methods, techniques and evaluation criteria for obtaining results. Networks with key contacts outside own area of expertise. Builds on/Maintains external relationships of assigned accounts.
Supervision - Determines methods and procedures on new assignments and may coordinate activities of other personnel (Team Lead).

How we work: At PPG, we bring teams together to accelerate collaboration and career development, with in-person work Monday through Thursday and the opportunity to work remotely on Flexible Fridays. Schedules may vary by location.

About Us

PPG: WE PROTECT AND BEAUTIFY THE WORLD™

Through leadership in innovation, sustainability and color, PPG helps customers in industrial, transportation, consumer products, and construction markets and aftermarkets to enhance more surfaces in more ways than does any other company. To learn more, visit www.ppg.com and follow @PPG on X.

The PPG Way 2030 

We are customer champions

Proactive. Bold. Trustworthy. Everything we do starts with our customers. We listen, move fast and don’t stop until we solve their biggest challenges. When our customers win, we all grow.

We act with purpose and speed

Agile. Data-driven. Empowered. We take smart risks to stay ahead of the competition. We work proactively with agility, using quality data to develop solutions that create value.

We are excellent operators

Productive. Collaborative. Accountable. No matter our role, we identify problems, take ownership and always bring solutions. We are both proactive and responsive to drive continuous improvement and deliver results. We support our frontline, the faces of PPG to our customers.

We compete to win

Future-focused. Driven. Ambitious. We are passionate about growing our business and winning with our customers. We deliver results, embrace new technologies and leverage agility and speed as strengths.

We are PPG proud

Strong. United. Passionate. We work safely, act with integrity and value our diverse perspectives. We celebrate achievements and take pride in the positive impact we create together to protect and beautify the world.

At PPG we use AI in the hiring process to make the process more efficient. AI tools do not make hiring decisions. You can learn more by going to https://careers.ppg.com/us/en/candidate-resources.

PPG provides equal opportunity to all candidates and employees. We offer an opportunity to grow and develop your career in an environment that provides a fulfilling workplace for employees, creates an environment for continuous learning, and embraces the ideas and diversity of others. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to sex, pregnancy, race, color, creed, religion, national origin, age, disability status, marital status, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression.

If you need an adjustment due to a disability, please email recruiting@ppg.com.

PPG pay ranges and benefits can vary by location which allows us to compensate employees competitively in different geographic markets. PPG considers several factors in making compensation decisions including, but not limited to, skill sets, experience and training, qualifications and education, licensure and certifications, and other organizational needs. Other incentives may apply.

Our employee benefits programs are designed to support the health and well-being of our employees. Any insurance coverages and benefits will be in accordance with the terms and conditions of the applicable plans and associated governing plan documents. Benefits will be discussed with you by your recruiter during the hiring process.

PPG values your feedback on our recruiting process. We encourage you to visit Glassdoor.com and provide feedback on the process, so that we can do better today than yesterday.

title: Marketing Production Manager, Originals, Prime Video, International
skills: Experience building and optimizing multiple, simultaneous marketing campaigns
Experience working at or with a creative or advertising agency, network, streaming service or studio
Speak, write, and read fluently in English, and have the ability to take direction in English
5+ years of experience in a production-based role managing end-to-end marketing campaigns across multiple channels (TV, digital/social, OOH, and print)
5+ years of experience managing large-scale, global or multi-territory marketing campaigns
Experience working within or alongside cross-functional marketing and creative teams to deliver campaign assets on time and on budget
Experience delivering paid media campaigns spanning broadcast, digital, and social channels
Experience in production and post-production workflows, including localisation and trafficking of promotional materials (key art, trailers, box art, display, and social)
Experience managing campaign budgets, including forecasting, tracking, and reporting on spend
Experience in the entertainment industry (Film/TV/Streaming), with an understanding of the content marketing lifecycle from greenlight to launch
description:
About the job

Description

Come build the future of entertainment with us. Are you interested in shaping the future of movies and television? Do you want to define the next generation of how and what Amazon customers are watching?

Prime Video is a premium streaming service that offers customers a vast collection of TV shows and movies - all with the ease of finding what they love to watch in one place. We offer customers thousands of popular movies and TV shows including Amazon Originals and exclusive licensed content to exciting live sports events. We also offer our members the opportunity to subscribe to add-on channels which they can cancel at anytime and to rent or buy new release movies and TV box sets on the Prime Video Store. Prime Video is a fast-paced, growth business - available in over 240 countries and territories worldwide. The team works in a dynamic environment where innovating on behalf of our customers is at the heart of everything we do. If this sounds exciting to you, please read on.

Prime Video International is seeking a Marketing Production Manager to help produce key marketing materials and manage 360 marketing campaign production and delivery for our TV show and Movie content. This position will ensure that each element of a TV show or movie launch marketing campaign is completed on time and on budget in the most effective and efficient manner possible. A self-starter who is able to prioritise and deliver on multiple deadlines with a track record of driving results.

Key job responsibilities

Leading the end-to-end production lifecycle and execution of high-impact TV and Film marketing campaigns globally, from creative development through to post-production and campaign delivery.

Manage all operational aspects of a campaign including workflow, timelines, resources and budgets.

Work collaboratively with internal teams and external agencies to assess project requirements, obtain approvals, and ensure efficient development and delivery of assets as per the production plan.

Global localisation and trafficking of key promotional materials, including key art, online & offline video, OOH, print, social, display, plus owned & operated channel requirements (e.g. key art, box art, trailers)

Ensure appropriate processes, procedures and job tracking to keep deliverables on time and on budget.

Anticipate and effectively mitigate problems, manage day-to-day escalations and troubleshooting of production issues.

Consistently communicate to stakeholders about updates on progress, relevant delays or issues, and budget or timing implications.

Proactively recognize cross-functional bottlenecks, challenges and workflow constraints and providing operational solutions.

Basic Qualifications


 Experience building and optimizing multiple, simultaneous marketing campaigns
 Experience working at or with a creative or advertising agency, network, streaming service or studio
 Speak, write, and read fluently in English, and have the ability to take direction in English
 5+ years of experience in a production-based role managing end-to-end marketing campaigns across multiple channels (TV, digital/social, OOH, and print)
 5+ years of experience managing large-scale, global or multi-territory marketing campaigns
 Experience working within or alongside cross-functional marketing and creative teams to deliver campaign assets on time and on budget
 Experience delivering paid media campaigns spanning broadcast, digital, and social channels


Preferred Qualifications


 Experience in production and post-production workflows, including localisation and trafficking of promotional materials (key art, trailers, box art, display, and social)
 Experience managing campaign budgets, including forecasting, tracking, and reporting on spend
 Experience in the entertainment industry (Film/TV/Streaming), with an understanding of the content marketing lifecycle from greenlight to launch


Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. description:
About the job

Overview

CAREERS TO SMILE ABOUT

At PepsiCo, you’ll discover a place where our mission is to create smiles around the world. With a portfolio of more than 500 beloved brands including, Gatorade, Lay’s and Quaker, our work touches millions of people every day.

At the heart of the company is a team of thinkers, creators, and problem-solvers who collaborate to innovate and turn ideas into action. Driven by innovation and a focus on creating joyful moments through food and drinks, our decisions are guided by consumer centricity, creating opportunities for our associates to do meaningful work and make a lasting impact in the communities we serve.

Whatever your role, you’ll be part of a global community that values your ideas and empowers you to make an impact, on your career and on the world around you.

Responsibilities

The Opportunity

The Content Designer is responsible for designing and executing full content projects, including social media graphics, banners, POS materials, internal communications, and presentation decks. They support the creative strategy and actively contribute ideas. Working closely with senior designers, they refine concepts and ensure that every design aligns with brand and project goals.

This role involves developing design and creative proposals, as well as adapting and versioning existing assets across PepsiCo’s portfolio to meet customer and consumer needs.

Our Content Designer is a specialist with expertise in retail, print, and digital materials. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented and highly proficient in design software, capable of creating graphics from scratch, editing and manipulating creative assets, and producing production-ready materials. They will also participate in brainstorming and brand strategy sessions, contributing to consumer programs, long-term campaigns, sizzle videos, POS, and 3D concepts.

Your Impact

As Mktg Analyst your responsibilities would consist of:


Work on the conception of creative visual ideas based on communication objectives.
Generate fresh, innovative POS, OOH materials, and multimedia graphics within brand and design standards to support all distribution channels, social media, and marketing initiatives.
Adapt and adjust existing creatives, digital toolkits, key visuals, and social media posts.
Build POS or KV designs and concepts when needed.
Determine the best way to visually represent a brand concept, focusing on graphic and motion design.
Act as a brand guardian, ensuring strict adherence to brand guidelines.
Take ownership of projects and work effectively both independently and collaboratively.
Detail-oriented, with the ability to prioritize, multitask, and stay organized while responding to last-minute requests and adapting to business changes.


High aptitude for learning, adaptability, and a strong sense of urgency to get things done.

Qualifications

Who Are We Looking For?

Education


Bachelor’s degree in a related field (Advertising, Graphic Design, Multimedia Design, Visual Arts, Motion Graphics, etc.).


Experience


4+ years of creative agency experience in design, 3D, packaging, or POS projects.
Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite, Photoshop, Illustrator; and Blender, After Effects or Premiere is a plus.
Experience collaborating with creative teams in agency or in-house environments.
Fluency in English and Spanish is required for this role (strong English communication skills are essential).
Experience with CPG brands is a plus.
Excellent communication skills with both design and account teams.
Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
Strong time management skills and the ability to meet deadlines.
Knowledge of PowerPoint and Microsoft Office.
Strong problem-solving and communication skills, with a willingness to learn and develop new design abilities.
A portfolio showcasing diverse digital, KV, and POS/packaging work, standout projects are a must.


If this is an opportunity that interests you, we encourage you to apply even if you do not meet 100% of the requirements.

What can you expect from us:

 


 Opportunities to learn and develop every day through a wide range of programs.
 Internal digital platforms that promote self-learning.
 Development programs according to Leadership skills.
 Specialized training according to the role.
 Learning experiences with internal and external providers.
 We love to celebrate success, which is why we have recognition programs for seniority, behavior, leadership, moments of life, among others.
 Financial wellness programs that will help you reach your goals in all stages of life.
 A flexibility program that will allow you to balance your personal and work life, adapting your working day to your lifestyle.
 And because your family is also important to us, they can also enjoy benefits such as our Wellness Line, thousands of Agreements and Discounts, Scholarship programs for your children, Aid Plans for different moments of life, among others.


 

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We respect and value diversity as a work force and innovation for the organization.

title: Paid Social Senior Associate
skills: Shape and execute paid social strategies that align with client objectives, overseeing budget allocation, media planning, reporting, and forecasting in partnership with cross-functional teams.
Manage the setup and trafficking of campaigns across platforms like Meta, TikTok, Pinterest, Snap, and LinkedIn, ensuring best practices and precision in execution.
Develop and implement testing frameworks to uncover actionable insights, translating complex data into clear, impactful recommendations for clients and internal stakeholders.
Collaborate with PMG teams and platform partners to optimize campaign performance, offering real-time analysis and subject-matter expertise during client interactions.
Harness PMG’s proprietary technology, Alli, to streamline workflows, analyze performance data, and unlock deeper campaign insights, contributing to its ongoing enhancement.
Take ownership of project timelines and deliverables, ensuring campaigns meet strategic goals and exceed expectations.
Bring a proactive mindset and enthusiasm to each day, inspiring your team and making a meaningful impact on the brands you support.
3+ years of experience in paid social strategy or a related field, with a bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience.
Intermediate expertise in Paid Social and Content Marketing to craft, execute, and optimize impactful campaigns.
Foundational knowledge of Marketing Metrics and Marketing Planning & Analysis to drive data-informed strategies and recommendations.
Proficiency in social media platforms such as Meta, TikTok, Pinterest, Snap, and LinkedIn to set up, traffic, and manage campaigns.
Familiarity with tools like Google Analytics, Microsoft Excel, and SQL to analyze data and deliver clear, actionable performance insights.
Strong organizational and collaboration skills, enabling seamless alignment with internal teams and external stakeholders.
An analytical mindset, paired with a proactive approach to uncovering insights, testing strategies, and driving continuous improvements.

A commitment to curiosity and adaptability as a Continual Learner, staying at the forefront of media innovation while prioritizing client success with a Customer-Focused mindset that seeks opportunities to deliver meaningful value.
A dedication to People-Focused leadership, fostering collaboration, innovation, and professional growth by Leading by Example and nurturing strong relationships that empower others to excel.
Professional Development: Take advantage of our learning and development programs, mentorship opportunities, and career advancement support.
Generous Time Off: Enjoy generous paid time off and holiday allowances to recharge and spend time with loved ones.
Parental Leave: We provide paid parental leave to support your family during important life events.
Retirement & Pension Plans: Plan for your future with competitive retirement or pension programs, including contribution matching.
Fertility and Family Support: Access fertility benefits for all team members and their spouses.
Healthcare: Coverage and support for everyday medical expenses and routine care, tailored by geography.

description:
About the job

We are PMG

Named Ad Age Best Places to Work for 11 years in a row and Fast Company Best Workplaces for Innovators since 2022, PMG is a global independent marketing services and technology company that seeks to inspire people and brands that anything is possible. Driven by shared success, PMG leverages business strategy and transformation, creative, media, and insights—as well as its proprietary operating system, Alli—to deliver cutting-edge digital solutions and innovative media strategies.

Our team comprises over 900 employees globally, and our work for ambitious brands like Apple, Nike, Sephora, Experian, Therabody, Best Western Hotels & Resorts, Creed Fragrances, BNY, Intuit, CKE Restaurants, Travelex, and Whole Foods spans 85+ countries.

Professional proficiency in written and spoken English is required, including for resume submission and interviews.

Who You Will Be Working With

Join a team of innovative thinkers and collaborative problem-solvers who are passionate about the ever-evolving world of paid social media. Our Social team is dynamic, supportive, and dedicated to helping our clients achieve extraordinary results. You’ll work closely with strategists, creatives, data analysts, and technologists to craft campaigns that make a tangible impact on some of the most exciting brands in the industry.

We believe in fostering a culture where every team member feels valued, empowered, and inspired to bring their unique talents to the table. At PMG, your voice will be heard, your ideas embraced, and your growth supported every step of the way. If you’re looking for a role that blends cutting-edge innovation with meaningful collaboration, we’d love to welcome you to our team.

What You Will Do


Shape and execute paid social strategies that align with client objectives, overseeing budget allocation, media planning, reporting, and forecasting in partnership with cross-functional teams. 
Manage the setup and trafficking of campaigns across platforms like Meta, TikTok, Pinterest, Snap, and LinkedIn, ensuring best practices and precision in execution. 
Develop and implement testing frameworks to uncover actionable insights, translating complex data into clear, impactful recommendations for clients and internal stakeholders. 
Collaborate with PMG teams and platform partners to optimize campaign performance, offering real-time analysis and subject-matter expertise during client interactions. 
Harness PMG’s proprietary technology, Alli, to streamline workflows, analyze performance data, and unlock deeper campaign insights, contributing to its ongoing enhancement. 
Take ownership of project timelines and deliverables, ensuring campaigns meet strategic goals and exceed expectations. 
Bring a proactive mindset and enthusiasm to each day, inspiring your team and making a meaningful impact on the brands you support. 


What You Will Bring


3+ years of experience in paid social strategy or a related field, with a bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience. 
Intermediate expertise in Paid Social and Content Marketing to craft, execute, and optimize impactful campaigns. 
Foundational knowledge of Marketing Metrics and Marketing Planning & Analysis to drive data-informed strategies and recommendations. 
Proficiency in social media platforms such as Meta, TikTok, Pinterest, Snap, and LinkedIn to set up, traffic, and manage campaigns. 
Familiarity with tools like Google Analytics, Microsoft Excel, and SQL to analyze data and deliver clear, actionable performance insights. 
Strong organizational and collaboration skills, enabling seamless alignment with internal teams and external stakeholders. 
An analytical mindset, paired with a proactive approach to uncovering insights, testing strategies, and driving continuous improvements. 
A commitment to curiosity and adaptability as a Continual Learner, staying at the forefront of media innovation while prioritizing client success with a Customer-Focused mindset that seeks opportunities to deliver meaningful value. 
A dedication to People-Focused leadership, fostering collaboration, innovation, and professional growth by Leading by Example and nurturing strong relationships that empower others to excel. 


What We Offer


Professional Development: Take advantage of our learning and development programs, mentorship opportunities, and career advancement support. 
Generous Time Off: Enjoy generous paid time off and holiday allowances to recharge and spend time with loved ones. 
Parental Leave: We provide paid parental leave to support your family during important life events. 
Retirement & Pension Plans: Plan for your future with competitive retirement or pension programs, including contribution matching. 
Fertility and Family Support: Access fertility benefits for all team members and their spouses. 
Healthcare: Coverage and support for everyday medical expenses and routine care, tailored by geography. 
Pet Insurance: Protect your pet's health and your finances. 
Lifestyle Spending Accounts: Enjoy 100% company-funded accounts to promote healthy habits and well-being. 
Commuter Benefits: Access support for travel and commuting needs, where available. 
Annual Bonus: All employees are eligible for an annual bonus. 
Volunteering Opportunities: Receive 8 give-back hours to volunteer in your local communities. 
AI Enterprise License: Access AI Enterprise accounts and participate in weekly AI training sessions to empower and ensure AI safety. 


Benefits vary by country, location, and geography to reflect local laws, norms, and expectations.

What Sets Us Apart

Being part of PMG means joining a company culture that’s unmatched in digital. We're dedicated to working hard to serve our employees and clients, delivering value, results, and innovation—which often requires true grit and agility. We believe in taking care of ourselves and each other to continuously improve in every way.

In alignment with our core values to be inclusive and always change for the better, PMG is committed to creating a more diverse and inclusive culture, and we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We believe that we only change for the better by bringing diverse perspectives to our company. PMG recruits, employs, trains, compensates, and promotes regardless of race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status.

title: Marketing & Content Creation Specialist
skills: Creative and Long Form Content Higher Effort
Editing long form YouTube videos ranging from ten to twenty minutes using raw family style footage such as outdoor activities, trips, and daily life moments.
Combining multiple video clips, photos, and audio into cohesive and engaging stories.
Making creative decisions related to clip selection, pacing, music using royalty free sources only, transitions, and overall story flow.
Repurposing long form videos into short form content for platforms such as YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram Reels.
Understanding that YouTube's growth strategy differs significantly from TikTok and Instagram, and adjusting editing style and structure accordingly.
Professional and Compliance Focused Content Lower Creativity Higher Precision
Light editing and formatting of healthcare related videos such as product demonstrations and therapy tools.
Managing posting and scheduling across Facebook, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and creator or affiliate platforms.
Publishing clinician spotlights, company updates, educational posts, clinic events, therapy activities, and patient success stories.
Creating or refining simple educational graphics and infographics using provided content.
Ensuring a professional tone, brand consistency, patient privacy, and compliance with healthcare data protection standards.
Video Editing: Execute high-quality edits for both long-form (YouTube/Webinars) and short-form (Reels/TikTok/Shorts) content.
Optimization: Apply platform-specific formatting, captions, and technical SEO to maximize reach.
Social Media Operations: Manage the end-to-end posting process, including scheduling and caption implementation across all platforms.
Digital Asset Management: Maintain a highly organized filing system via Google Drive and shared folders for easy retrieval.
Performance Tracking: Monitor and report on core KPIs, including views, engagement rates, and follower growth.
Confidentiality: Maintaining the "Fort Knox" integrity of sensitive healthcare and family data.
Accuracy: Ensuring provided compliance guidance is followed to the letter during the editing process.
Efficiency: Streamlining the workflow from raw footage to scheduled post.

Video Editing Mastery: Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve. You must be capable of handling complex long-form YouTube edits (storytelling, pacing, audio leveling) in addition to high-energy short-form clips.
Platform IQ: A deep understanding of the technical differences between YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram, specifically regarding audience retention and platform-specific algorithms.
Precision & Context: High-level English comprehension to ensure captions are 100% accurate and medical/professional context is preserved.
Operational Discipline:
Strong self-management skills with the ability to meet deadlines under minimal supervision.
Willingness to utilize Hubstaff for transparent time-tracking and productivity.
U.S. Market Experience: Prior experience working with U.S.-based clients or creators.
Niche Familiarity: Background in Healthcare, Wellness, or Professional Services (understanding the tone and "feel" of high-compliance industries).
description:
About the job

📽️ WATCH THIS QUICK LOOM VIDEO ON HOW TO GET HIRED: https://www.loom.com/share/345f776084e642ba99c24aabe40a67a0

🇬🇧 C1 ENGLISH LEVEL IS REQUIRED. THE SELECTED CANDIDATE WILL BE SPEAKING STRICTLY IN ENGLISH DURING THEIR ENTIRE SHIFT.

🎤 PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND AUDIO RECORDING IN ENGLISH.




🚀 JOB TITLE: Marketing & Content Creation Specialist

🆔 JOB ID: KAYKYL1R

🏭 INDUSTRY: Marketing / Content Creation

📍 LOCATION: LATAM / PH / South Africa / Egypt

💼 JOB STATUS: Full Time

🕒 WORK SCHEDULE: Flexible Schedule with Mandatory Overlap 1–2 Times per Week for Strategy Calls

💵 SALARY: $8 – $10 USD per hour

📅 TARGET START DATE: ASAP

⚠️ PLEASE NOTE: This role requires a highly independent and creative content professional who can transform raw content into polished, publish-ready media with minimal supervision. We are looking for someone who thrives in both creative storytelling and process-driven execution while maintaining exceptional attention to detail and confidentiality.

ROLE OVERVIEW

About the Client:




Our client is a U.S.-based organization that provides physical, occupational, and speech therapy services, primarily serving senior living and retirement communities. Alongside their healthcare business, the founders also operate a personal creator brand focused on family life, outdoor adventures, and long-form storytelling through digital media platforms.

This position supports both sides of the business, each with distinct audiences, objectives, and content requirements. The ideal candidate must be able to adapt communication styles, creative approaches, and execution strategies accordingly.

About the Role:




We are seeking a full-time Marketing & Content Creation Specialist with strong video editing, content management, and social media execution experience.

This role is ideal for someone who can independently manage deliverables, organize content workflows, and transform provided footage, images, and written materials into engaging, high-quality content without constant oversight.

This is not an on-camera role and does not involve clinical or administrative responsibilities. Instead, your primary focus will be content production, platform management, organization, and performance tracking.




Two Distinct Content Streams Critical to This Role

Creative and Long Form Content Higher Effort

This portion of the role is more time consuming and highly creative.

Responsibilities include:

Editing long form YouTube videos ranging from ten to twenty minutes using raw family style footage such as outdoor activities, trips, and daily life moments.
Combining multiple video clips, photos, and audio into cohesive and engaging stories.
Making creative decisions related to clip selection, pacing, music using royalty free sources only, transitions, and overall story flow.
Repurposing long form videos into short form content for platforms such as YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram Reels.
Understanding that YouTube's growth strategy differs significantly from TikTok and Instagram, and adjusting editing style and structure accordingly.
Professional and Compliance Focused Content Lower Creativity Higher Precision

This portion of the role is more structured and process driven.

Responsibilities include:

Light editing and formatting of healthcare related videos such as product demonstrations and therapy tools.
Managing posting and scheduling across Facebook, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and creator or affiliate platforms.
Publishing clinician spotlights, company updates, educational posts, clinic events, therapy activities, and patient success stories.
Creating or refining simple educational graphics and infographics using provided content.
Ensuring a professional tone, brand consistency, patient privacy, and compliance with healthcare data protection standards.

Most of this content will be provided or clearly outlined. The focus of the role is execution, refinement, accuracy, and consistency.

Key Responsibilities

1. Content Production & Editing

Video Editing: Execute high-quality edits for both long-form (YouTube/Webinars) and short-form (Reels/TikTok/Shorts) content.
Optimization: Apply platform-specific formatting, captions, and technical SEO to maximize reach.

2. Distribution & Management

Social Media Operations: Manage the end-to-end posting process, including scheduling and caption implementation across all platforms.
Digital Asset Management: Maintain a highly organized filing system via Google Drive and shared folders for easy retrieval.

3. Analytics & Reporting

Performance Tracking: Monitor and report on core KPIs, including views, engagement rates, and follower growth.

Role Scope & Boundaries (Non-Negotiable)

Operational Status: This is an Execution-Only role. The Editor acts as the technical hands of the brand, not the clinical or strategic voice.

Core Expectations

Confidentiality: Maintaining the "Fort Knox" integrity of sensitive healthcare and family data.
Accuracy: Ensuring provided compliance guidance is followed to the letter during the editing process.
Efficiency: Streamlining the workflow from raw footage to scheduled post.

Qualifications & Skills

Core Competencies (Must-Have)

Video Editing Mastery: Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve. You must be capable of handling complex long-form YouTube edits (storytelling, pacing, audio leveling) in addition to high-energy short-form clips.
Platform IQ: A deep understanding of the technical differences between YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram, specifically regarding audience retention and platform-specific algorithms.
Precision & Context: High-level English comprehension to ensure captions are 100% accurate and medical/professional context is preserved.
Operational Discipline:
Strong self-management skills with the ability to meet deadlines under minimal supervision.
Willingness to utilize Hubstaff for transparent time-tracking and productivity.










Experience & "Bonus" Assets (Preferred)

U.S. Market Experience: Prior experience working with U.S.-based clients or creators.
Niche Familiarity: Background in Healthcare, Wellness, or Professional Services (understanding the tone and "feel" of high-compliance industries).

Affiliate Ecosystems: Familiarity with Amazon Creator or other affiliate marketing platforms is a significant plus.

WHY JOIN?

Creative Variety:

Work across both a professional healthcare organization and an engaging lifestyle creator brand

High Ownership Role:

Take ownership of content production and become a trusted extension of the business

Long-Term Opportunity:

Join a growing organization seeking a reliable long-term team member

Flexible Work Environment:

Enjoy a flexible schedule while collaborating directly with founders and decision-makers

✨ Join a growing network of exceptional remote professionals

📩 Submit your application today and take the next step in your career!

title: Marketing Specialist

Monitoring Tools: Open to using monitoring tools like Hubstaff.

description:
About the job

Descripción Empresa

El Puerto de Liverpool es la empresa líder en tiendas departamentales en México. CON MÁS DE 170 AÑOS EN EL MERCADO, nos dedicamos a facilitar la selección de productos y brindarles el mejor servicio a las familias mexicanas, esperando superar las expectativas de calidad, moda, valor y atención dentro de un ambiente agradable.

Contamos con cinco unidades de negocio: Tiendas Liverpool, Tiendas Suburbia, Centros Comerciales Galerías, Boutiques y Negocios Financieros, componiendo una empresa sólida, que ofrece a sus colaboradores estabilidad financiera y el orgullo de pertenecer a una EMPRESA 100% MEXICANA.

NUESTRA MISIÓN ES SERVIR AL CLIENTE EN TODO LUGAR, TODOS LOS DÍAS, TODA LA VIDA, nuestra visión es ser la mejor opción en servicio, surtido y valor. Nuestros valores nos guían hacia el trabajo en equipo, productividad, innovación e integridad.

Misión Del Cargo

Apoyar y Liderar A la Gerencia de Brand Marketing en planeación, ejecución y seguimiento de estrategia de marca para los socios comerciales.

Funciones Del Cargo


 Apoyar la ejecución de iniciativas de Brand Marketing en todas las etapas del funnel (upper, middle y lower), dirigidas a clientes mayoristas y tiendas departamentales clave como Liverpool, Palacio de Hierro, Sears y Coppel. El objetivo es asegurar el posicionamiento correcto de la marca y la alineación entre mensajes, audiencias y canales, impactando en revenue, GM, EBIT, leads, conversión, consideración y ROI.
 Crear y colaborar en la adaptación local de campañas globales y en el desarrollo de PDP para cuentas clave, ajustando mensajes y SKUs según prioridades comerciales y necesidades de cada cadena. Se da seguimiento a entregables creativos, shootings y campañas de e-commerce para garantizar visibilidad, awareness y posicionamiento de la marca, contribuyendo a revenue, GM, EBIT, leads, conversión, consideración y ROI.
 Gestionar presupuestos y coordinar campañas de temporada, lanzamientos y colaboraciones, alineando planes de marketing (GTM) con briefs creativos y de medios. Implica coordinar agencias y entregables, además de implementar estrategias multicanal (POP, emailing, OOH, BTL) para fortalecer la visibilidad de la marca, siempre dentro de los presupuestos asignados, con impacto en revenue, GM, EBIT, leads, conversión, consideración y ROI.
 Colaborar con equipos de Brand Marketing, BE, Wholesale, Retail, Digital, VM y PR para asegurar que las campañas se adapten a canales tradicionales y digitales según las necesidades de la marca y clientes. Esta coordinación garantiza un posicionamiento adecuado y el uso eficiente de presupuestos de inversión (COOP del A&P budget), generando resultados en revenue, GM, EBIT, leads, conversión, consideración y ROI.


Requisitos


Lic. Marketing, Publicidad Comunicación, Administración o afín
2 a 3 años en negociación con clientes, manejo de ppto, entendimiento de un P&L
SAP básico: órdenes de compra, ppto, autorización de órdenes de compra etc.
Inglés B2-C1 INDISPENSABLE (Se aplica prueba de speaking)
Excel Intermedio: Manejo de base de datos, para llevar el ppto, formulas, tablas dinámicas.


Beneficios

Condiciones oferta:


 Seguro médico
 Capacitaciones y cursos
 Seguro médico
 Descuentos en productos
 Vales de despensa
 Horario flexible
 Día de cumpleaños
 Vacaciones extras


Descripción Proceso De Selección

Para participar necesitas:


 Postular a la oferta en el link
 Revisar tu mail y confirmar tu cuenta
 Ingresar a AIRA y contestar las preguntas y/o pruebas solicitadas


Si tu perfil se ajusta a lo que estamos buscando, te contactaremos para continuar con el proceso.

title: Digital Manager
skills: Gestionar la planificación táctica de las campañas de medios (video, social media, display y SEM) desde la recepción del brief hasta la bajada táctica de las campañas.
Asegurar que la planeación este de acuerdo a los requerimientos y temporalidades de cliente.
Validar la actividad de la campaña en las plataformas de implementación
Realizar el análisis de las campañas (métricas) de acuerdo con la temporalidad del plan.
Llevar el control de los presupuestos de campañas digitales.
Realizar el monitoreo de competencia en aspectos digitales.
Desarrollar las cuentas Full Funnel.
Experiencia en elaboración de planes para medios digitales.
Excelente manejo y control de presupuesto.
Plataformas de Google AdWords (video,display y sem).
Plataformas Sociales (bussines manager – twitter ads) / (Tik Tok, Meta, Pinterest, twitter, LinkedIn).
Manejo de Paquetería Office intermedio.
Ingles Avanzado (Indispensable)
Prestaciones superiores a la ley: 30 días de aguinaldo, vales de despensa, fondo de ahorro 13%, SGMM, Seguro de vida, días de vacaciones superiores a la ley,
Equipo de cómputo
Modalidad de trabajo híbrida
Contratación directa (100% nómina).
description:
About the job

OMD is the world's leading media agency and a trusted transformation partner to top brands. Currently ranked number one across the board by industry-leading bodies, OMD delivers differentiated capabilities in digital, data, and technology, delivered by the world’s best talent – at scale.

Nuestra búsqueda constante de mejorar en lo que hacemos comienza contactando con personas como tú.

OMG, te invita a unirte a nuestro equipo como: Digital Manager

¿Cuáles son las principales actividades?


Gestionar la planificación táctica de las campañas de medios (video, social media, display y SEM) desde la recepción del brief hasta la bajada táctica de las campañas.
Asegurar que la planeación este de acuerdo a los requerimientos y temporalidades de cliente.
Validar la actividad de la campaña en las plataformas de implementación
Realizar el análisis de las campañas (métricas) de acuerdo con la temporalidad del plan.
Llevar el control de los presupuestos de campañas digitales.
Realizar el monitoreo de competencia en aspectos digitales.
Desarrollar las cuentas Full Funnel.


¿Qué buscamos?


Experiencia en elaboración de planes para medios digitales.
Excelente manejo y control de presupuesto.
Plataformas de Google AdWords (video,display y sem).
Plataformas Sociales (bussines manager – twitter ads) / (Tik Tok, Meta, Pinterest, twitter, LinkedIn).
Manejo de Paquetería Office intermedio.
Ingles Avanzado (Indispensable)


¿Qué ofrecemos?


Prestaciones superiores a la ley: 30 días de aguinaldo, vales de despensa, fondo de ahorro 13%, SGMM, Seguro de vida, días de vacaciones superiores a la ley, 
Equipo de cómputo
Modalidad de trabajo híbrida
Contratación directa (100% nómina).


Si cumples con el perfil y quieres formar parte de la mejor agencia de medios, postúlate por este medio ¡Nos encantaría tenerte en nuestro equipo!

En OMG NO discriminamos por razón de raza, origen étnico, edad, sexo, género, estado civil, ideología, opiniones políticas, nacionalidad, religión, orientación sexual, identidad o expresión de género o cualquier otra condición personal, física o social. A través de ello, construimos una cultura incluyente, de respeto y diversa.

Recruitment Privacy Notices - Omnicom Media Group

title: Performance Marketing Specialist (Part-Time)
skills: Plan, manage, and optimize paid media campaigns across Meta Ads and Google Ads to drive qualified lead generation and improve ROI.
Execute ongoing campaign testing across audiences, creatives, bidding strategies, and landing pages to continuously improve performance.
Monitor and analyze campaign performance data, translating insights into actionable recommendations for optimization and growth.
Maintain accurate tracking and attribution systems using tools such as GA4, Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel, and related conversion tracking platforms.
Ensure seamless flow of marketing data into CRM and marketing automation systems for accurate reporting and lead management.
Support SEO initiatives by contributing to on-page optimization and identifying opportunities for organic growth improvements.
Develop and deliver monthly performance reports, highlighting key metrics, insights, and optimization opportunities.
Identify trends, competitor movements, and emerging opportunities in digital marketing to inform campaign strategy.
Collaborate with stakeholders to improve messaging, creative direction, and conversion-focused strategies across campaigns.
Continuously optimize conversion rates and campaign efficiency across all digital channels.
Minimum 2+ years of hands-on experience managing and optimizing paid media campaigns.
Strong expertise in Meta Ads Manager and Google Ads, with proven ability to drive performance outcomes.
Solid working knowledge of Google Tag Manager (GTM), Google Analytics 4 (GA4), Meta Pixel, and conversion tracking systems.
Experience working with CRM platforms, marketing automation tools, and lead generation workflows.
Strong understanding of performance marketing fundamentals including attribution, funnel optimization, and ROI measurement.
Ability to analyze campaign data and translate insights into clear, actionable recommendations.
Strong communication skills with the ability to collaborate effectively with internal and external stakeholders.
Ability to work independently, manage priorities, and thrive in a remote, fast-paced environment.
Nice to have: exposure to SEO, landing page optimization, and multi-channel attribution models.
Fully remote work setup with flexible working arrangements (part-time schedule).
Work-from-home support including company-provided equipment and connectivity assistance.
Exposure to international clients and global marketing environments.
Flexible work-life balance with a structured part-time schedule.
Opportunities for ongoing learning, professional development, and skill growth.
Collaborative, people-first culture that values autonomy and accountability.
Employee engagement activities, both virtual and in-person events.
Opportunity to directly impact campaign performance and measurable business growth.
description:
About the job

This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Performance Marketing Specialist (Part-Time) based in Mexico.

This is a hands-on, data-driven digital marketing role focused on driving measurable growth across paid media channels. You will be responsible for optimizing performance campaigns across Meta and Google Ads, turning insights into actionable improvements that directly impact lead generation and conversion outcomes. The role blends campaign execution, analytics, and experimentation, requiring a strong focus on ROI, attribution accuracy, and continuous optimization. You will also support tracking infrastructure using tools such as GA4 and Google Tag Manager to ensure clean, reliable marketing data. Working in a remote-first and collaborative environment, you will contribute to both strategic and tactical marketing decisions. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys solving performance puzzles, testing ideas quickly, and seeing clear business impact from their work. It offers the opportunity to work across global clients while shaping scalable digital growth strategies.

Accountabilities


Plan, manage, and optimize paid media campaigns across Meta Ads and Google Ads to drive qualified lead generation and improve ROI.
Execute ongoing campaign testing across audiences, creatives, bidding strategies, and landing pages to continuously improve performance.
Monitor and analyze campaign performance data, translating insights into actionable recommendations for optimization and growth.
Maintain accurate tracking and attribution systems using tools such as GA4, Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel, and related conversion tracking platforms.
Ensure seamless flow of marketing data into CRM and marketing automation systems for accurate reporting and lead management.
Support SEO initiatives by contributing to on-page optimization and identifying opportunities for organic growth improvements.
Develop and deliver monthly performance reports, highlighting key metrics, insights, and optimization opportunities.
Identify trends, competitor movements, and emerging opportunities in digital marketing to inform campaign strategy.
Collaborate with stakeholders to improve messaging, creative direction, and conversion-focused strategies across campaigns.
Continuously optimize conversion rates and campaign efficiency across all digital channels.


Requirements


Minimum 2+ years of hands-on experience managing and optimizing paid media campaigns.
Strong expertise in Meta Ads Manager and Google Ads, with proven ability to drive performance outcomes.
Solid working knowledge of Google Tag Manager (GTM), Google Analytics 4 (GA4), Meta Pixel, and conversion tracking systems.
Experience working with CRM platforms, marketing automation tools, and lead generation workflows.
Strong understanding of performance marketing fundamentals including attribution, funnel optimization, and ROI measurement.
Ability to analyze campaign data and translate insights into clear, actionable recommendations.
Strong communication skills with the ability to collaborate effectively with internal and external stakeholders.
Ability to work independently, manage priorities, and thrive in a remote, fast-paced environment.
Nice to have: exposure to SEO, landing page optimization, and multi-channel attribution models.


Benefits


Fully remote work setup with flexible working arrangements (part-time schedule).
Work-from-home support including company-provided equipment and connectivity assistance.
Exposure to international clients and global marketing environments.
Flexible work-life balance with a structured part-time schedule.
Opportunities for ongoing learning, professional development, and skill growth.
Collaborative, people-first culture that values autonomy and accountability.
Employee engagement activities, both virtual and in-person events.
Opportunity to directly impact campaign performance and measurable business growth.


How Jobgether Works

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

 Why Apply Through Jobgether?

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Softlines Category Manager, Consumer Products Mexico
skills: Lead the Softlines & Stationery commercial strategy for Mexico & NOLA, translating Netflix’s global and regional franchise priorities into locally relevant category plans.

Drive sustainable revenue growth by identifying category opportunities, building commercial plans, and scaling high-potential partnerships across apparel, accessories, bags, footwear, stationery, back-to-school, and adjacent lifestyle categories.

Build and evolve a best-in-class licensee portfolio, ensuring each partner has a clear strategic role, strong execution capability, and the potential to grow with Netflix’s long-term franchise ambitions.
Own senior-level partner relationships, engaging key decision-makers with a clear point of view, strong business acumen, and the ability to influence commercial outcomes.
Lead commercial negotiations and partner development, from prospecting and pitching to onboarding, deal execution, category expansion, and long-term account growth.

Shape title and franchise commercialization plans for Softlines & Stationery, identifying white spaces, priority partners, launch moments, and product opportunities that can extend fan engagement beyond the screen.

Partner with Product Development & Creative to bring best-in-class products to market, ensuring commercial opportunities are creatively aligned, consumer-relevant, high quality, and reflective of Netflix’s brand standards.

Use business insights and market intelligence to guide category decisions, including partner performance, consumer trends, retail dynamics, sell-through, forecasts, royalties, and competitive activity.
Represent the category in key internal, external, and industry moments, including partner meetings, business reviews, planning sessions, trade shows, and cross-functional forums.

Operate as a senior commercial owner within the CP Mexico & NOLA team, creating clarity, driving alignment, making sound decisions, and contributing to a high-performing, collaborative, and Netflix-first culture.
8+ years of experience in licensing, business development, strategic partnerships, sales, category management, or brand management.
Experience in entertainment, consumer products, fashion, lifestyle, retail, or adjacent categories strongly preferred.
Strong understanding of the Mexican Softlines market; experience across Northern Latin America is a plus.
Proven ability to manage external partners, negotiate commercial opportunities, and drive business growth.
Strong commercial judgment, with the ability to assess partner potential, category opportunities, business risks, and long-term strategic fit.
Ability to operate with autonomy, urgency, ownership, and strong follow-through in a fast-moving environment.
Excellent communication, presentation, and relationship-building skills, with the ability to influence senior internal and external stakeholders.
Experience working cross-functionally in a matrixed environment across creative, commercial, legal, finance, retail, marketing, franchise, and product development teams.
Strong analytical and organizational skills, with comfort working on forecasts, revenue targets, royalties, partner performance, sell-through, category planning, and business reviews.
Fluent in Spanish and English.
description:
About the job

Netflix is one of the world's leading entertainment services, with over 300 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, films and games across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time.

About The Role.

That’s where you come in. We are seeking a commercially driven and strategically minded Consumer Products Manager to lead Softlines and Stationery for Mexico and Northern Latin America (NOLA). This role will own the commercial licensing strategy and partner agenda across apparel, accessories, bags, footwear, stationery, back-to-school, and other relevant lifestyle categories.

This role reports directly to the Senior Manager, Consumer Products Mexico & NOLA, and will be a critical commercial leader for the territory. The Manager will own the Softlines & Stationery licensing strategy, build and manage a strong licensee portfolio, drive revenue growth, and ensure local activation of global and regional priorities to support Netflix titles and franchises.

The business requires a leader who can operate with autonomy, sound judgment, and end-to-end ownership. The ideal candidate will be able to identify white spaces, lead commercial negotiations, manage senior licensee relationships, hold partners accountable, and drive disciplined execution across multiple partners and priorities.

The role will work in close partnership with Product Development & Creative, Retail, Marketing, Ads, Brand Partnerships, Legal, Finance, Franchise, and regional/global Consumer Products teams.

As Mexico and NOLA continue to grow in commercial complexity, this role will be essential to raising the bar and the person in this role must be able to operate as an Informed Captain: creating context, anticipating risks, making decisions, driving alignment, and keeping the business moving without requiring close follow-up.

Key Responsibilities


Lead the Softlines & Stationery commercial strategy for Mexico & NOLA, translating Netflix’s global and regional franchise priorities into locally relevant category plans.
Drive sustainable revenue growth by identifying category opportunities, building commercial plans, and scaling high-potential partnerships across apparel, accessories, bags, footwear, stationery, back-to-school, and adjacent lifestyle categories.
Build and evolve a best-in-class licensee portfolio, ensuring each partner has a clear strategic role, strong execution capability, and the potential to grow with Netflix’s long-term franchise ambitions.
Own senior-level partner relationships, engaging key decision-makers with a clear point of view, strong business acumen, and the ability to influence commercial outcomes.
Lead commercial negotiations and partner development, from prospecting and pitching to onboarding, deal execution, category expansion, and long-term account growth.
Shape title and franchise commercialization plans for Softlines & Stationery, identifying white spaces, priority partners, launch moments, and product opportunities that can extend fan engagement beyond the screen.
Partner with Product Development & Creative to bring best-in-class products to market, ensuring commercial opportunities are creatively aligned, consumer-relevant, high quality, and reflective of Netflix’s brand standards.
Use business insights and market intelligence to guide category decisions, including partner performance, consumer trends, retail dynamics, sell-through, forecasts, royalties, and competitive activity.
Represent the category in key internal, external, and industry moments, including partner meetings, business reviews, planning sessions, trade shows, and cross-functional forums.
Operate as a senior commercial owner within the CP Mexico & NOLA team, creating clarity, driving alignment, making sound decisions, and contributing to a high-performing, collaborative, and Netflix-first culture.


Qualifications


8+ years of experience in licensing, business development, strategic partnerships, sales, category management, or brand management.
Experience in entertainment, consumer products, fashion, lifestyle, retail, or adjacent categories strongly preferred.
Strong understanding of the Mexican Softlines market; experience across Northern Latin America is a plus.
Proven ability to manage external partners, negotiate commercial opportunities, and drive business growth.
Strong commercial judgment, with the ability to assess partner potential, category opportunities, business risks, and long-term strategic fit.
Ability to operate with autonomy, urgency, ownership, and strong follow-through in a fast-moving environment.
Excellent communication, presentation, and relationship-building skills, with the ability to influence senior internal and external stakeholders.
Experience working cross-functionally in a matrixed environment across creative, commercial, legal, finance, retail, marketing, franchise, and product development teams.
Strong analytical and organizational skills, with comfort working on forecasts, revenue targets, royalties, partner performance, sell-through, category planning, and business reviews.
Fluent in Spanish and English.


Inclusion is a Netflix value and we strive to host a meaningful interview experience for all candidates. If you want an accommodation/adjustment for a disability or any other reason during the hiring process, please send a request to your recruiting partner.

We are an equal-opportunity employer and celebrate diversity, recognizing that diversity builds stronger teams. We approach diversity and inclusion seriously and thoughtfully. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, ancestry, national origin, caste, sex, sexual orientation, gender, gender identity or expression, age, disability, medical condition, pregnancy, genetic makeup, marital status, or military service.
