title: Junior Media Buyer for a US Performance Marketing Agency (Remote)
skills: Building, launching, and managing Meta campaigns (CBO/ABO structures, audiences, placements, creative testing).
Supporting and growing into independent buying on AppLovin / Axon.
Monitoring daily performance and flagging scaling opportunities, underperformers, and anomalies.
Running structured creative and audience tests, and documenting the results.
Pulling, organizing, and interpreting performance data to inform decisions, and producing clear weekly client reports.
Analyzing creative performance using soft metrics (CTR, CPM, CPC), benchmarking against account averages, and clearly communicating those reads to strategists and clients.
Helping maintain clean account hygiene, naming conventions, and tracking.
0-2 years of hands-on paid media experience (internships, freelance, or running your own / your brand's ads all count).
Clear written communication in English.
Genuine fluency with Meta Ads Manager — you've built campaigns, not just read about them.
Strong numerical sense; comfortable living in spreadsheets and dashboards.
A direct-response mindset: you care about CPA, ROAS, and contribution margin, not vanity metrics.
Familiarity with DTC e-commerce, Shopify, and the fashion/beauty/lifestyle space.
Working knowledge of tracking and attribution tools (pixels, CAPI, ClickFlare, GA4, etc.).
Comfortable staying responsive when accounts demand it, including the occasional evening or weekend during launches or scaling pushes.
Availability during key EST windows to analyze performance and take action (scale, kill, pull back, etc.).
Experience with AdManage (strongly preferred).
Hands-on time with AppLovin / Axon or other programmatic / native platforms.
Basic understanding of creative.
Competitive base salary.
Fully remote, full-time contractor role.
Learn direct-response media buying directly from senior operators managing significant spend.
Real ownership early—you won't be stuck pulling reports for a year.
Work across a diverse roster of scaling, fast-growing DTC brands in fashion, beauty, and lifestyle.
A fast-paced team environment that rewards results and fosters growth into a senior media buyer role.
description:
About the job

Paired is a global staffing and recruiting agency that specializes in pairing remote work with top-tier talent!

We are dedicated to connecting talented individuals with remarkable companies in need of their skills. Our goal is to create fulfilling job opportunities for professionals around the world.

Our client:



Looking for a Junior Media Buyer who wants to learn the performance marketing craft properly. This is a hands-in-the-account role from day one for someone obsessed with what makes an ad account scale profitably, not just spend. You will work hand-in-hand with senior buyers to plan, launch, and optimize paid campaigns primarily on Meta, with growing responsibility on AppLovin / Axon.

You don't need years of experience, but you do need sharp instincts, comfort with numbers, and the drive to get great at this fast. You'll be building campaigns, reading data, spotting what's working, and learning to make confident scale/kill decisions across a portfolio of fast-growing DTC e-commerce brands.

This is a high-performance environment built for hungry, ambitious people who take real ownership of their accounts and treat client budgets like their own.

You'll be responsible for


Building, launching, and managing Meta campaigns (CBO/ABO structures, audiences, placements, creative testing).
Supporting and growing into independent buying on AppLovin / Axon.
Monitoring daily performance and flagging scaling opportunities, underperformers, and anomalies.
Running structured creative and audience tests, and documenting the results.
Pulling, organizing, and interpreting performance data to inform decisions, and producing clear weekly client reports.
Analyzing creative performance using soft metrics (CTR, CPM, CPC), benchmarking against account averages, and clearly communicating those reads to strategists and clients.
Helping maintain clean account hygiene, naming conventions, and tracking.


Requirements


0-2 years of hands-on paid media experience (internships, freelance, or running your own / your brand's ads all count).
Clear written communication in English.
Genuine fluency with Meta Ads Manager — you've built campaigns, not just read about them.
Strong numerical sense; comfortable living in spreadsheets and dashboards.
A direct-response mindset: you care about CPA, ROAS, and contribution margin, not vanity metrics.
Familiarity with DTC e-commerce, Shopify, and the fashion/beauty/lifestyle space.
Working knowledge of tracking and attribution tools (pixels, CAPI, ClickFlare, GA4, etc.).
Comfortable staying responsive when accounts demand it, including the occasional evening or weekend during launches or scaling pushes.
Availability during key EST windows to analyze performance and take action (scale, kill, pull back, etc.).
Nice to have


Experience with AdManage (strongly preferred).
Hands-on time with AppLovin / Axon or other programmatic / native platforms.
Basic understanding of creative.


Benefits


Competitive base salary.
Fully remote, full-time contractor role.
Learn direct-response media buying directly from senior operators managing significant spend.
Real ownership early—you won't be stuck pulling reports for a year.
Work across a diverse roster of scaling, fast-growing DTC brands in fashion, beauty, and lifestyle.
A fast-paced team environment that rewards results and fosters growth into a senior media buyer role.

title: Marketing & Content Creation Specialist
skills: Creative and Long Form Content Higher Effort
Editing long form YouTube videos ranging from ten to twenty minutes using raw family style footage such as outdoor activities, trips, and daily life moments.
Combining multiple video clips, photos, and audio into cohesive and engaging stories.
Making creative decisions related to clip selection, pacing, music using royalty free sources only, transitions, and overall story flow.
Repurposing long form videos into short form content for platforms such as YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram Reels.
Understanding that YouTube's growth strategy differs significantly from TikTok and Instagram, and adjusting editing style and structure accordingly.
Professional and Compliance Focused Content Lower Creativity Higher Precision
Light editing and formatting of healthcare related videos such as product demonstrations and therapy tools.
Managing posting and scheduling across Facebook, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and creator or affiliate platforms.
Publishing clinician spotlights, company updates, educational posts, clinic events, therapy activities, and patient success stories.
Creating or refining simple educational graphics and infographics using provided content.
Ensuring a professional tone, brand consistency, patient privacy, and compliance with healthcare data protection standards.
Video Editing: Execute high-quality edits for both long-form (YouTube/Webinars) and short-form (Reels/TikTok/Shorts) content.
Optimization: Apply platform-specific formatting, captions, and technical SEO to maximize reach.
Social Media Operations: Manage the end-to-end posting process, including scheduling and caption implementation across all platforms.
Digital Asset Management: Maintain a highly organized filing system via Google Drive and shared folders for easy retrieval.
Performance Tracking: Monitor and report on core KPIs, including views, engagement rates, and follower growth.
Confidentiality: Maintaining the "Fort Knox" integrity of sensitive healthcare and family data.
Accuracy: Ensuring provided compliance guidance is followed to the letter during the editing process.
Efficiency: Streamlining the workflow from raw footage to scheduled post.

Video Editing Mastery: Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve. You must be capable of handling complex long-form YouTube edits (storytelling, pacing, audio leveling) in addition to high-energy short-form clips.
Platform IQ: A deep understanding of the technical differences between YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram, specifically regarding audience retention and platform-specific algorithms.
Precision & Context: High-level English comprehension to ensure captions are 100% accurate and medical/professional context is preserved.
Operational Discipline:
Strong self-management skills with the ability to meet deadlines under minimal supervision.
Willingness to utilize Hubstaff for transparent time-tracking and productivity.
U.S. Market Experience: Prior experience working with U.S.-based clients or creators.
Niche Familiarity: Background in Healthcare, Wellness, or Professional Services (understanding the tone and "feel" of high-compliance industries).
description:
About the job

📽️ WATCH THIS QUICK LOOM VIDEO ON HOW TO GET HIRED: https://www.loom.com/share/345f776084e642ba99c24aabe40a67a0

🇬🇧 C1 ENGLISH LEVEL IS REQUIRED. THE SELECTED CANDIDATE WILL BE SPEAKING STRICTLY IN ENGLISH DURING THEIR ENTIRE SHIFT.

🎤 PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND AUDIO RECORDING IN ENGLISH.




🚀 JOB TITLE: Marketing & Content Creation Specialist

🆔 JOB ID: KAYKYL1R

🏭 INDUSTRY: Marketing / Content Creation

📍 LOCATION: LATAM / PH / South Africa / Egypt

💼 JOB STATUS: Full Time

🕒 WORK SCHEDULE: Flexible Schedule with Mandatory Overlap 1–2 Times per Week for Strategy Calls

💵 SALARY: $8 – $10 USD per hour

📅 TARGET START DATE: ASAP

⚠️ PLEASE NOTE: This role requires a highly independent and creative content professional who can transform raw content into polished, publish-ready media with minimal supervision. We are looking for someone who thrives in both creative storytelling and process-driven execution while maintaining exceptional attention to detail and confidentiality.

ROLE OVERVIEW

About the Client:




Our client is a U.S.-based organization that provides physical, occupational, and speech therapy services, primarily serving senior living and retirement communities. Alongside their healthcare business, the founders also operate a personal creator brand focused on family life, outdoor adventures, and long-form storytelling through digital media platforms.

This position supports both sides of the business, each with distinct audiences, objectives, and content requirements. The ideal candidate must be able to adapt communication styles, creative approaches, and execution strategies accordingly.

About the Role:




We are seeking a full-time Marketing & Content Creation Specialist with strong video editing, content management, and social media execution experience.

This role is ideal for someone who can independently manage deliverables, organize content workflows, and transform provided footage, images, and written materials into engaging, high-quality content without constant oversight.

This is not an on-camera role and does not involve clinical or administrative responsibilities. Instead, your primary focus will be content production, platform management, organization, and performance tracking.




Two Distinct Content Streams Critical to This Role

Creative and Long Form Content Higher Effort

This portion of the role is more time consuming and highly creative.

Responsibilities include:

Editing long form YouTube videos ranging from ten to twenty minutes using raw family style footage such as outdoor activities, trips, and daily life moments.
Combining multiple video clips, photos, and audio into cohesive and engaging stories.
Making creative decisions related to clip selection, pacing, music using royalty free sources only, transitions, and overall story flow.
Repurposing long form videos into short form content for platforms such as YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram Reels.
Understanding that YouTube's growth strategy differs significantly from TikTok and Instagram, and adjusting editing style and structure accordingly.
Professional and Compliance Focused Content Lower Creativity Higher Precision

This portion of the role is more structured and process driven.

Responsibilities include:

Light editing and formatting of healthcare related videos such as product demonstrations and therapy tools.
Managing posting and scheduling across Facebook, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and creator or affiliate platforms.
Publishing clinician spotlights, company updates, educational posts, clinic events, therapy activities, and patient success stories.
Creating or refining simple educational graphics and infographics using provided content.
Ensuring a professional tone, brand consistency, patient privacy, and compliance with healthcare data protection standards.

Most of this content will be provided or clearly outlined. The focus of the role is execution, refinement, accuracy, and consistency.

Key Responsibilities

1. Content Production & Editing

Video Editing: Execute high-quality edits for both long-form (YouTube/Webinars) and short-form (Reels/TikTok/Shorts) content.
Optimization: Apply platform-specific formatting, captions, and technical SEO to maximize reach.

2. Distribution & Management

Social Media Operations: Manage the end-to-end posting process, including scheduling and caption implementation across all platforms.
Digital Asset Management: Maintain a highly organized filing system via Google Drive and shared folders for easy retrieval.

3. Analytics & Reporting

Performance Tracking: Monitor and report on core KPIs, including views, engagement rates, and follower growth.

Role Scope & Boundaries (Non-Negotiable)

Operational Status: This is an Execution-Only role. The Editor acts as the technical hands of the brand, not the clinical or strategic voice.

Core Expectations

Confidentiality: Maintaining the "Fort Knox" integrity of sensitive healthcare and family data.
Accuracy: Ensuring provided compliance guidance is followed to the letter during the editing process.
Efficiency: Streamlining the workflow from raw footage to scheduled post.

Qualifications & Skills

Core Competencies (Must-Have)

Video Editing Mastery: Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve. You must be capable of handling complex long-form YouTube edits (storytelling, pacing, audio leveling) in addition to high-energy short-form clips.
Platform IQ: A deep understanding of the technical differences between YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram, specifically regarding audience retention and platform-specific algorithms.
Precision & Context: High-level English comprehension to ensure captions are 100% accurate and medical/professional context is preserved.
Operational Discipline:
Strong self-management skills with the ability to meet deadlines under minimal supervision.
Willingness to utilize Hubstaff for transparent time-tracking and productivity.










Experience & "Bonus" Assets (Preferred)

U.S. Market Experience: Prior experience working with U.S.-based clients or creators.
Niche Familiarity: Background in Healthcare, Wellness, or Professional Services (understanding the tone and "feel" of high-compliance industries).

Affiliate Ecosystems: Familiarity with Amazon Creator or other affiliate marketing platforms is a significant plus.

WHY JOIN?

Creative Variety:

Work across both a professional healthcare organization and an engaging lifestyle creator brand

High Ownership Role:

Take ownership of content production and become a trusted extension of the business

Long-Term Opportunity:

Join a growing organization seeking a reliable long-term team member

Flexible Work Environment:

Enjoy a flexible schedule while collaborating directly with founders and decision-makers

✨ Join a growing network of exceptional remote professionals

📩 Submit your application today and take the next step in your career!

description:
About the job

About us:

At Near, we help top talent in Latin America find remote roles with US companies. Our mission is to create better lives by fostering a remote work culture that transcends borders.




About the role:

We're looking for a writer who can produce content that genuinely stands out. Content that ranks, earns citations, builds credibility, and gives readers something they couldn't get from an AI summary.

You'll spend the majority of your time on content: researching and writing articles, contributing to original research reports, and building the kind of assets that attract attention from humans, Google, and LLMs.

You'll also bring solid copywriting skills that come into play on specific assets: emails, landing pages, and occasionally social media posts.

What we're looking for is someone who raises the bar on what we produce. Someone who brings genuine editorial judgment and the instinct to push past consensus answers toward something worth reading.

You'll work in an AI-augmented environment, using Claude and internal workflows to accelerate research and drafting, but strong human judgment is what separates great output from good output here.

📍 100% Remote · LATAM




Are you a performance marketer who understands how paid social and paid search work together across the full customer journey — and wants to grow as a holistic marketer, not just a single-channel specialist? Hawke Media — a leading performance agency featured in Forbes, Entrepreneur, and CNN, with clients like Red Bull and Verizon — is looking for a Paid Search & Social Analyst to own campaigns, build client relationships, and drive real results.




🎯 What you'll do:

Manage paid media campaigns end-to-end across Meta and Google Ads; handle keyword selection, targeting, budget pacing, and optimization strategies; oversee trafficking, site tagging, pixel QA, and tracking setup; lead performance reporting and proactively communicate insights and opportunities to clients; integrate analytics and social insights into broader marketing recommendations; and present campaign results and strategic recommendations directly to clients as a trusted marketing partner.




✅ What they're looking for:

Proven experience managing both Paid Social (Meta) and Paid Search (Google Ads) campaigns
Solid understanding of analytics, performance media, and marketing principles
Familiarity with customer journeys, audience segmentation, and conversion paths
Strong Excel, PowerPoint, and data presentation skills
Excellent written and verbal English communication skills
Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple client priorities simultaneously
Problem-solving mindset with a bias toward ownership and follow-through
Confidence building and maintaining direct client relationships




🌟 Bonus points for: YouTube Ads or Microsoft Ads experience; ecommerce marketing background; GA4, Looker, Triple Whale, or Hyros familiarity; creative testing framework experience; or B2B lead generation or SaaS campaign exposure.




🌟 Why apply?

Hawke Media is evolving toward a more holistic approach to performance marketing — giving team members the opportunity to develop cross-channel expertise, own meaningful client relationships, and grow alongside leaders who genuinely value communication, ownership, and continuous learning.




This role is placed through Talent Scout, connecting top LATAM professionals with leading U.S. brands and agencies — with full support on recruiting, compliance, and payroll.

description:
About the job

At Teradyne Robotics , part of Teradyne Inc., Our vision is to create a world where people work with robots, not like robots. And as the market leader with 75,000+ collaborative robots (cobots) already installed worldwide, we’re well on the way to achieving it. We employ 1000+ people in offices across North America, South America, Europe and Asia and we’re growing all the time. Our team is made up smart, creative people working at the forefront of automation. Together we find innovative solutions to some of the most important manufacturing issues facing businesses today. We dare to do what others find impossible- working with advanced technologies to change in the way businesses operate, So if you’re looking to build your career with a ground-breaking technology company in dynamic environment with career advancement UR is the place for you.

Our Purpose 

TERADYNE, where experience meets innovation and driving excellence in every connection. We are fueled by creativity and diversity of thought and in our workforce. Our employees are supported to innovate and learn something new every day.

Opportunity Overview

The Marketing Specialist is responsible for supporting the planning, execution, and optimization of marketing activities across Latin America. This role plays a critical part in generating demand, strengthening partner engagement, increasing brand visibility, and supporting sales objectives through digital marketing, content creation, event execution, and marketing operations.

The position works closely with regional sales teams, distributors, system integrators, and global marketing teams to ensure successful implementation of regional marketing strategies.

Key Responsibilities


Support regional marketing initiatives across LATAM
Execute and localize digital marketing campaigns
Create and adapt marketing content and communications
Coordinate events, webinars, and partner activities
Support lead generation and marketing operations
Collaborate with sales teams, distributors, and global marketing stakeholders


All About You

We seek individuals who share our passion and determination. Our commitment to customer success drives us to go the extra mile. If you’re ready to join us in this mission, take a closer look at the minimum criteria for the position.

Minimum Job Requirements 


Bachelor’s degree in marketing, Communications, Business Administration, Digital Marketing, or related field.
Fluent English and Spanish required.
2 years of experience in:
B2B marketing
Digital marketing
Communications OR event management.

Preferred Job Requirements


CRM and marketing automation tools.


The Ideal Candidate Will Demonstrate The Following Behavioral Traits


Strong organizational and project management skills.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
Proactive and collaborative approach.
This position is not eligible for visa sponsorship OR Relocation assistance


Benefits

Teradyne offers a variety of robust health and well-being benefit programs, including medical, dental, vision, life insurance, paid vacation & holidays, tuition assistance programs, and more.

description:
About the job

Role: Social Media & Content Assistant (Personal Branding or Influencer Collaboration Experience Required)

Contract: Part-time Remote Contractor (10 hours weekly / 40 hours monthly)

Service Hours: Monday through Friday, flexible within 9 AM – 5 PM PST

Rate: $10 - $12 USD hourly (Salary is negotiable based on experience and location) 

Availability to Start: Immediately




Client's Profile

This US-based company is a cultural consultancy and storytelling agency that supports brands and organizations through content creation, influencer partnerships, and strategic communications. They take a hands-on, personalized approach to help clients navigate today's fast-changing media landscape, build authentic connections with their audience, and create meaningful, engaging brand narratives that drive long-term impact.




What You'll Do

As a Social Media & Content Assistant, you’ll play a key role in driving content development and supporting overall brand growth. This position is suited for someone who can take ownership of managing a high-profile digital presence, contributing across video editing, copywriting, content publishing, proactive outreach, and community engagement. You will act as a strategic execution partner, helping shape and maintain a consistent, impactful online presence. Your core responsibilities will include the following:




Content Creation

Copywriting & Captions Creation: Draft "human-voiced," on-brand copy and captions aligned with the Founder's tone and messaging for Instagram and LinkedIn.

Video Creation: Transform raw footage, founder insights, or training clips into polished, high-engagement short-form videos optimized for platform performance.

Content Calendar Management

Own and manage the monthly content calendar across platforms, including planning, organization, and scheduling.
Ensure all content is created, reviewed, approved, and scheduled for timely and consistent posting.
Manage publishing across platforms, ensuring accuracy, formatting, and brand consistency.
Coordinate directly with the Founder to align content with business priorities, campaigns, and events.




Event Outreach & Support

Proactively identify, research, and vet speaking opportunities, partnerships, and relevant organizations.
Manage outreach and application processes for speaking engagements using the existing database and outbound efforts.
Maintain and update an organized outreach pipeline, including tracking submissions, follow-ups, and outcomes.
Support event preparation by creating branded speaker decks, social assets, and coordinating logistics as needed.




Community Management

Monitor, manage, and respond to social media comments and messages in a timely manner using approved response templates.
Maintain and expand the community response database, ensuring consistency in tone and messaging.
Track engagement trends, sentiment, and recurring inquiries, escalating high-value opportunities or risks to the Founder.




What You Should Have

Must-haves:

At least 5+ years of experience in Social Media Management or Content Assistant roles; must be able to work independently and "lead the way."
Proven experience in personal branding or prior experience working directly with an influencer, founder, or public-facing personal brand (non-negotiable).
At least 1 year of experience working in a global remote environment with a North America–based company.
Proven ability to manage time effectively and adhere to strict deadlines.
Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, and Express, as well as Canva.
Deep familiarity with Instagram and LinkedIn native publishing, engagement tools, and community management.
Strong storytelling ability with a knack for turning complex topics and real-world conversations into relatable content.
Must be 100% transparent regarding AI usage for drafting; must possess the editorial skill to refine AI outputs so they remain authentic and on-brand.




Technology Specifications:

Windows 11 or MacOS 15 Sequoia
Minimum Intel i5 8th gen with 8GB RAM or Apple M1 chip with 8GB RAM
Webcam and Headset
Designated Office Space in your Home




Nice-to-haves:

Familiarity with project management tools like Notion.




Who You Are

We are hoping you are someone who:

Has clear and effective communication regarding project status and the use of AI tools.
Is comfortable working in an environment that is actively building its systems and processes from the ground up.
Demonstrates strong empathy and awareness when engaging with and responding to community interactions.

description:
About the job

Description

Position at LeadVenture

Senior Software Engineer, Email & Communications Platform (Software Engineer III)

We're looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join the team that owns our email and communications platform — the system responsible for delivering millions of marketing emails on behalf of our dealer network. You'll work across the full stack, building and scaling the infrastructure that powers campaigns, transactional messages, and automated communications that directly drive revenue for our customers.

This is a hands-on engineering role with real ownership. Our platform is in an active modernization phase. You'll be working in a mature codebase that serves real production traffic while incrementally upgrading architecture, tooling, and patterns. That means you need to be comfortable holding two things at once: keeping the lights on for a system dealers depend on today, and making deliberate progress toward where the platform needs to be tomorrow. You'll design and implement features end-to-end, from database schema and API design through to the UI that internal teams and dealers interact with, while identifying opportunities to retire technical debt and modernize along the way.

You'll tackle challenges around deliverability, throughput, sender reputation, and compliance — problems where good engineering decisions have measurable business impact. You'll collaborate closely with product, deliverability specialists, and other engineering teams. We're a remote-first team that values clear communication, pragmatic technical decisions, and shipping work that matters.

 Here is more of what you’ll get to do: 


 Design, build, and maintain full-stack features across our email and communications platform 
 Work on systems that handle email delivery at scale — sending infrastructure, queue management, throttling, bounce handling, and deliverability optimization 
 Build and improve APIs, background services, and data pipelines in .NET 
 Develop and maintain cloud-native services in Azure (Functions, Service Bus, Cosmos DB, SQL, Blob Storage, etc.) 
 Drive modernization efforts — refactoring legacy code, migrating to modern patterns, and improving observability and testability in a production system 
 Collaborate with product and stakeholders to translate business requirements into well-architected solutions 
 Participate in code reviews, technical design discussions, and incident response 
 Balance new feature development with incremental improvements to system reliability, maintainability, and developer experience 
 Mentor junior engineers and contribute to a culture of engineering excellence 


You’ll thrive in this role if you have: 


 5–7 years of professional software engineering experience 
 Full-stack development — comfortable owning features from backend to frontend 
 C# / .NET — strong experience building APIs, services, and backend systems 
 Microsoft Azure — hands-on experience with Azure services in production (e.g., App Services, Functions, Service Bus, SQL, Storage) 
 Email delivery at scale — experience with high-volume email systems, including familiarity with concepts like SPF/DKIM/DMARC, IP warming, bounce management, feedback loops, and deliverability monitoring 
 SQL Server — strong experience writing performant queries, designing schemas, and working with relational databases (exposure to PostgreSQL is a plus) 
 Legacy modernization experience — you've worked in mature codebases and know how to improve systems incrementally without breaking what's already working 
 Solid fundamentals — distributed systems thinking, API design, testing practices, CI/CD 
 React / Next.js — experience building modern frontend applications 
 Digital marketing domain knowledge — understanding of campaign management, lead generation, marketing automation, or dealer/automotive marketing 
 Experience with message queue architectures and event-driven systems 
 Familiarity with email service providers (SendGrid, Mailgun, SparkPost, etc.) 
 Experience working in a multi-tenant SaaS environment 
 Must be fluent in English and Spanish. 


Does this position sound like something you would enjoy and be successful at, but you’re not sure you have the exact qualifications to be considered? While our job descriptions are an outline for the type of candidate we’re looking for, it is not a checklist. We encourage you to apply!

 Who we are: 

LeadVenture is the market-leading SaaS provider of digital retailing, eCommerce, digital marketing and eCatalog solutions for dealerships across 12 industry verticals including powersports, marine, RV, pre-owned auto, agriculture and more. Our family of brands includes Dealer Spike, Dealer Car Search, Frazer, Net Driven, Direct Communications, Inc. (DCi), Powersports Support, Level 5, PSM Marketing, Monroney Labels, and Interact RV. We are an international company with offices located in the United States, Mexico (Juniper Data Center), Belize (Dealer Spike Belize), India and The Netherlands. Together, we are LeadVenture.

LeadVenture provides equal employment opportunities (EEO) to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability or genetics. In addition to federal law requirements, LeadVenture complies with applicable state and local laws governing nondiscrimination in employment in every location in which the company has facilities. This policy applies to all terms and conditions of employment, including recruiting, hiring, placement, promotion, termination, layoff, transfer, leaves of absence, compensation, and training.

LeadVenture expressly prohibits any form of workplace harassment based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, age, genetic information, disability, or veteran status. Improper interference with the ability of LeadVenture employees to perform their job duties may result in discipline up to and including discharge.

title: Trafficker Digital / Especialista en Paid Media
description:
About the job

Sobre Backdoor Marketing

Somos una agencia de marketing digital que maneja múltiples cuentas. Buscamos un(a) Trafficker Digital que quiera crecer en pauta digital al lado de un equipo con experiencia.




IMPORTANTE — Esquema de colaboración:

Esta es una colaboración como PROFESIONAL INDEPENDIENTE (prestación de servicios profesionales), no una contratación como empleado interno. Tú emites factura (CFDI) por tus servicios. Buscamos personas que puedan facturar o estén dispuestas a darse de alta en el SAT; te orientamos en el proceso.




Responsabilidades:

· Creación, configuración, monitoreo y optimización de campañas en Google Ads y Meta Ads (también LinkedIn y TikTok) para 8 a 10 cuentas.

· Optimización diaria: presupuestos, pujas, públicos y rendimiento. Los creativos los entrega el Content Manager; tú te enfocas en performance.

· Medición y reportes: Google Analytics 4, Google Tag Manager, eventos y conversiones, con métricas clave (CPA, ROAS, CTR).

· Trabajo cercano con el equipo de contenido.




Requisitos:

· 1+ año en pauta digital (Google y Meta Ads), o certificaciones más práctica demostrable.

· Mentalidad analítica y orientación a resultados.

· Manejo de herramientas de IA/automatización para optimizar a escala.

· Autonomía y organización: trabajas por objetivos y entregables.

· Capacidad de emitir CFDI o disposición a darte de alta en RESICO.




Lo que ofrecemos:

· Colaboración como profesional independiente (tú facturas tus servicios).

· Mejor ingreso neto: bajo el régimen RESICO el ISR es de 1 a 2.5%, mucho menor que las retenciones de un sueldo.

· Esquema híbrido: trabajas principalmente desde casa, con visitas ocasionales a oficina o cliente.

· Libertad para manejar otros clientes.

· Pago mensual competitivo más bonos por desempeño.




Para postularte, comparte tu CV y, si tienes, casos o cuentas que hayas manejado.

About the job

¡Muchas gracias por tu interés en querer formar parte de nuestra familia #GenteViva!

En Viva nuestro principal propósito es que la gente se divierta, haga negocio y se conecte con sus seres queridos aprovechando la reducción de costo en el transporte aéreo.

¡Estamos seguros que con tu talento, seguiremos volando cada vez más alto!

Como Social Content Analyst serás responsable de contribuir a la fluidez operativa y logística del equipo de Content Marketing, que permita transformar el monitoreo de tendencias y la conversación digital en propuestas creativas que se puedan implementar, mientras se brinda soporte en la coordinación y ejecución de la estrategia de contenido.

Funciones Principales

Monitoreo de Tendencias y Creatividad


Actuar como el radar del equipo mediante el monitoreo diario del entorno digital y la escucha activa de la comunidad y la competencia. Identificar de manera oportuna videos, formatos y temas virales en tendencia, traduciendo estos hallazgos en propuestas creativas e ideas accionables que permitan a la marca sumarse a la conversación digital de forma relevante y natural.


Soporte Logístico y Operativo


Contribuir al orden y la fluidez del flujo de trabajo diario y calendarios de publicación. El analista dará seguimiento a los tiempos de entrega entre los equipos de contenido, la agencia y los clientes internos para asegurar que los materiales estén listos en las fechas establecidas.


Apoyo a la Estrategia y Coordinación


Enlace operativo para el equipo de Content Strategy, brindando asistencia directa en el armado de presentaciones, propuestas creativas y reportes. Tambien se encargará de documentar los acuerdos y minutas durante las sesiones de lluvia de ideas, dando un seguimiento puntual a las tareas para facilitar la comunicación interna y asegurar que la estrategia se traduzca de manera efectiva en la ejecución.


Análisis de Contenido


Extraer y recopilar las métricas de rendimiento de las piezas publicadas en los diferentes canales digitales. Validar que todo el contenido se haya implementado en tiempo y forma. Identificar formatos o publicaciones que hayan tenido un éxito sobresaliente para desarrollas mejores prácticas que sirvan como referencia y replicar en futuras producciones.


Habilidades y Conocimientos Técnicos


Licenciatura en Mercadotecnia, Ciencias de la Comunicación, Diseño Gráfico o afines.
Familiarización con plataformas sociales (Meta, X, TikTok)
Conceptos básicos de analítica digital y KPIs de redes sociales (Engagement, alcance, impresiones).
Nociones básicas de edición de video móvil o herramientas de diseño rápido (CapCut, Canva).
Creatividad.
Microsoft Office (Word, PowerPoint, Excel).
Nivel de Inglés Avanzado.
Organización y gestión del tiempo.
Proactividad e iniciativa.
Trabajo en equipo y colaboración.
Adaptabilidad y flexibilidad al cambio rápido.
Atención al detalle.
Comunicación asertiva.


Beneficios que disfrutarás como #TeamViva


 Increíble ambiente de trabajo #ElMejorLugarParatrabajar.
 Días ilimitados de vacaciones desde el 1er día.
 Fondo de ahorro y caja de ahorro.

 MyIDTravel: Alianza con más de 20 aerolíneas para que puedas volar a un precio preferencial a destinos alrededor del mundo.
 Seguro de gastos médicos mayores, Seguro de vida, Asistencia médica familiar en línea 24/7.
 Serie de convenios que mejoran tu vida: Gimnasios, tiendas departamentales, restaurantes, universidades y muchas más.
 Prestaciones superiores a las de la ley.


¡Súmate a este vuelo y tracemos juntos tu nuevo destino!

title: Marketing Specialist
skills: Executes and participates in general marketing functions that are more routine in nature, require smaller spend budgets and requires minimal contact with clients. Requires oversight with developing approach for more complex marketing functions which include higher thresholds of spend levels.

Participates in collaboration with business development, customers, product management, sales and other business partners in support of client-customized, content-rich marketing collateral, such as proposals, corporate communication, and other marketing related information for marketing functions more routine in nature. Will make recommendations regarding marketing process. Supports the marketing approach within strategy and budget.
Supports the development of strategic marketing plans for existing lines and participates in the interpretation of plans into “big ideas” to extend the company’s brand vision.
Supports the strategic direction, growth, and vision of assigned strategic growth objectives for the segment and manages the execution of programs. Has minimal client contact.
Supports the development of multiple pieces of promotional and advertising materials, such as press releases, social and digital media published on-line via web sites, twitter, etc.

Based on assigned strategic growth initiatives, builds and maintains existing relationships with internal contacts, external communications consultants and/or agencies. Participates in meetings with internal and/or external clients to understand their ongoing strategies and how relationships can be strengthened within the client’s organization.
Supports the development of product promotion and launch strategies.

Beginning to act as a marketing advocate, communications consultant, and/or liaison for business support units and/or operational units within the organization. Supports communications with leaders in those units on specific communications issues and strategic growth initiatives and coordinates appropriate marketing resources to achieve their functional goals.

Recommends measurements for return on investment (ROI) for marketing projects within the specific goals of building and delivering campaigns, such as internal and external communications, product launches, new business units, acquisitions, and RFP/RFI proposals within planned scope, schedule, cost and quality, and trade shows/events. Tracks costs against measurements.
Bachelor's Degree
Relevant Experience or Degree in: Digital Marketing , Advertising ,
Typically Minimum 3 Years Relevant Exp
Prefer marketing service or marketing agency experience. Prefer sales force and email automation experience. Prefer payments industry experience.

Skills / Knowledge - Having wide-ranging experience, uses professional concepts and company objectives to resolve moderately complex issues in creative and effective ways. Having ownership of a sub-function, account or matrix management responsibilities, applies knowledge to meet goals, maintain relationships, propose opportunities to expand the business, and lead matrix teams. Some barriers to entry exist at this level (e.g., dept./peer review).

Job Complexity - Works on complex issues where analysis of situations or data requires an in-depth evaluation of variable factors. Exercises judgment in selecting methods, techniques and evaluation criteria for obtaining results. Networks with key contacts outside own area of expertise. Builds on/Maintains external relationships of assigned accounts.
Supervision - Determines methods and procedures on new assignments and may coordinate activities of other personnel (Team Lead).
Marketing production execution - Broad marketing services and/or print/production
Communication skills - Including communication with internal or external audiences
description:
About the job

Summary

Description Summary of This Role

Responsible for managing marketing, advertising and promotional activities for various products or channels. Takes steps to measure, enhance, and enrich the position and image of the company through various goals and objectives. Plan and execute day-to-day marketing activities in support of a product, service or channel. Help prepare and adhere to budgets. Oversee creation and delivery of advertising and marketing materials and ensure brand messages are consistent. Collaborate with sales and product to develop strategic partnership activities and implement the execution the identified opportunities.

What Part Will You Play?


Executes and participates in general marketing functions that are more routine in nature, require smaller spend budgets and requires minimal contact with clients. Requires oversight with developing approach for more complex marketing functions which include higher thresholds of spend levels.
Participates in collaboration with business development, customers, product management, sales and other business partners in support of client-customized, content-rich marketing collateral, such as proposals, corporate communication, and other marketing related information for marketing functions more routine in nature. Will make recommendations regarding marketing process. Supports the marketing approach within strategy and budget.
Supports the development of strategic marketing plans for existing lines and participates in the interpretation of plans into “big ideas” to extend the company’s brand vision.
Supports the strategic direction, growth, and vision of assigned strategic growth objectives for the segment and manages the execution of programs. Has minimal client contact.
Supports the development of multiple pieces of promotional and advertising materials, such as press releases, social and digital media published on-line via web sites, twitter, etc.
Based on assigned strategic growth initiatives, builds and maintains existing relationships with internal contacts, external communications consultants and/or agencies. Participates in meetings with internal and/or external clients to understand their ongoing strategies and how relationships can be strengthened within the client’s organization.
Supports the development of product promotion and launch strategies.
Beginning to act as a marketing advocate, communications consultant, and/or liaison for business support units and/or operational units within the organization. Supports communications with leaders in those units on specific communications issues and strategic growth initiatives and coordinates appropriate marketing resources to achieve their functional goals.
Recommends measurements for return on investment (ROI) for marketing projects within the specific goals of building and delivering campaigns, such as internal and external communications, product launches, new business units, acquisitions, and RFP/RFI proposals within planned scope, schedule, cost and quality, and trade shows/events. Tracks costs against measurements.


What Are We Looking For in This Role?

Minimum Qualifications


Bachelor's Degree
Relevant Experience or Degree in: Digital Marketing , Advertising ,
Typically Minimum 3 Years Relevant Exp


Preferred Qualifications


Prefer marketing service or marketing agency experience. Prefer sales force and email automation experience. Prefer payments industry experience.


What Are Our Desired Skills and Capabilities?


Skills / Knowledge - Having wide-ranging experience, uses professional concepts and company objectives to resolve moderately complex issues in creative and effective ways. Having ownership of a sub-function, account or matrix management responsibilities, applies knowledge to meet goals, maintain relationships, propose opportunities to expand the business, and lead matrix teams. Some barriers to entry exist at this level (e.g., dept./peer review).
Job Complexity - Works on complex issues where analysis of situations or data requires an in-depth evaluation of variable factors. Exercises judgment in selecting methods, techniques and evaluation criteria for obtaining results. Networks with key contacts outside own area of expertise. Builds on/Maintains external relationships of assigned accounts.
Supervision - Determines methods and procedures on new assignments and may coordinate activities of other personnel (Team Lead).
Marketing production execution - Broad marketing services and/or print/production
Communication skills - Including communication with internal or external audiences

description:
About the job

Midea LATAM North, one of the world’s leading home appliance and air solutions providers, we are committed to making life easier, more efficient, and more connected. Our culture is driven by innovation, collaboration, and operational excellence — and our people are at the heart of everything we do.




Midea is looking for an E-commerce Specialist to manage and develop key marketplace accounts, driving sustainable sales growth through strong commercial execution, data analysis, and strategic planning.

This role requires a strong sales and negotiation mindset, as you will be directly responsible for growing revenue, optimizing account performance, and identifying new business opportunities across digital channels.

You will be part of a dynamic, results-driven team focused on maximizing performance and expanding Midea’s presence in e-commerce.




Position Overview

Manage and develop key e-commerce accounts, ensuring sustainable sales growth through commercial analysis, strategic planning, and efficient execution across marketplaces.

We are a sales-driven team focused on maximizing performance and growth within the digital channel.




What you will do?

Manage the Mercado Libre account end-to-end
Oversee and support accounts such as Amazon, Walmart, or Liverpool
Develop and execute sales-driven commercial strategies
Monitor sales performance (sell-in / sell-out) by account
Prepare and manage sales forecasts
Analyze promotions, margins, and profitability
Coordinate with logistics, planning, and product teams to ensure end-to-end execution




What are we looking for?

1–5 years of experience managing e-commerce or marketplace accounts (At Least 1 year, negotiable)
Experience managing the Mercado Libre account (must)
Experience managing Mercado Libre plus at least one additional platform (Amazon, Walmart, or Liverpool)
Indispensable experience managing the Mercado Libre account
Experience in sales and client negotiation
Experience driving portfolio growth (line-up expansion) in digital channels
Strong understanding of promotions, margins, and profitability
Advanced Excel skills (data analysis, formulas, reporting)
Intermediate to advanced English (B2 or higher)




Competencies

Data-driven negotiation skills
Proactive and results-oriented mindset
Problem-solving abilities
Strong collaboration and communication skills




What We Offer

Above-law benefits
Major medical insurance
Grocery vouchers and additional benefits







Why Midea?




Because we are a global company with a regional mindset. Because your talent knows no boundaries. And because we are building a smarter, more connected, and more human future for millions of people around the world




At Midea LATAM North, we believe diverse teams build better solutions. We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and are committed to a workplace where everyone is respected, valued, and empowered to grow.




All qualified applicants will be considered without regard to race, ethnicity, religion, sex, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other characteristic.




Join us and be part of a team where your talent makes the difference!




Midea LATAM North. is an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics.

El Puerto de Liverpool es la empresa líder en tiendas departamentales en México. Contamos con cinco unidades de negocio: Tiendas Liverpool, Tiendas Suburbia, Centros Comerciales Galerías, Boutiques y Negocios Financieros, componiendo una empresa sólida, que ofrece a sus colaboradores estabilidad financiera y el orgullo de pertenecer a una EMPRESA 100% MEXICANA.

NUESTRA MISIÓN ES SERVIR AL CLIENTE EN TODO LUGAR, TODOS LOS DÍAS, TODA LA VIDA, nuestra visión es ser la mejor opción en servicio, surtido y valor. Nuestros valores nos guían hacia el trabajo en equipo, productividad, innovación e integridad.

description:
About the job

About Signify

Through bold discovery and cutting-edge innovation, we lead an industry that is vital for the future of our planet: lighting. Through our leadership in connected lighting and the Internet of Things, we're breaking new ground in data analytics, AI, and smart solutions for homes, offices, cities, and beyond.

At Signify, you can shape tomorrow by building on our incredible 125+ year legacy while working toward even bolder sustainability goals. Our culture of continuous learning, creativity, and commitment to diversity and inclusion empowers you to grow your skills and career.

Join us, and together, we’ll transform our industry, making a lasting difference for brighter lives and a better world.

More About The Role

We’re looking for an Intern to join our Consumer Channel team in Mexico.

Working for Signify means being creative and adaptive. Our culture of continuous learning and commitment to diversity and inclusion creates an environment that allows you to build your skills and career. Together, we’re transforming our industry.

As the world leader in lighting, we’re constantly ahead of the curve. Through our leadership in connected lighting and the Internet of Things, we’re breaking new grounds in data analytics, AI, and smart homes, offices, cities and more!

Signify is proud to be a leader in climate action, acting in line with the latest climate science. We are committed to reaching net zero greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions by 2040.

As an Intern / Apprentice you’ll be responsible for supporting Sales team and SOM role to improve customer service level in all the region (MEX & NOLA).

We’re on the lookout for forward-thinking innovators with a passion for sustainability. If you match this description, get in touch!

What You’ll Do


Sales Dashboard construction
Inventory level tracking (on hand / in transit) – Signify and Customer analysis
Slowmovers Action Tracker development
Sell In / Sell Out Consolidation ( 12 – 24 months)
Provisions report


Your Qualifications


Industrial Engineering or Business student (graduating after June 2027)
Intermediate English
Excel proficiency
Proactive


Our candidate profile is just a guide. We know that many talented people only apply for jobs when there is an exact match. If you don't fit all the criteria but believe this role is for you, we would very much like to hear from you.

We’re offering multiple opportunities for career development, like mentoring, coaching and stretch assignments, with strong international exposure for dynamic profiles. Learning is fundamental to our culture. Through continuous learning, we are transforming the industry. You have the chance to learn every day, acquire new skills and perspectives through customized online programs, and on-the-job experiences.

See #SignifyLife through the eyes of our employees!

Everything we’ll do for you

You can grow a lasting career here. We’ll encourage you, support you, and challenge you. We’ll help you learn and progress in a way that’s right for you, with coaching and mentoring along the way. We’ll listen to you too, because we see and value every one of our 27,000+ people. We believe that a diverse and inclusive workplace fosters creativity, innovation, and a full spectrum of bright ideas. With a global workforce present in 70+ countries, we are dedicated to creating an inclusive environment where every voice is heard and valued, helping us all achieve more together.

Come join us, and together we can light up the future.

description:
About the job

Job Title: Data Scientist (Remote)
Work Mode: Fully Remote
Schedule: Flexible (up to 40 hours per week, based on project availability)




Role Overview:

We are looking for software engineers across Latin America to join a paid remote AI training program. In this role, you will review and evaluate AI-generated code, rate AI responses for accuracy and quality, and write coding challenges to help improve AI model performance. This is a flexible, remote opportunity well-suited for software engineers seeking project-based, asynchronous work. No prior AI experience required.




Key Responsibilities

Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Belize, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Dominican Republic, Dominica, Ecuador, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Mexico, Nicaragua, Panama, Paraguay, Peru, Puerto Rico, Trinidad and Tobago, Uruguay, Venezuela

Flexible workload depending on project availability

description:
About the job

Creator Growth Specialist

Salary: $2,000 USD per month

Type: Full-time

Location: 100% Remote

Role Overview

We are hiring a Creator Growth Specialist to support a portfolio of content creators across audience growth, content strategy, creator operations, and monetization initiatives.

This is not a traditional influencer marketing role. We are looking for someone with hands-on experience working directly with creators to help them grow their audiences, strengthen their personal brands, optimize content performance, and expand revenue opportunities across today's creator economy.

The ideal candidate understands how creators build sustainable businesses through content strategy, audience engagement, platform optimization, and multiple monetization channels.

Key Responsibilities

Manage a portfolio of content creators as their primary point of contact.
Develop and execute audience growth strategies across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and emerging creator platforms.
Advise creators on content planning, performance optimization, audience engagement, and platform best practices.
Create and manage content calendars to support consistent publishing.
Assist with copywriting, editing, scheduling, publishing, and content organization.
Analyze creator performance and provide data-driven recommendations to improve growth.
Monitor platform updates, creator economy trends, and emerging opportunities.
Identify opportunities to increase audience engagement, reach, follower growth, and content performance.
Support creator monetization through TikTok Shop, affiliate marketing, brand partnerships, LTK, social commerce, YouTube monetization, and other revenue channels.
Help creators identify new monetization opportunities aligned with their audience and content niche.
Track campaigns, partnerships, affiliate programs, and creator performance within internal systems.
Maintain accurate records in CRM platforms, Monday.com, and other operational tools.
Coordinate communication between creators, internal teams, and brand partners.
Support partnership administration, campaign tracking, invoicing, and operational processes.

Requirements

Resume in English.
Native or near-native English proficiency (spoken and written).
3+ years of experience in creator talent management, creator partnerships, creator success, creator operations, or the creator economy.
Proven experience working directly with content creators, influencers, personal brands, or creator rosters.
Demonstrated success helping creators grow audiences, improve content performance, and increase monetization.
Strong understanding of creator business models and the creator economy.
Deep knowledge of TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and emerging creator platforms.
Experience developing content strategies, growth plans, and audience engagement initiatives.
Strong copywriting, content planning, and content optimization skills.
Experience analyzing creator performance metrics and turning insights into actionable recommendations.
Experience supporting creator monetization through affiliate marketing, TikTok Shop, brand partnerships, social commerce, LTK, YouTube monetization, subscriptions, or similar revenue channels.
Experience using CRM platforms, Monday.com, or similar project management tools.
Strong organizational, communication, and relationship management skills.

title: Paid Social Senior Associate
skills: Shape and execute paid social strategies that align with client objectives, overseeing budget allocation, media planning, reporting, and forecasting in partnership with cross-functional teams.
Manage the setup and trafficking of campaigns across platforms like Meta, TikTok, Pinterest, Snap, and LinkedIn, ensuring best practices and precision in execution.
Develop and implement testing frameworks to uncover actionable insights, translating complex data into clear, impactful recommendations for clients and internal stakeholders.
Collaborate with PMG teams and platform partners to optimize campaign performance, offering real-time analysis and subject-matter expertise during client interactions.
Harness PMG’s proprietary technology, Alli, to streamline workflows, analyze performance data, and unlock deeper campaign insights, contributing to its ongoing enhancement.
Take ownership of project timelines and deliverables, ensuring campaigns meet strategic goals and exceed expectations.
Bring a proactive mindset and enthusiasm to each day, inspiring your team and making a meaningful impact on the brands you support.
3+ years of experience in paid social strategy or a related field, with a bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience.
Intermediate expertise in Paid Social and Content Marketing to craft, execute, and optimize impactful campaigns.
Foundational knowledge of Marketing Metrics and Marketing Planning & Analysis to drive data-informed strategies and recommendations.
Proficiency in social media platforms such as Meta, TikTok, Pinterest, Snap, and LinkedIn to set up, traffic, and manage campaigns.
Familiarity with tools like Google Analytics, Microsoft Excel, and SQL to analyze data and deliver clear, actionable performance insights.
Strong organizational and collaboration skills, enabling seamless alignment with internal teams and external stakeholders.
An analytical mindset, paired with a proactive approach to uncovering insights, testing strategies, and driving continuous improvements.

A commitment to curiosity and adaptability as a Continual Learner, staying at the forefront of media innovation while prioritizing client success with a Customer-Focused mindset that seeks opportunities to deliver meaningful value.
A dedication to People-Focused leadership, fostering collaboration, innovation, and professional growth by Leading by Example and nurturing strong relationships that empower others to excel.
Professional Development: Take advantage of our learning and development programs, mentorship opportunities, and career advancement support.
Generous Time Off: Enjoy generous paid time off and holiday allowances to recharge and spend time with loved ones.
Parental Leave: We provide paid parental leave to support your family during important life events.
Retirement & Pension Plans: Plan for your future with competitive retirement or pension programs, including contribution matching.
Fertility and Family Support: Access fertility benefits for all team members and their spouses.
Healthcare: Coverage and support for everyday medical expenses and routine care, tailored by geography.
Pet Insurance: Protect your pet's health and your finances.
Lifestyle Spending Accounts: Enjoy 100% company-funded accounts to promote healthy habits and well-being.
Commuter Benefits: Access support for travel and commuting needs, where available.
Annual Bonus: All employees are eligible for an annual bonus.
Volunteering Opportunities: Receive 8 give-back hours to volunteer in your local communities.
AI Enterprise License: Access AI Enterprise accounts and participate in weekly AI training sessions to empower and ensure AI safety.
description:
About the job

We are PMG

Named Ad Age Best Places to Work for 11 years in a row and Fast Company Best Workplaces for Innovators since 2022, PMG is a global independent marketing services and technology company that seeks to inspire people and brands that anything is possible. Driven by shared success, PMG leverages business strategy and transformation, creative, media, and insights—as well as its proprietary operating system, Alli—to deliver cutting-edge digital solutions and innovative media strategies.

Our team comprises over 900 employees globally, and our work for ambitious brands like Apple, Nike, Sephora, Experian, Therabody, Best Western Hotels & Resorts, Creed Fragrances, BNY, Intuit, CKE Restaurants, Travelex, and Whole Foods spans 85+ countries.

Professional proficiency in written and spoken English is required, including for resume submission and interviews.

Who You Will Be Working With

Join a team of innovative thinkers and collaborative problem-solvers who are passionate about the ever-evolving world of paid social media. Our Social team is dynamic, supportive, and dedicated to helping our clients achieve extraordinary results. You’ll work closely with strategists, creatives, data analysts, and technologists to craft campaigns that make a tangible impact on some of the most exciting brands in the industry.

We believe in fostering a culture where every team member feels valued, empowered, and inspired to bring their unique talents to the table. At PMG, your voice will be heard, your ideas embraced, and your growth supported every step of the way. If you’re looking for a role that blends cutting-edge innovation with meaningful collaboration, we’d love to welcome you to our team.

What You Will Do


Shape and execute paid social strategies that align with client objectives, overseeing budget allocation, media planning, reporting, and forecasting in partnership with cross-functional teams. 
Manage the setup and trafficking of campaigns across platforms like Meta, TikTok, Pinterest, Snap, and LinkedIn, ensuring best practices and precision in execution. 
Develop and implement testing frameworks to uncover actionable insights, translating complex data into clear, impactful recommendations for clients and internal stakeholders. 
Collaborate with PMG teams and platform partners to optimize campaign performance, offering real-time analysis and subject-matter expertise during client interactions. 
Harness PMG’s proprietary technology, Alli, to streamline workflows, analyze performance data, and unlock deeper campaign insights, contributing to its ongoing enhancement. 
Take ownership of project timelines and deliverables, ensuring campaigns meet strategic goals and exceed expectations. 
Bring a proactive mindset and enthusiasm to each day, inspiring your team and making a meaningful impact on the brands you support. 


What You Will Bring


3+ years of experience in paid social strategy or a related field, with a bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience. 
Intermediate expertise in Paid Social and Content Marketing to craft, execute, and optimize impactful campaigns. 
Foundational knowledge of Marketing Metrics and Marketing Planning & Analysis to drive data-informed strategies and recommendations. 
Proficiency in social media platforms such as Meta, TikTok, Pinterest, Snap, and LinkedIn to set up, traffic, and manage campaigns. 
Familiarity with tools like Google Analytics, Microsoft Excel, and SQL to analyze data and deliver clear, actionable performance insights. 
Strong organizational and collaboration skills, enabling seamless alignment with internal teams and external stakeholders. 
An analytical mindset, paired with a proactive approach to uncovering insights, testing strategies, and driving continuous improvements. 
A commitment to curiosity and adaptability as a Continual Learner, staying at the forefront of media innovation while prioritizing client success with a Customer-Focused mindset that seeks opportunities to deliver meaningful value. 
A dedication to People-Focused leadership, fostering collaboration, innovation, and professional growth by Leading by Example and nurturing strong relationships that empower others to excel. 


What We Offer


Professional Development: Take advantage of our learning and development programs, mentorship opportunities, and career advancement support. 
Generous Time Off: Enjoy generous paid time off and holiday allowances to recharge and spend time with loved ones. 
Parental Leave: We provide paid parental leave to support your family during important life events. 
Retirement & Pension Plans: Plan for your future with competitive retirement or pension programs, including contribution matching. 
Fertility and Family Support: Access fertility benefits for all team members and their spouses. 
Healthcare: Coverage and support for everyday medical expenses and routine care, tailored by geography. 
Pet Insurance: Protect your pet's health and your finances. 
Lifestyle Spending Accounts: Enjoy 100% company-funded accounts to promote healthy habits and well-being. 
Commuter Benefits: Access support for travel and commuting needs, where available. 
Annual Bonus: All employees are eligible for an annual bonus. 
Volunteering Opportunities: Receive 8 give-back hours to volunteer in your local communities. 
AI Enterprise License: Access AI Enterprise accounts and participate in weekly AI training sessions to empower and ensure AI safety. 


Benefits vary by country, location, and geography to reflect local laws, norms, and expectations.

What Sets Us Apart

Being part of PMG means joining a company culture that’s unmatched in digital. We're dedicated to working hard to serve our employees and clients, delivering value, results, and innovation—which often requires true grit and agility. We believe in taking care of ourselves and each other to continuously improve in every way.

In alignment with our core values to be inclusive and always change for the better, PMG is committed to creating a more diverse and inclusive culture, and we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We believe that we only change for the better by bringing diverse perspectives to our company. PMG recruits, employs, trains, compensates, and promotes regardless of race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status.

Nuestra búsqueda constante de mejorar en lo que hacemos comienza contactando con personas como tú.

title: Marketing & Content Creation Specialist
skills: Creative and Long Form Content Higher Effort
Editing long form YouTube videos ranging from ten to twenty minutes using raw family style footage such as outdoor activities, trips, and daily life moments.
Combining multiple video clips, photos, and audio into cohesive and engaging stories.
Making creative decisions related to clip selection, pacing, music using royalty free sources only, transitions, and overall story flow.
Repurposing long form videos into short form content for platforms such as YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram Reels.
Understanding that YouTube's growth strategy differs significantly from TikTok and Instagram, and adjusting editing style and structure accordingly.
Professional and Compliance Focused Content Lower Creativity Higher Precision
Light editing and formatting of healthcare related videos such as product demonstrations and therapy tools.
Managing posting and scheduling across Facebook, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and creator or affiliate platforms.
Publishing clinician spotlights, company updates, educational posts, clinic events, therapy activities, and patient success stories.
Creating or refining simple educational graphics and infographics using provided content.
Ensuring a professional tone, brand consistency, patient privacy, and compliance with healthcare data protection standards.
Video Editing: Execute high-quality edits for both long-form (YouTube/Webinars) and short-form (Reels/TikTok/Shorts) content.
Optimization: Apply platform-specific formatting, captions, and technical SEO to maximize reach.
Social Media Operations: Manage the end-to-end posting process, including scheduling and caption implementation across all platforms.
Digital Asset Management: Maintain a highly organized filing system via Google Drive and shared folders for easy retrieval.
Performance Tracking: Monitor and report on core KPIs, including views, engagement rates, and follower growth.
Confidentiality: Maintaining the "Fort Knox" integrity of sensitive healthcare and family data.
Accuracy: Ensuring provided compliance guidance is followed to the letter during the editing process.
Efficiency: Streamlining the workflow from raw footage to scheduled post.

Video Editing Mastery: Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve. You must be capable of handling complex long-form YouTube edits (storytelling, pacing, audio leveling) in addition to high-energy short-form clips.
Platform IQ: A deep understanding of the technical differences between YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram, specifically regarding audience retention and platform-specific algorithms.
Precision & Context: High-level English comprehension to ensure captions are 100% accurate and medical/professional context is preserved.
Operational Discipline:
Strong self-management skills with the ability to meet deadlines under minimal supervision.
Willingness to utilize Hubstaff for transparent time-tracking and productivity.
U.S. Market Experience: Prior experience working with U.S.-based clients or creators.
Niche Familiarity: Background in Healthcare, Wellness, or Professional Services (understanding the tone and "feel" of high-compliance industries).
description:
About the job

📽️ WATCH THIS QUICK LOOM VIDEO ON HOW TO GET HIRED: https://www.loom.com/share/345f776084e642ba99c24aabe40a67a0

🇬🇧 C1 ENGLISH LEVEL IS REQUIRED. THE SELECTED CANDIDATE WILL BE SPEAKING STRICTLY IN ENGLISH DURING THEIR ENTIRE SHIFT.

🎤 PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND AUDIO RECORDING IN ENGLISH.




🚀 JOB TITLE: Marketing & Content Creation Specialist

🆔 JOB ID: KAYKYL1R

🏭 INDUSTRY: Marketing / Content Creation

📍 LOCATION: LATAM / PH / South Africa / Egypt

💼 JOB STATUS: Full Time

🕒 WORK SCHEDULE: Flexible Schedule with Mandatory Overlap 1–2 Times per Week for Strategy Calls

💵 SALARY: $8 – $10 USD per hour

📅 TARGET START DATE: ASAP

⚠️ PLEASE NOTE: This role requires a highly independent and creative content professional who can transform raw content into polished, publish-ready media with minimal supervision. We are looking for someone who thrives in both creative storytelling and process-driven execution while maintaining exceptional attention to detail and confidentiality.

ROLE OVERVIEW

About the Client:




Our client is a U.S.-based organization that provides physical, occupational, and speech therapy services, primarily serving senior living and retirement communities. Alongside their healthcare business, the founders also operate a personal creator brand focused on family life, outdoor adventures, and long-form storytelling through digital media platforms.

This position supports both sides of the business, each with distinct audiences, objectives, and content requirements. The ideal candidate must be able to adapt communication styles, creative approaches, and execution strategies accordingly.

About the Role:




We are seeking a full-time Marketing & Content Creation Specialist with strong video editing, content management, and social media execution experience.

This role is ideal for someone who can independently manage deliverables, organize content workflows, and transform provided footage, images, and written materials into engaging, high-quality content without constant oversight.

This is not an on-camera role and does not involve clinical or administrative responsibilities. Instead, your primary focus will be content production, platform management, organization, and performance tracking.




Two Distinct Content Streams Critical to This Role

Creative and Long Form Content Higher Effort

This portion of the role is more time consuming and highly creative.

Responsibilities include:

Editing long form YouTube videos ranging from ten to twenty minutes using raw family style footage such as outdoor activities, trips, and daily life moments.
Combining multiple video clips, photos, and audio into cohesive and engaging stories.
Making creative decisions related to clip selection, pacing, music using royalty free sources only, transitions, and overall story flow.
Repurposing long form videos into short form content for platforms such as YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram Reels.
Understanding that YouTube's growth strategy differs significantly from TikTok and Instagram, and adjusting editing style and structure accordingly.
Professional and Compliance Focused Content Lower Creativity Higher Precision

This portion of the role is more structured and process driven.

Responsibilities include:

Light editing and formatting of healthcare related videos such as product demonstrations and therapy tools.
Managing posting and scheduling across Facebook, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and creator or affiliate platforms.
Publishing clinician spotlights, company updates, educational posts, clinic events, therapy activities, and patient success stories.
Creating or refining simple educational graphics and infographics using provided content.
Ensuring a professional tone, brand consistency, patient privacy, and compliance with healthcare data protection standards.

Most of this content will be provided or clearly outlined. The focus of the role is execution, refinement, accuracy, and consistency.

Key Responsibilities

1. Content Production & Editing

Video Editing: Execute high-quality edits for both long-form (YouTube/Webinars) and short-form (Reels/TikTok/Shorts) content.
Optimization: Apply platform-specific formatting, captions, and technical SEO to maximize reach.

2. Distribution & Management

Social Media Operations: Manage the end-to-end posting process, including scheduling and caption implementation across all platforms.
Digital Asset Management: Maintain a highly organized filing system via Google Drive and shared folders for easy retrieval.

3. Analytics & Reporting

Performance Tracking: Monitor and report on core KPIs, including views, engagement rates, and follower growth.

Role Scope & Boundaries (Non-Negotiable)

Operational Status: This is an Execution-Only role. The Editor acts as the technical hands of the brand, not the clinical or strategic voice.

Core Expectations

Confidentiality: Maintaining the "Fort Knox" integrity of sensitive healthcare and family data.
Accuracy: Ensuring provided compliance guidance is followed to the letter during the editing process.
Efficiency: Streamlining the workflow from raw footage to scheduled post.

Qualifications & Skills

Core Competencies (Must-Have)

Video Editing Mastery: Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve. You must be capable of handling complex long-form YouTube edits (storytelling, pacing, audio leveling) in addition to high-energy short-form clips.
Platform IQ: A deep understanding of the technical differences between YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram, specifically regarding audience retention and platform-specific algorithms.
Precision & Context: High-level English comprehension to ensure captions are 100% accurate and medical/professional context is preserved.
Operational Discipline:
Strong self-management skills with the ability to meet deadlines under minimal supervision.
Willingness to utilize Hubstaff for transparent time-tracking and productivity.










Experience & "Bonus" Assets (Preferred)

U.S. Market Experience: Prior experience working with U.S.-based clients or creators.
Niche Familiarity: Background in Healthcare, Wellness, or Professional Services (understanding the tone and "feel" of high-compliance industries).

Affiliate Ecosystems: Familiarity with Amazon Creator or other affiliate marketing platforms is a significant plus.

WHY JOIN?

Creative Variety:

Work across both a professional healthcare organization and an engaging lifestyle creator brand

High Ownership Role:

Take ownership of content production and become a trusted extension of the business

Long-Term Opportunity:

Join a growing organization seeking a reliable long-term team member

Flexible Work Environment:

Enjoy a flexible schedule while collaborating directly with founders and decision-makers

✨ Join a growing network of exceptional remote professionals

📩 Submit your application today and take the next step in your career!
