title: Social Media & Content Assistant
skills: Copywriting & Captions Creation: Draft "human-voiced," on-brand copy and captions aligned with the Founder's tone and messaging for Instagram and LinkedIn.
Graphic Creation: Create high-quality visual assets using Adobe Creative Suite and Canva for social and event-related content.
Video Creation: Transform raw footage, founder insights, or training clips into polished, high-engagement short-form videos optimized for platform performance.
LinkedIn Content Creation: Repurpose long-form content, founder emails, and thought leadership into structured, professional LinkedIn posts.
Content Optimization: Continuously refine content based on engagement metrics, audience behavior, and platform trends.
Own and manage the monthly content calendar across platforms, including planning, organization, and scheduling.
Ensure all content is created, reviewed, approved, and scheduled for timely and consistent posting.
Manage publishing across platforms, ensuring accuracy, formatting, and brand consistency.
Coordinate directly with the Founder to align content with business priorities, campaigns, and events.
Proactively identify, research, and vet speaking opportunities, partnerships, and relevant organizations.
Manage outreach and application processes for speaking engagements using the existing database and outbound efforts.
Maintain and update an organized outreach pipeline, including tracking submissions, follow-ups, and outcomes.
Support event preparation by creating branded speaker decks, social assets, and coordinating logistics as needed.
Monitor, manage, and respond to social media comments and messages in a timely manner using approved response templates.
Maintain and expand the community response database, ensuring consistency in tone and messaging.
Track engagement trends, sentiment, and recurring inquiries, escalating high-value opportunities or risks to the Founder.
At least 5+ years of experience in Social Media Management or Content Assistant roles; must be able to work independently and "lead the way."
Proven experience in personal branding or prior experience working directly with an influencer, founder, or public-facing personal brand (non-negotiable).
At least 1 year of experience working in a global remote environment with a North America–based company.
Proven ability to manage time effectively and adhere to strict deadlines.
Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, and Express, as well as Canva.
Deep familiarity with Instagram and LinkedIn native publishing, engagement tools, and community management.
Strong storytelling ability with a knack for turning complex topics and real-world conversations into relatable content.
Must be 100% transparent regarding AI usage for drafting; must possess the editorial skill to refine AI outputs so they remain authentic and on-brand.

Windows 11 or MacOS 15 Sequoia

Webcam and Headset

Demonstrates strong empathy and awareness when engaging with and responding to community interactions.
description:
About the job

Role: Social Media & Content Assistant (Personal Branding or Influencer Collaboration Experience Required)

Contract: Part-time Remote Contractor (10 hours weekly / 40 hours monthly)

Service Hours: Monday through Friday, flexible within 9 AM – 5 PM PST

Rate: $10 - $12 USD hourly (Salary is negotiable based on experience and location) 

Availability to Start: Immediately




Client's Profile

This US-based company is a cultural consultancy and storytelling agency that supports brands and organizations through content creation, influencer partnerships, and strategic communications. They take a hands-on, personalized approach to help clients navigate today's fast-changing media landscape, build authentic connections with their audience, and create meaningful, engaging brand narratives that drive long-term impact.




What You'll Do

As a Social Media & Content Assistant, you’ll play a key role in driving content development and supporting overall brand growth. This position is suited for someone who can take ownership of managing a high-profile digital presence, contributing across video editing, copywriting, content publishing, proactive outreach, and community engagement. You will act as a strategic execution partner, helping shape and maintain a consistent, impactful online presence. Your core responsibilities will include the following:




Content Creation

Copywriting & Captions Creation: Draft "human-voiced," on-brand copy and captions aligned with the Founder's tone and messaging for Instagram and LinkedIn.
Graphic Creation: Create high-quality visual assets using Adobe Creative Suite and Canva for social and event-related content.
Video Creation: Transform raw footage, founder insights, or training clips into polished, high-engagement short-form videos optimized for platform performance.
LinkedIn Content Creation: Repurpose long-form content, founder emails, and thought leadership into structured, professional LinkedIn posts.
Content Optimization: Continuously refine content based on engagement metrics, audience behavior, and platform trends.




Content Calendar Management

Own and manage the monthly content calendar across platforms, including planning, organization, and scheduling.
Ensure all content is created, reviewed, approved, and scheduled for timely and consistent posting.
Manage publishing across platforms, ensuring accuracy, formatting, and brand consistency.
Coordinate directly with the Founder to align content with business priorities, campaigns, and events.




Event Outreach & Support

Proactively identify, research, and vet speaking opportunities, partnerships, and relevant organizations.
Manage outreach and application processes for speaking engagements using the existing database and outbound efforts.
Maintain and update an organized outreach pipeline, including tracking submissions, follow-ups, and outcomes.
Support event preparation by creating branded speaker decks, social assets, and coordinating logistics as needed.




Community Management

Monitor, manage, and respond to social media comments and messages in a timely manner using approved response templates.
Maintain and expand the community response database, ensuring consistency in tone and messaging.
Track engagement trends, sentiment, and recurring inquiries, escalating high-value opportunities or risks to the Founder.




What You Should Have

Must-haves:

At least 5+ years of experience in Social Media Management or Content Assistant roles; must be able to work independently and "lead the way."
Proven experience in personal branding or prior experience working directly with an influencer, founder, or public-facing personal brand (non-negotiable).
At least 1 year of experience working in a global remote environment with a North America–based company.
Proven ability to manage time effectively and adhere to strict deadlines.
Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, and Express, as well as Canva.
Deep familiarity with Instagram and LinkedIn native publishing, engagement tools, and community management.
Strong storytelling ability with a knack for turning complex topics and real-world conversations into relatable content.
Must be 100% transparent regarding AI usage for drafting; must possess the editorial skill to refine AI outputs so they remain authentic and on-brand.




Technology Specifications: 

Minimum 100 Mbps Internet Speed
Windows 11 or MacOS 15 Sequoia
Minimum Intel i5 8th gen with 8GB RAM or Apple M1 chip with 8GB RAM
Webcam and Headset
Designated Office Space in your Home




Nice-to-haves:

Experience with Gorgias (or similar CRM) for sentiment analysis and engagement tracking.
Familiarity with project management tools like Notion.




Who You Are

We are hoping you are someone who:

Has clear and effective communication regarding project status and the use of AI tools.
Is comfortable working in an environment that is actively building its systems and processes from the ground up.
Demonstrates strong empathy and awareness when engaging with and responding to community interactions.

title: Product Manager - Contract
skills: You have 3+ years of experience in Product Management or similar roles (Business Analyst, Product Owner), ideally within a brand, agency, or consultancy environment.
You have a proven track record of delivering large-scale digital commerce projects, including platform migrations from legacy systems like SFCC, Magento, or Hybris to modern SaaS ecosystems.
You’re deeply familiar with Shopify Plus and the broader commerce technology stack — from ERP and OMS to PIM, CRM, CDP, and payments.
You thrive in enterprise stakeholder environments, collaborating confidently with C-suite, product, and engineering teams.
You’re fluent in agile delivery practices (Scrum, SAFe) and discovery frameworks, with a structured yet flexible mindset.
You’re an exceptional communicator and facilitator who can bring clarity, alignment, and focus to complex, multi-stakeholder projects.
You combine technical literacy (APIs, integrations, architecture fundamentals) with strong commercial acumen, always focused on ROI and client value.
You’re analytical and detail-oriented, comfortable defining and tracking KPIs that measure success and impact.
You’re adaptable and thrive in ambiguity — driving clarity, protecting scope, and helping teams deliver meaningful results.
Experience supporting multi-market or international merchants.
Familiarity with CRO, experimentation, and analytics tools.
Experience building or scaling a product management practice within an agency.
Lead client discovery sessions post-sale to understand business goals, customer journeys, and operational processes.
Partner with Technical Architects, Solutions Engineers, and Delivery Managers to define clear project scope and alignment.
Translate discovery findings into a product vision, measurable objectives, and an agreed scope baseline.
Support decision-making around change requests, scope variations, and timeline impacts, balancing commercial, technical, and client needs.
Build and maintain a structured product backlog — defining epics, user stories, and acceptance criteria with clarity and priority.
Facilitate trade-off discussions with client and internal teams, ensuring alignment with scope and outcomes.
Own the roadmap and prioritization process for migrations, new builds, and optimization projects.
Work closely with Delivery Managers, Technical Architects, and Engineers to ensure delivery aligns with defined goals.
Provide continuous product context during sprints, removing ambiguity and safeguarding scope boundaries.
Support UAT and client enablement before and after releases.
Focus on KPIs tied to conversion, AOV, retention, scalability, and operational efficiency.
Review delivered functionality with clients, recommending iterative improvements while maintaining scope discipline.
Act as a strategic product partner, driving growth and long-term value for enterprise Shopify clients.
Help establish Product Management as a discipline within the agency — building frameworks for discovery, documentation, and delivery.
Mentor peers in product-led, scope-driven thinking across teams.
Contribute to agency thought leadership, developing case studies and best practices for enterprise commerce.
Discovery and requirements gathering produce clear, aligned, and agreed-upon scopes.
Delivery teams operate with clarity and confidence, minimizing scope creep and misalignment.
Change requests are transparent and data-driven, with well-communicated trade-offs.
Clients experience measurable business impact and trust in our delivery.
Product Management becomes a recognized pillar that elevates delivery quality and client success.
🚀 Accelerate Your Growth: Work across multiple industries and cutting-edge projects with a team that ships fast.
💥 Maximum Impact: Shape the future of the tech industry by helping ambitious projects reach their potential.
🏅 True Ownership: Everyone ships code and has real autonomy with minimal meetings.
💡 Continuous Learning: Be part of a team of senior engineers and designers who love learning and knowledge sharing.
🤖 You Resist Modern Tools: We leverage AI and cutting-edge technology to build rapidly and focus our energy on solving the most complex, high-impact challenges for our clients.
🏗️ You Crave High Structure: We thrive in an autonomous, fast-moving environment, which means you need to be comfortable with some ambiguity.
😴 You Prefer Conventional Careers: Our consulting approach involves varied projects and direct client interaction — it's not for everyone.
1️⃣ You Like Staying in One Lane: Our projects require adapting to different tech stacks and modern tooling quickly.
🌐 Work From Anywhere: Choose your workspace — all you need is strong wifi and a passion for building!
🧘‍♂️ Work / Life Balance: We believe in our team’s ability to have it all; a great career, and time to unplug and live…you know...life.
🩺 Employee Care: We provide full benefits (healthcare, dental, vision) for our employees (401k for our US employees)
🏖️ Unlimited PTO: Everyone needs a break. Take at least 15 days off a year, and more if you need—just be cool about it and keep the team in mind.
🎉 Regular Team Retreat: Join us for a week of team bonding at amazing destinations. Recent trips include the Dominican Republic, Cancun, and Hawaii — plus ones welcome.
description:
About the job

Lazer is a world-class digital product studio composed of 180+ senior engineers and designers with backgrounds from companies like Apple, Google, Coinbase, and more. With our product experience, we have designed, engineered, and grown products from $0 to $200M in revenue.

Clients seek out our help because we have the talent to deeply understand their needs and provide industry, technical, or product insights that are uniquely valuable to their efforts. Our clients range from early-stage startups and venture studios to recognizable retail brands and exciting enterprises. Some of our notable clients include Google, Shopify, Coinbase, Alchemy, Hinge, OVO, Polymarket, and more.

We are a remote-first organization headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, with employees worldwide. We believe in providing the best experience possible for all Lazerites by fostering a strong community through regular events, company vacations, competitive compensation, unlimited PTO, and more!

Join Lazer and help us solve problems and build the next generation of products!

Lazer Commerce is a specialized team within Lazer focused on crafting scalable, high-performing commerce experiences across the Shopify ecosystem. We partner with forward-thinking brands and agencies to design and implement custom storefronts, headless architectures, and robust backend integrations. From theme development to complex ERP and OMS workflows, our engineers bring deep expertise in Shopify, modern frameworks, and commerce infrastructure to help clients launch, scale, and optimize their digital retail experiences.

The Role

We’re looking for a Product Manager to help shape, define, and deliver large-scale Shopify commerce experiences for leading brands.

In this role, you’ll bridge the gap between strategy, delivery, and technology — translating discovery insights into actionable roadmaps and ensuring every project delivers measurable value.

Please Note: This is a Contract position (hourly rate). We welcome applications from across the globe, but our preferred candidates should be able to have a meaningful overlap with Eastern Standard Timezone (EST).

Who You Are


You have 3+ years of experience in Product Management or similar roles (Business Analyst, Product Owner), ideally within a brand, agency, or consultancy environment.
You have a proven track record of delivering large-scale digital commerce projects, including platform migrations from legacy systems like SFCC, Magento, or Hybris to modern SaaS ecosystems.
You’re deeply familiar with Shopify Plus and the broader commerce technology stack — from ERP and OMS to PIM, CRM, CDP, and payments.
You thrive in enterprise stakeholder environments, collaborating confidently with C-suite, product, and engineering teams.
You’re fluent in agile delivery practices (Scrum, SAFe) and discovery frameworks, with a structured yet flexible mindset.
You’re an exceptional communicator and facilitator who can bring clarity, alignment, and focus to complex, multi-stakeholder projects.
You combine technical literacy (APIs, integrations, architecture fundamentals) with strong commercial acumen, always focused on ROI and client value.
You’re analytical and detail-oriented, comfortable defining and tracking KPIs that measure success and impact.
You’re adaptable and thrive in ambiguity — driving clarity, protecting scope, and helping teams deliver meaningful results.


Bonus Points If You Have


Experience supporting multi-market or international merchants.
Familiarity with CRO, experimentation, and analytics tools.
Experience building or scaling a product management practice within an agency.


What You'll Do

Discovery & Scope Definition


Lead client discovery sessions post-sale to understand business goals, customer journeys, and operational processes.
Partner with Technical Architects, Solutions Engineers, and Delivery Managers to define clear project scope and alignment.
Translate discovery findings into a product vision, measurable objectives, and an agreed scope baseline.
Support decision-making around change requests, scope variations, and timeline impacts, balancing commercial, technical, and client needs.


Backlog & Roadmap Management


Build and maintain a structured product backlog — defining epics, user stories, and acceptance criteria with clarity and priority.
Facilitate trade-off discussions with client and internal teams, ensuring alignment with scope and outcomes.
Own the roadmap and prioritization process for migrations, new builds, and optimization projects.


Collaboration & Execution


Work closely with Delivery Managers, Technical Architects, and Engineers to ensure delivery aligns with defined goals.
Provide continuous product context during sprints, removing ambiguity and safeguarding scope boundaries.
Support UAT and client enablement before and after releases.


Value Realization & Optimization


Focus on KPIs tied to conversion, AOV, retention, scalability, and operational efficiency.
Review delivered functionality with clients, recommending iterative improvements while maintaining scope discipline.
Act as a strategic product partner, driving growth and long-term value for enterprise Shopify clients.


Agency & Practice Building


Help establish Product Management as a discipline within the agency — building frameworks for discovery, documentation, and delivery.
Mentor peers in product-led, scope-driven thinking across teams.
Contribute to agency thought leadership, developing case studies and best practices for enterprise commerce.


What Success Looks Like


Discovery and requirements gathering produce clear, aligned, and agreed-upon scopes.
Delivery teams operate with clarity and confidence, minimizing scope creep and misalignment.
Change requests are transparent and data-driven, with well-communicated trade-offs.
Clients experience measurable business impact and trust in our delivery.
Product Management becomes a recognized pillar that elevates delivery quality and client success.


AI in our hiring process

We use AI to help us review and shortlist applications based on job-related criteria. A human hiring manager always makes the call on who moves forward. As a company that builds with AI every day, we're all for candidates using it too — just be upfront about how it helped.

Why Work With Us


🚀 Accelerate Your Growth: Work across multiple industries and cutting-edge projects with a team that ships fast.
💥 Maximum Impact: Shape the future of the tech industry by helping ambitious projects reach their potential.
🏅 True Ownership: Everyone ships code and has real autonomy with minimal meetings.
💡 Continuous Learning: Be part of a team of senior engineers and designers who love learning and knowledge sharing.


Why This Might Not Be For You


🤖 You Resist Modern Tools: We leverage AI and cutting-edge technology to build rapidly and focus our energy on solving the most complex, high-impact challenges for our clients.
🏗️ You Crave High Structure: We thrive in an autonomous, fast-moving environment, which means you need to be comfortable with some ambiguity.
😴 You Prefer Conventional Careers: Our consulting approach involves varied projects and direct client interaction — it's not for everyone.
1️⃣ You Like Staying in One Lane: Our projects require adapting to different tech stacks and modern tooling quickly.


Benefits & Perks


🌐 Work From Anywhere: Choose your workspace — all you need is strong wifi and a passion for building!
🧘‍♂️ Work / Life Balance: We believe in our team’s ability to have it all; a great career, and time to unplug and live…you know...life.
🩺 Employee Care: We provide full benefits (healthcare, dental, vision) for our employees (401k for our US employees)
🏖️ Unlimited PTO: Everyone needs a break. Take at least 15 days off a year, and more if you need—just be cool about it and keep the team in mind.
🎉 Regular Team Retreat: Join us for a week of team bonding at amazing destinations. Recent trips include the Dominican Republic, Cancun, and Hawaii — plus ones welcome.

description:
About the job

We’re not looking for a marketing guru.

We’re looking for someone who can keep things moving.




A growing property management company needs a Marketing Assistant who can turn ideas into content, keep listings updated, and make sure properties are presented professionally across every platform.




Because in property management, empty listings cost money.

And inconsistent marketing creates confusion.




That’s where you come in.

If you’re organized, creative, and know how to manage content without letting details slip through the cracks, this could be the role for you.




What You’ll Do

Create marketing content and graphics using Canva
Repurpose existing materials into fresh, engaging content
Draft flyers, newsletters, and property descriptions
Update and maintain property listings on Apartments.com and other rental platforms
Schedule and manage social media posts on Facebook and Instagram
Keep marketing materials accurate, on-brand, and posted on time
Maintain a content calendar for campaigns and updates
Support basic video editing for social and marketing content
Monitor engagement and respond to simple social media inquiries when needed




What We’re Looking For

Experience with Canva and basic marketing content creation
Familiarity with social media scheduling and posting
Basic video editing skills
Experience updating websites or property listings
Strong attention to detail and organization
Ability to manage multiple tasks independently
Clear written and verbal communication skills
Property management marketing experience is a plus




Why This Role Matters

Good marketing helps great properties get noticed.

Your work will help keep listings active, content consistent, and marketing operations running smoothly, so the team can focus on serving residents and growing the business.

If you enjoy creating content, staying organized, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Copywriter
skills: Produce high-quality, well-researched articles optimized for SEO and GEO.
Update articles that are outdated, underperforming, or misaligned with current messaging.
Contribute to proprietary data initiatives, helping compile survey results, analyze data, and shape findings into publishable research assets.
Write high-converting B2B copy across emails, landing pages, case studies, and core website pages.
Use Claude and internal AI workflows to accelerate research and first drafts, then apply strong human judgment to refine and elevate final output.
Collaborate closely with the Content Lead to align on direction, incorporate feedback, and iterate until work meets quality standards.
Maintain messaging, positioning, and brand voice consistency across all content and copy.
Help improve, build, and maintain templates and workflows so high-quality assets can be produced faster over time.
Continuously build domain expertise in our industry and ICPs to increase speed and quality of written assets.
2+ years of B2B marketing content writing or copywriting experience (services, SaaS, or agency).
Outstanding storytelling skills
Knows how to find the interesting angle, the credible source, and the data point that makes a piece worth reading.
Proven ability to write persuasive, conversion-focused copy for web, decks, email, ad campaigns, and other marketing collateral.
Strong self-editing discipline. Expects multiple iterations and improves drafts before feedback.
Experienced in using AI for research and drafting while knowing when heavy human rewriting is required.
World-class portfolio showing strong work across assets such as landing pages, case studies, white papers, articles, and emails.
Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.
Ability to hit deadlines, manage multiple projects, and adapt tone by channel and audience.
Startup or agency background.
Experience collaborating with designers to create premium, polished marketing assets.
Familiarity with SEO and A/B testing copy.

Experience with community engagement: Reddit, Quora, LinkedIn, or professional forums. Understands how to contribute helpfully to a conversation rather than just promote. Knows what gets ignored and what earns credibility.
Experience contributing to original research: surveys, data reports, industry studies. Comfortable working with raw data and shaping it into a narrative.
100% remote role.
Compensation in USD.
Time off: 14 vacation days, US working holidays + 4 local floating holidays, birthday off.
Health insurance stipend.
description:
About the job

About us:

At Near, we help top talent in Latin America find remote roles with US companies. Our mission is to create better lives by fostering a remote work culture that transcends borders.




About the role:

We're looking for a writer who can produce content that genuinely stands out. Content that ranks, earns citations, builds credibility, and gives readers something they couldn't get from an AI summary.

You'll spend the majority of your time on content: researching and writing articles, contributing to original research reports, and building the kind of assets that attract attention from humans, Google, and LLMs.

You'll also bring solid copywriting skills that come into play on specific assets: emails, landing pages, and occasionally social media posts.

What we're looking for is someone who raises the bar on what we produce. Someone who brings genuine editorial judgment and the instinct to push past consensus answers toward something worth reading.

You'll work in an AI-augmented environment, using Claude and internal workflows to accelerate research and drafting, but strong human judgment is what separates great output from good output here.

This is a role for someone who can research fast, write clearly, and ship on tight deadlines.
